resources.string: SELECT COUNT(*) VALUEPAIR FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION WHERE GUID = \'%1$s\' AND STATUS < 2
SELECT COUNT(*) VALUEPAIR FROM WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER WHERE ID = %1$d AND STATUS < 2
DELETE FROM WOR_CUSTGPSLOC WHERE CLIENTREF=%1$d AND (FIRM IS NULL OR FIRM = \'%2$s\')
DELETE FROM WOR_CUSTGPSLOC WHERE CLIENTREF=%1$d AND (FIRM IS NULL OR FIRM = \'%2$s\') AND ISNULL(SHIPINFOREF,0)=%3$d
DELETE FROM WOR_PROCESS WHERE PREF = %1$d AND CLIENTREF = %2$d AND FIRM = %3$d AND PTYPE = %4$d AND USERID = %5$d
UPDATE WOR_NOTIFICATION SET STATUS = 3, DATE = GETDATE() WHERE ID = %1$d
UPDATE WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER SET STATUS = 3, DELETIONDATE = GETDATE() WHERE ID = %1$d

SELECT NU.ID NOTIFIEDUSERID, NU.GUID NOTIFIEDUSERGUID, RECEIVER.FNAME RECEIVERNAME, RECEIVER.LNAME RECEIVERLASTNAME, RECEIVER.USERNAME RECEIVERUSERNAME, NU.STATUS, CONVERT(varchar,NU.DELIVEREDDATE,120) DELIVEREDDATE, CONVERT(varchar,NU.READDATE,120) READDATE, CONVERT(varchar,NU.DELETIONDATE,120) DELETIONDATE, NU.USERREF, CONVERT(varchar,N.SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, NU.NOTIFICATIONGUID FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER NU WITH(NOLOCK) ON NU.NOTIFICATIONGUID = N.GUID INNER JOIN WOR_USERS SENDER WITH(NOLOCK) ON SENDER.USERID = N.SENDERREF INNER JOIN WOR_USERS RECEIVER WITH(NOLOCK) ON RECEIVER.USERID = NU.USERREF WHERE N.SENDERREF = %1$d AND N.ID = %2$d

SELECT NU.ID NOTIFIEDUSERID, NU.GUID NOTIFIEDUSERGUID, RECEIVER.FNAME RECEIVERNAME, RECEIVER.LNAME RECEIVERLASTNAME, RECEIVER.USERNAME RECEIVERUSERNAME, NU.STATUS, CONVERT(varchar,NU.DELIVEREDDATE,120) DELIVEREDDATE, CONVERT(varchar,NU.READDATE,120) READDATE, CONVERT(varchar,NU.DELETIONDATE,120) DELETIONDATE, NU.USERREF, CONVERT(varchar,N.SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, NU.NOTIFICATIONGUID FROM WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER NU WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) ON N.GUID = NU.NOTIFICATIONGUID INNER JOIN WOR_USERS RECEIVER WITH(NOLOCK) ON RECEIVER.USERID = NU.USERREF WHERE NU.ID = %1$d
(SELECT Count(*) from sys.columns where name=\'APPVERSION\' AND object_id = Object_ID(N\'WOR_PROCESS\')) AS APPVERSIONWORPROCESS

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.ID [ID], C.TYPE [TYPE], C.BRAND [BRAND], C.MODEL [MODEL], C.BARCODE [BARCODE], C.LOCINFO [LOCINFO], C.STATUS [STATUS], C.CLIENTCODE [CLIENTCODE], C.SALESMANREF [SALESMANREF], CONVERT(datetime, C.MODIFIEDDATE, 101) AS [MODIFIEDDATE], C.CREATEDDATE [CREATEDDATE], C.CODE [CODE], 1 AS ISTRANSFER, C.FIRM, %1$s ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_CABIN C WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1 = 1 %2$s ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT COS(CONVERT(REAL,W.LATITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LAT_COS, SIN(CONVERT(REAL,W.LATITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LAT_SIN, COS(CONVERT(REAL,W.LONGTITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LONG_COS, SIN(CONVERT(REAL,W.LONGTITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LONG_SIN, W.ID, W.CLIENTREF, W.CLCODE, W.CLNAME, W.LATITUDE, W.LONGTITUDE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY W.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_CUSTGPSLOC W WITH(NOLOCK) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT COS(CONVERT(REAL,W.LATITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LAT_COS, SIN(CONVERT(REAL,W.LATITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LAT_SIN, COS(CONVERT(REAL,W.LONGTITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LONG_COS, SIN(CONVERT(REAL,W.LONGTITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LONG_SIN, W.ID, W.CLIENTREF, W.CLCODE, W.CLNAME, W.LATITUDE, W.LONGTITUDE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY W.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_CUSTGPSLOC W WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE W.FIRM = \'%1$s\' OR W.FIRM IS NULL ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT COS(CONVERT(REAL,W.LATITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LAT_COS, SIN(CONVERT(REAL,W.LATITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LAT_SIN, COS(CONVERT(REAL,W.LONGTITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LONG_COS, SIN(CONVERT(REAL,W.LONGTITUDE) * PI() /180) AS LONG_SIN, W.ID, W.CLIENTREF, W.CLCODE, W.CLNAME, W.LATITUDE, W.LONGTITUDE, W.SHIPINFOREF, W.SHIPINFOCODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY W.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_CUSTGPSLOC W WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE W.FIRM = \'%1$s\' OR W.FIRM IS NULL ) AS R

SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT D.LOGICALREF, D.LINENO_, D.DEFINITION_, D.WHOUSE [WHOUSE], D.STYPE [STYPE], D.TYPE [TYPE], D.WRKTYPE [WORKTYPE], D.FORMGROUP [FORMGROUP], D.PRODUCTCLASSREF [PRODUCTCLASSREF], D.USEMINSTOCK [USEMINSTOCK], D.MINSTOCK [MINSTOCK], D.USEPENETRATION [USEPENET], D.PTYPE [PENETTYPE], D.ENTPRICE [PENETPRICE], D.FIRMNR [FIRMNR], D.INNERSQL [INNERSQL], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY D.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_DEFORDER D WITH(NOLOCK), WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ( LEN(D.GROUPCODE) > 0 AND LEN(U.GROUPCODE)> 0 AND D.GROUPCODE LIKE \'%%\' + U.GROUPCODE + \'%%\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI ) AND U.USERID =%1$d AND D.FIRMNR=%2$s AND (D.SLSMANREF=%3$d OR D.SLSMANREF=0 OR D.SLSMANREF=-1)) UNION (SELECT D.LOGICALREF, D.LINENO_, D.DEFINITION_, D.WHOUSE [WHOUSE], D.STYPE [STYPE], D.TYPE [TYPE], D.WRKTYPE [WORKTYPE], D.FORMGROUP [FORMGROUP], D.PRODUCTCLASSREF [PRODUCTCLASSREF],D.USEMINSTOCK [USEMINSTOCK], D.MINSTOCK [MINSTOCK], D.USEPENETRATION [USEPENET], D.PTYPE [PENETTYPE], D.ENTPRICE [PENETPRICE], D.FIRMNR [FIRMNR], D.INNERSQL [INNERSQL], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY D.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_DEFORDER D WITH(NOLOCK) , WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE D.GROUPCODE=\'\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI AND U.USERID =%1$d AND D.FIRMNR=%2$s AND (D.SLSMANREF=%3$d OR D.SLSMANREF=0 OR D.SLSMANREF=-1)) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT D.LOGICALREF, D.DEFORDERID [DEFORDERID], D.GROUP_ [GROUP_], D.PRODUCTID [ITEMREF], REPLACE(D.MINAMOUNT,\',\',\'.\') [MINAMOUNT], REPLACE(D.MAXAMOUNT,\',\',\'.\') [MAXAMOUNT], D.ISSLCTUNIT [ISSLCTUNIT], D.UNIT [UNIT], D.LINENO_ [LINENO_], D.MCODE [MCODE], D.COLORID [COLORID], D.UNITREF [UNITREF], D.LINETYPE [LINETYPE], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY D.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_DEFORDERDETAIL D WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE DEFORDERID IN ( (SELECT X.LOGICALREF FROM WOR_DEFORDER X WITH(NOLOCK) , WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (LEN(X.GROUPCODE)>0 AND (LEN(U.GROUPCODE)>0 AND X.GROUPCODE LIKE \'%%\' AND U.GROUPCODE LIKE \'%%\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI)) AND U.USERID=%1$d AND X.FIRMNR=%2$s) UNION (SELECT X.LOGICALREF FROM WOR_DEFORDER X WITH(NOLOCK), WOR_USERS U WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE X.GROUPCODE=\'\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI AND U.USERID=%1$d AND X.FIRMNR=%2$s)) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TYPE = ( CASE ParameterId WHEN \'235\' THEN 0 WHEN \'236\' THEN 1 WHEN \'239\' THEN 4 WHEN \'240\' THEN 5 WHEN \'238\' THEN 2 WHEN \'41\' THEN 3 WHEN \'241\' THEN 6 WHEN \'242\' THEN 7 WHEN \'237\' THEN 9 ELSE -1 END), VALUE [DEFINITION_], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ParameterId) AS RowNum FROM WOR_PARAMUSER WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ParameterId IN (\'235\',\'236\',\'239\',\'240\',\'238\',\'41\',\'241\',\'242\',\'237\') AND UserId =%1$d )AS R
SELECT * FROM WOR_PRINTDESIGNER W WHERE W.REPORTTYPE=%1$d %2$s
SELECT * FROM( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_PRINTDESIGNER ) AS R
SELECT DEVICESERINO1 FROM WOR_ANDDEVICE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE USERID=%1$d

SELECT * FROM( SELECT S.PNAME AS PARAMNO, S.PVALUE AS PARAMVALUE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY S.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_SETTINGS S WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE S.PNAME IN (\'23\',\'24\',\'25\',\'26\',\'27\',\'28\',\'29\',\'30\',\'31\') ) AS R

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT F.ID, F.FORMNAME, F.FORMTYPE, F.FORMCONTENT, F.FORMCONFIG, CAST( (DATEPART(DAY, GETDATE()) * 1.0) + (DATEPART(MONTH, GETDATE()) * 30.0) + ((DATEPART(YEAR, GETDATE()) - 2015) * 365.0) + ((DATEPART(HOUR, GETDATE()) * 3600.0 + (DATEPART(MINUTE, GETDATE()) * 60.0) + DATEPART(SECOND, GETDATE())) / 100000.0) AS FLOAT) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY F.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_EMAILFORMS F WITH(NOLOCK) ) AS R
(SELECT Count(*) from sys.columns where name=\'FDATE\' AND object_id = Object_ID(N\'%1$s\')) AS FDATEON%2$s
SELECT ID KEYPAIR FROM WOR_PROCESS WHERE PREF = %1$d AND CLIENTREF = %2$d AND FIRM = %3$d AND PTYPE = %4$d AND USERID = %5$d
SELECT PNAME AS PARAMNO, PVALUE PARAMVALUE FROM WOR_SETTINGS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PNAME IN(\'98\',\'99\',\'ProductInfo\')

SELECT * FROM( SELECT M.LOGICALREF, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), M.BEGDATE, 104) +\' \' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), M.BEGDATE, 108) [BEGDATE], CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),M.ENDDATE, 104) + \' \' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), M.ENDDATE, 108) [ENDDATE], M.DEFINITION_, M.NOTE [NOTE], M.TYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY M.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_MARKETINGMESSAGE M WITH(NOLOCK), WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (\',\' + RTRIM(M.GROUPCODE) + \',\') LIKE \'%%,\' + U.GROUPCODE + \',%%\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI AND U.USERID=%1$d AND GETDATE() < M.ENDDATE ) AS R \n

SELECT SENDER.FNAME, SENDER.LNAME, SENDER.USERNAME, N.SENDERREF, N.TITLE, N.MESSAGE, CONVERT(varchar,N.SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, N.STATUS, N.ID NOTIFICATIONID, N.GUID NOTIFICATIONGUID, N.WORKINGHOURS FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_USERS SENDER WITH(NOLOCK) ON SENDER.USERID = N.SENDERREF WHERE N.ID = %1$d

SELECT SENDER.FNAME, SENDER.LNAME, SENDER.USERNAME, N.SENDERREF, N.TITLE, N.MESSAGE, CONVERT(varchar,N.SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, N.STATUS, N.ID NOTIFICATIONID, N.GUID NOTIFICATIONGUID FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_USERS SENDER WITH(NOLOCK) ON SENDER.USERID = N.SENDERREF WHERE N.GUID = N\'%1$s\'
SELECT REVISION AS PANELVERSION FROM WOR_VERSION WITH (NOLOCK)

SELECT * FROM( SELECT P.LOGICALREF, P.PCODE, P.PDEFINITION, P.PTYPE [PTYPE], P.STATUS [STATUS], CONVERT(date, P.STARTDATE,110) [BEGINDATE], CONVERT(date, P.ENDDATE,110) [ENDDATE], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY P.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_PENETRATION P WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE P.STATUS = 1 AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),110) BETWEEN CONVERT(DATE,STARTDATE,110) AND CONVERT(DATE, ENDDATE,110) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT P.LOGICALREF, P.PNT_ID, P.ITEMREF [ITEMREF], P.ITEMTYPE [ITEMTYPE], P.SEQUENCE [SEQUENCE], P.PER_PRICE [PER_PRICE], P.PER_NOTE [PER_NOTE], P.PER_PIC [PER_PIC], P.ITEMNAME [ITEMNAME], P.ITEMCODE [ITEMCODE], P.STATUS ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY P.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_PENETRATIONDETAIL P WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE P.STATUS = 1 AND P.PNT_ID IN (SELECT X.LOGICALREF FROM WOR_PENETRATION X WITH(NOLOCK) ) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT K.ID, K.REPINDEX, K.REPORTNAME, K.RTYPE, K.REPORTCONTENT, CASE WHEN K.SUBTYPE IS NULL THEN 4 ELSE K.SUBTYPE END SUBTYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY K.REPINDEX) AS RowNum FROM WOR_REPORTS K WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE K.RTYPE in (4,5,6) AND K.ID IN (%1$s) ) AS R
SELECT USERID,EMAIL,(FNAME + \' \' +LNAME) AS [NAME] FROM WOR_USERS WHERE TYPE=2 AND EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND EMAIL<> \'\'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T.LOGICALREF, (CASE T.TODOUSERID WHEN -1 THEN 'Yonetici' ELSE ISNULL((SELECT (U.FNAME +' ' +U.LNAME) [FLNAME] FROM WOR_USERS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE T.TODOUSERID=U.USERID),'') END) [SENDER], CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), T.BEGDATE, 104) + ' '+ CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),T.BEGDATE,108) [BEGDATE],
 CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), T.ENDDATE, 104) + ' '
 + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), T.ENDDATE, 108) [ENDDATE],
 T.PRIORITY [PRIORITY],
 T.DESC_ [DESC_],
 T.NOTE [NOTE],
 T.CUSTOMERID [CLREF],
 T.CUSTOMERID [CLCODE],
 T.STATUS [STATUS],T.SALESMUST [SALESMUST],
 T.EMAILADDR [EMAILADDR] ,
 T.READTIME [READTIME] ,
 T.COMPLATETIME [COMPLATETIME] ,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_TODO T WITH(NOLOCK), WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE T.USERID=U.USERID AND T.USERID=%1$d AND T.STATUS IN (0,1) ) AS R
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),110) TRANSFERDATE , 1 AS RowNum ) AS R
SELECT COUNT(*) AS AUTH FROM WOR_USERFIRMS WHERE USERID=%1$d AND FIRMNR=%2$s AND PERIODNR=%3$s

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY N.SENDDATE DESC) AS RowNum FROM ( SELECT SENDER.FNAME, SENDER.LNAME, SENDER.USERNAME, N.SENDERREF, NU.USERREF, N.TITLE, N.MESSAGE, CONVERT(varchar,N.SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, NU.STATUS, N.ID NOTIFICATIONID, N.GUID NOTIFICATIONGUID, NU.ID NOTIFIEDUSERID, NU.GUID NOTIFIEDUSERGUID FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER NU WITH(NOLOCK) ON NU.NOTIFICATIONGUID = N.GUID INNER JOIN WOR_USERS SENDER WITH(NOLOCK) ON SENDER.USERID = N.SENDERREF WHERE NU.USERREF = %1$d AND (\'\' = N\'%4$s\' OR N.TITLE LIKE N\'%%%4$s%%\' OR SENDER.FNAME LIKE N\'%%%4$s%%\' OR SENDER.LNAME LIKE N\'%%%4$s%%\') AND (\'\' = \'%5$s\' OR (N.SENDDATE >= CONVERT(datetime,\'%5$s\',120))) AND (\'\' = \'%6$s\' OR (N.SENDDATE <= CONVERT(datetime,\'%6$s\',120))) AND %7$s UNION SELECT SENDER.FNAME, SENDER.LNAME, SENDER.USERNAME, N.SENDERREF, 0 USERREF, N.TITLE, N.MESSAGE, CONVERT(varchar,N.SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, N.STATUS, N.ID NOTIFICATIONID, N.GUID NOTIFICATIONGUID, \'\' NOTIFIEDUSERID, \'\' NOTIFIEDUSERGUID FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_USERS SENDER WITH(NOLOCK) ON SENDER.USERID = N.SENDERREF WHERE N.SENDERREF = %1$d AND (\'\' = N\'%4$s\' OR N.TITLE LIKE N\'%%%4$s%%\' OR SENDER.FNAME LIKE N\'%%%4$s%%\' OR SENDER.LNAME LIKE N\'%%%4$s%%\') AND (\'\' = \'%5$s\' OR (N.SENDDATE >= CONVERT(datetime,\'%5$s\',120))) AND (\'\' = \'%6$s\' OR (N.SENDDATE <= CONVERT(datetime,\'%6$s\',120))) AND %8$s ) N ) R WHERE R.RowNum BETWEEN %2$d AND %3$d

SELECT SENDER.FNAME, SENDER.LNAME, SENDER.USERNAME, N.TITLE, N.MESSAGE, CONVERT(varchar,SENDDATE,120) SENDDATE, NU.STATUS, N.ID NOTIFICATIONID, N.GUID NOTIFICATIONGUID, NU.ID NOTIFIEDUSERID, NU.GUID NOTIFIEDUSERGUID, N.WORKINGHOURS FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION N WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER NU WITH(NOLOCK) ON NU.NOTIFICATIONGUID = N.GUID INNER JOIN WOR_USERS SENDER WITH(NOLOCK) ON SENDER.USERID = N.SENDERREF WHERE NU.STATUS <2 AND NU.USERREF = %1$d AND N.SENDDATE<=GETDATE()
SELECT ParameterId [PARAMNO], VALUE AS PARAMVALUE FROM WOR_PARAMUSER WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE USERID = %1$d
SELECT ID KEYPAIR FROM WOR_PROCESS WHERE DATE_ = CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120) AND CLIENTREF = %2$d AND FIRM = %3$d AND PTYPE = %4$d AND USERID = %5$d AND USERTITLE=%6$d AND CLCODE = \'%7$s\'
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT W.ID [LOGICALREF], W.DESC_ [DESC_], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY W.ID) AS RowNum FROM WOR_VISITINFO W WITH(NOLOCK) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT R.LOGICALREF, R.ROUTECODE, R.ROUTEDEFINITION, R.USERID, CONVERT(varchar, R.CREATEDDATE, 120) [CREATEDDATE], CONVERT(varchar, R.PERIODSTARTDATE, 120) [PERIODSTARTDATE], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY R.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_ROUTE R WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE R.USERID = %1$s AND R.PERIODSTARTDATE <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT RD.LOGICALREF, RD.ROUTEID, RD.DAY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RD.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_ROUTEDAY RD WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_ROUTE R WITH(NOLOCK) ON RD.ROUTEID = R.LOGICALREF WHERE R.USERID = %1$s AND R.PERIODSTARTDATE <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT RP.LOGICALREF, RP.ROUTEID, RP.CLIENTREF, RP.SHIPMENTREF, RP.SEQUENCE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RP.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_ROUTEPLAN RP WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN WOR_ROUTE R WITH(NOLOCK) ON RP.ROUTEID = R.LOGICALREF WHERE R.USERID = %1$s AND R.PERIODSTARTDATE <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) ) AS R
SELECT * FROM( SELECT UC.LOGICALREF, UC.USERID, UC.CLIENTREF, UC.SHIPMENTREF, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UC.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_USERCUSTOMERS UC WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE UC.USERID = %1$s ) AS R

SELECT NAME, 1 OPTYPE FROM (SELECT NAME FROM sys.tables WHERE NAME LIKE \'WOR_%%\' EXCEPT (%1$s)) A UNION ALL SELECT NAME, -1 OPTYPE FROM ( (%1$s) EXCEPT SELECT NAME FROM sys.tables WHERE NAME LIKE \'WOR_%%\') B
INSERT INTO WOR_CUSTGPSLOC (CLIENTREF,LATITUDE,LONGTITUDE,CLCODE ,CLNAME, FIRM, SHIPINFOREF) VALUES(%1$d,%2$s,%3$s,\'%4$s\',\'%5$s\', \'%6$s\',%7$d)

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS (DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, VREASON, VNOTE, PDISTANCE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, VISITREF) VALUES(CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d, %3$d, %4$d, %5$d, \'\', \'\', \'\', 0, \'%6$s\', \'%7$s\', %8$s, %9$s,%10$d,%11$d ) ;

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS (DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, VREASON, VNOTE, PDISTANCE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, VISITREF, APPVERSION) VALUES(CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d, %3$d, %4$d, %5$d, \'\', \'\', \'\', 0, \'%6$s\', \'%7$s\', %8$s, %9$s, %10$d, %11$d, \'%12$s\' ) ;

INSERT INTO WOR_USERPENETRATION (PNTID , PNTDETAILID , USERID , CLIENTID , DATE_ , VY, AMOUNT , PRICE , CURRENCY ,SOURCETYPE , DEFFIELD1 , DEFFIELD2 , DEFFIELD3 , DEFFIELD4 , DEFFIELD5 , DEFFIELD6 , DEFFIELD7 , DEFFIELD8 , DEFFIELD9 , DEFFIELD10 , PIMAGE) VALUES (%1$d, %2$d, %3$d, %4$d, \'%5$s\', %6$d, %7$s, %8$s, \'%9$s\', %10$d, \'%11$s\', \'%12$s\', \'%13$s\', \'%14$s\', \'%15$s\', \'%16$s\', \'%17$s\', \'%18$s\', \'%19$s\', \'%20$s\', CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX),\'%21$s\'));
INSERT INTO WOR_PNTHEADER (PNT_ID , CLIENTREF, SALESMANREF , PICTURE, NOTE, DATE, PNT_GUID) VALUES (%1$d, %2$d, %3$d, %4$s , \'%5$s\', \'%6$s\', \'%7$s\');

INSERT INTO WOR_PNTTRANS (PNT_ID ,PNTDTL_ID, CLIENTREF, SALESMANREF , PNTHEADER_REF, PRICE , NOTE, PICTURE , AMOUNT, DATE) VALUES (%1$d, %2$d, \'%3$s\', %4$d, \'%5$s\', %6$s, \'%7$s\',%8$s , %9$s, \'%10$s\');

INSERT INTO WOR_ROUTEPROCESS (USERCUSTOMERID, ROUTEPLANID, ROUTEDAYID, CREATEDDATE, PROCESSREF, FICHENO, PROCESSTYPE, CLIENTREF, FIRM, PSEQUENCE, SEQUENCE, USERID, PROCESSDATE) VALUES (%1$d, %2$d, %3$d, \'%4$s\', \'%5$s\', \'%6$s\', %7$d, \'%8$s\', \'%9$s\', %10$d, %11$d, %12$d, \'%13$s\');

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, VREASON, VNOTE, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, PREF, PDISTANCE) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d,%3$d,%4$d ,\'%5$s\',\'%6$s\',\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$s,%10$s,%11$d,%12$d,%13$d)

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, VREASON, VNOTE, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, PREF, PDISTANCE, APPVERSION) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d,%3$d,%4$d ,\'%5$s\',\'%6$s\',\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$s,%10$s,%11$d,%12$d,%13$d,\'%14$s\')

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, PDISTANCE, VREASON, VNOTE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, SHIPINFOREF, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, USERTITLE, VISITIMAGE, VISITSTARTDATE, VISITENDDATE, VISITREF ) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120),%2$d,%3$d,%4$d, %5$d,%6$d,\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$d,\'%10$s\',\'%11$s\',%12$d,%13$s,%14$s,%15$d,%16$d,CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX),\'%17$s\'), CONVERT(datetime,%18$s,120), CONVERT(datetime,%19$s,120), %20$d )

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, PDISTANCE, VREASON, VNOTE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, SHIPINFOREF, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, USERTITLE, VISITIMAGE, VISITSTARTDATE, VISITENDDATE, VISITREF, APPVERSION) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120),%2$d,%3$d,%4$d, %5$d,%6$d,\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$d,\'%10$s\',\'%11$s\',%12$d,%13$s,%14$s,%15$d,%16$d,CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX),\'%17$s\'), CONVERT(datetime,%18$s,120), CONVERT(datetime,%19$s,120), %20$d, \'%21$s\')

SELECT CASE WHEN CHECKWORKTIME = \'True\' THEN CASE WHEN GETDATE() BETWEEN STARTDATETIME AND ENDDATETIME THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE 1 END VALUEPAIR, STARTDATETIME, ENDDATETIME FROM ( SELECT VALUE CHECKWORKTIME, ( SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 120) + \' \' + VALUE, 120) FROM WOR_PARAMUSER WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ParameterId = 194 AND UserId = %1$d ) STARTDATETIME, ( SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 120) + \' \' + VALUE, 120) FROM WOR_PARAMUSER WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ParameterId = 195 AND UserId = %1$d ) ENDDATETIME FROM WOR_PARAMUSER WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ParameterId = 196 AND UserId = %1$d ) WORKTIMEPARAMS

SELECT TARIH DATE_ ,VADE_TARIHI PROCDATE ,BELGE_NO FICHENO ,BORC DEBIT ,ALACAK CREDIT ,ACIKLAMA [DESC] ,ENT_REF_KEY DOCODE ,HAREKET_TURU X ,0 AS TOTAL_DEBIT ,0 AS TOTAL_CREDIT ,0 AS BALANCE FROM ( SELECT \'1900-01-01\' AS TARIH ,\'1900-01-01\' AS VADE_TARIHI ,\'\' AS BELGE_NO ,SUM(BORC) BORC ,SUM(ALACAK) ALACAK ,0 LOGICALREF ,\'Devreden\' ACIKLAMA ,\'\' ENT_REF_KEY ,\'\' HAREKET_TURU FROM TBLCAHAR WHERE CARI_KOD = \'%1$s\' AND TARIH < %2$s %4$s UNION SELECT TARIH ,VADE_TARIHI ,BELGE_NO ,BORC ,ALACAK ,INC_KEY_NUMBER LOGICALREF ,ACIKLAMA ,ENT_REF_KEY ,HAREKET_TURU FROM TBLCAHAR WHERE CARI_KOD = \'%1$s\' AND TARIH BETWEEN %2$s AND %3$s %4$s ) TMP WHERE TMP.BORC IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TARIH ,LOGICALREF
INSERT INTO WOR_NOTIFICATION (SENDERREF,MESSAGE,DATE,SENDDATE ,STATUS, GUID, TITLE, WORKINGHOURS) VALUES(%1$d, N\'%2$s\', NULL,CONVERT(datetime,\'%3$s\',120), %4$d,N\'%5$s\', N\'%6$s\',%7$d)
INSERT INTO WOR_NOTIFICATION (SENDERREF,MESSAGE,DATE,SENDDATE ,STATUS, GUID, TITLE, WORKINGHOURS) VALUES(%1$d, N\'%2$s\', NULL,GETDATE(), %3$d,N\'%4$s\', N\'%5$s\',%6$d)
INSERT INTO WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER (STATUS,NOTIFICATIONGUID,GUID,USERREF ,DELIVEREDDATE, READDATE, DELETIONDATE) VALUES(%1$d, N\'%2$s\', N\'%3$s\', %4$d,NULL,NULL,NULL)

UPDATE NTF SET STATUS = 1, DATE = GETDATE() FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION NTF INNER JOIN ( SELECT \'%1$s\' NTFGUID, COUNT(*) UNREADNTFCOUNT FROM WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER WHERE NOTIFICATIONGUID = \'%1$s\' AND STATUS < 1 ) UNREAD ON UNREAD.NTFGUID = NTF.GUID WHERE UNREAD.UNREADNTFCOUNT = 0 AND NTF.STATUS<1

UPDATE NTF SET STATUS = 2, DATE = GETDATE() FROM WOR_NOTIFICATION NTF INNER JOIN ( SELECT \'%1$s\' NTFGUID, COUNT(*) UNREADNTFCOUNT FROM WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER WHERE NOTIFICATIONGUID = \'%1$s\' AND STATUS < 2 ) UNREAD ON UNREAD.NTFGUID = NTF.GUID WHERE UNREAD.UNREADNTFCOUNT = 0 AND NTF.STATUS<2
UPDATE WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER SET STATUS = 1, DELIVEREDDATE = GETDATE() WHERE ID = %1$d
UPDATE WOR_NOTIFIEDUSER SET STATUS = 2, READDATE = GETDATE() WHERE ID = %1$d
UPDATE WOR_CABIN SET LOCINFO = %1$d, STATUS = %2$d, CLIENTCODE = \'%3$s\', SALESMANREF = %4$d, MODIFIEDDATE = \'%5$s\' WHERE ID = %6$d
UPDATE WOR_TODO SET USERNOTE=\'%1$s\', STATUS=%2$d %3$s WHERE LOGICALREF=%4$d

İşlem yaptığınız mesafe parametrelerde belirlenen değer aralığında değildir.

SELECT LOGICALREF KEYPAIR, PARENTREF, CHILDREF VALUEPAIR FROM %1$s WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (((UPLEVEL = 0) AND (PARENTREF = %2$s) AND (CHILDREF >= 0)) OR ((UPLEVEL = 0) AND (PARENTREF > %2$s)) OR ((UPLEVEL > 0))) AND (((UPLEVEL = 0) AND (PARENTREF <= %2$s)) OR ((UPLEVEL < 0)))

SELECT(RL_01*R_01 + RL_02*R_02 + (RL_03*R_03 * -1) + (RL_04*R_04 * -1) + RL_05*R_05 + RL_06*R_06 + RL_07*R_07 + RL_08*R_08) AS RISKLIMIT, (RC_01*R_01 + RC_02*R_02 + (RC_03*R_03 * -1) + (RC_04*R_04 * -1) + RC_05*R_05 + RC_06*R_06 + RC_07*R_07 + RC_08*R_08) AS RISKCLOSED, (RT_01*R_01 + RT_02*R_02 + (RT_03*R_03 * -1) + (RT_04*R_04 * -1) + RT_05*R_05 + RT_06*R_06 + RT_07*R_07 + RT_08*R_08) AS RISKTOTAL, * FROM ( SELECT CLNUM.ACCRISKLIMIT AS RL_01, CLNUM.MYCSRISKLIMIT AS RL_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRISKLIMIT AS RL_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORISKLIMIT AS RL_04, CLNUM.DESPRISKLIMIT AS RL_05, CLNUM.DESPRISKLIMITSUG AS RL_06, CLNUM.ORDRISKLIMIT AS RL_07, CLNUM.ORDRISKLIMITSUGG AS RL_08, CLNUM.ACCRSKBLNCED AS RC_01, CLNUM.MYCSRSKBLNCED AS RC_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRSKBLNCED AS RC_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORSKBLNCED AS RC_04, CLNUM.DESPRSKBLNCED AS RC_05, CLNUM.DESPRSKBLNCEDSUG AS RC_06, CLNUM.ORDRSKBLNCED AS RC_07, CLNUM.ORDRSKBLNCEDSUG AS RC_08, CLNUM.ACCRISKTOTAL AS RT_01, CLNUM.MYCSRISKTOTAL AS RT_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRISKTOTAL AS RT_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL AS RT_04, CLNUM.DESPRISKTOTAL AS RT_05, CLNUM.DESPRISKTOTALSUG AS RT_06, CLNUM.ORDRISKTOTAL AS RT_07, CLNUM.ORDRISKTOTALSUGG AS RT_08, CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS R_01, CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS R_02, CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS R_03, CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS R_04, CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS R_05, CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS R_06, CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS R_07, CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS R_08 FROM %1$s CLNUM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CLNUM.CLCARDREF = %2$d) AS TMP_QRY

SELECT CLREF,CODE, RISKCONTROLTYPE, (RL_01 + RL_02 + (RL_03 * -1) + (RL_04 * -1) + RL_05 + RL_06 + RL_07 + RL_08) AS RISKLIMIT, (RC_01 + RC_02 + (RC_03 * -1) + (RC_04 * -1) + RC_05 + RC_06 + RC_07 + RC_08) AS RISKCLOSED, (RT_01 + RT_02 + (RT_03 * -1) + (RT_04 * -1) + RT_05 + RT_06 + RT_07 + RT_08) AS RISKTOTAL, RL_01 AS ACCRISKLIMIT, RL_05 AS DESPRISKLIMIT, RL_06 AS DESPRISKLIMITSUG, RL_07 AS ORDRISKLIMIT, RL_08 AS ORDRISKLIMITSUG, RC_01 AS ACCRISKCLOSED, RC_05 AS DESPRISKCLOSED, RC_06 AS DESPRISKCLOSEDSUG, RC_07 AS ORDRISKCLOSED, RC_08 AS ORDRISKCLOSEDSUG, RT_01 AS ACCRISKTOTAL, RT_05 AS DESPRISKTOTAL, RT_06 AS DESPRISKTOTALSUG, RT_07 AS ORDRISKTOTAL, RT_08 AS ORDRISKTOTALSUG, RowNum FROM( SELECT CLNUM.CLCARDREF AS CLREF, C.CODE, ISNULL(CLNUM.RISKCTRLTYPE, 0) AS RISKCONTROLTYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum, CLNUM.ACCRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS RL_01, CLNUM.MYCSRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS RL_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS RL_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS RL_04, CLNUM.DESPRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS RL_05, CLNUM.DESPRISKLIMITSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS RL_06, CLNUM.ORDRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS RL_07, CLNUM.ORDRISKLIMITSUGG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS RL_08, CLNUM.ACCRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS RC_01, CLNUM.MYCSRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS RC_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS RC_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS RC_04, CLNUM.DESPRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS RC_05, CLNUM.DESPRSKBLNCEDSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS RC_06, CLNUM.ORDRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS RC_07, CLNUM.ORDRSKBLNCEDSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS RC_08, CLNUM.ACCRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS RT_01, CLNUM.MYCSRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS RT_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS RT_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS RT_04, CLNUM.DESPRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS RT_05, CLNUM.DESPRISKTOTALSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS RT_06, CLNUM.ORDRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS RT_07, CLNUM.ORDRISKTOTALSUGG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS RT_08 FROM %1$s CLNUM WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$s C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF = CLNUM.CLCARDREF %3$s) R
SELECT PRICE FROM PURCHASEPRICE WHERE CARDREF = @itemRef ORDER BY LOGICALREF DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT SF.LOGICALREF, SF.GUID, SF.FICHENO, SF.FTIME, SF.DATE_, SF.DOCDATE, SF.DOCTIME, SF.SHIPDATE, SF.SHIPTIME, SF.CLIENTREF, SF.TRRATE, SF.TRCURR, C.CODE AS CCODE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CDEFINITION, C.ADDR1, C.ADDR2, C.CITY, C.DISTRICT, C.TELNRS1, C.TELNRS2, C.FAXNR, C.TAXNR, C.TAXOFFCODE, C.TOWN, C.TAXOFFICE, C.INCHARGE, C.EMAILADDR, C.TCKNO, C.WEBADDR, SF.TOTALVAT, SF.NETTOTAL, SF.TOTALDISCOUNTS, SF.GROSSTOTAL, SF.GENEXP1, SF.GENEXP2, SF.GENEXP3, SF.GENEXP4, SF.SHPTYPCOD, SF.SHPAGNCOD, SF.SOURCEINDEX, SA.TITLE SATITLE, SA.TAXNR SATAXNR, EIN.PLATENUM1, EIN.CHASSISNUM1, EIN.DRIVERNAME1, EIN.DRIVERSURNAME1, EIN.DRIVERTCKNO1, SH.NAME + \' - \' + SH.ADDR1 AS SHIPADDRESSTITLE FROM %1$s SF WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %2$s AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON SF.CLIENTREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN %3$s SA WITH (NOLOCK) ON SA.CODE = SF.SHPAGNCOD LEFT JOIN %4$s EIN WITH (NOLOCK) ON EIN.STFREF = SF.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN %5$s SH WITH (NOLOCK) ON SH.LOGICALREF = SF.SHIPINFOREF WHERE SF.LOGICALREF = %6$d

SELECT S.STFICHEREF, S.LOGICALREF, S.STFICHELNNO, S.LINETYPE, I.CODE, I.NAME, S.UOMREF, S.USREF, S.AMOUNT, S.PRICE, S.TOTAL, S.DISTDISC, S.VAT, S.VATAMNT, S.VATMATRAH, S.LINEEXP, S.VATEXCEPTREASON, S.GUID, I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF, US.CODE UNITCODE, US.DIVUNIT FROM %1$s AS S WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %2$s AS I WITH (NOLOCK) ON I.LOGICALREF = S.STOCKREF LEFT JOIN %3$s AS US WITH (NOLOCK) ON US.LOGICALREF = S.UOMREF WHERE S.LINETYPE NOT IN (4, 2) AND S.%6$s = %5$d %7$s UNION SELECT S.STFICHEREF, S.LOGICALREF, S.STFICHELNNO, S.LINETYPE, I.CODE, I.DEFINITION_ AS NAME, S.UOMREF, S.USREF, S.AMOUNT, S.PRICE, S.TOTAL, S.DISTDISC, S.VAT, S.VATAMNT, S.VATMATRAH, S.LINEEXP, S.VATEXCEPTREASON, S.GUID, I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF, US.CODE UNITCODE, US.DIVUNIT FROM %1$s AS S WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %4$s AS I WITH (NOLOCK) ON I.LOGICALREF = S.STOCKREF LEFT JOIN %3$s AS US WITH (NOLOCK) ON US.LOGICALREF = S.UOMREF WHERE S.LINETYPE = 4 AND S.%6$s = %5$d %7$s

SELECT I.LOGICALREF, I.GUID, I.FICHENO AS INVOICENO, I.DATE_ AS INVOICEDATE, I.DOCDATE AS INVDOCDATE, I.CLIENTREF, I.TRRATE, I.TRCURR, C.CODE AS CCODE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CDEFINITION, C.ADDR1, C.ADDR2, C.CITY, C.DISTRICT, C.TELNRS1, C.TELNRS2, C.FAXNR, C.TAXNR, C.TAXOFFCODE, C.TOWN, C.TAXOFFICE, C.INCHARGE, C.EMAILADDR, C.TCKNO, C.WEBADDR, C.POSTCODE, I.TOTALVAT, I.NETTOTAL, I.TOTALDISCOUNTS, I.GROSSTOTAL, I.GENEXP1, I.GENEXP2, I.GENEXP3, I.GENEXP4, I.SHPTYPCOD, I.SHPAGNCOD, I.SOURCEINDEX, SF.FICHENO AS FICHENO, SF.DOCDATE AS DOCDATE, SA.TITLE SATITLE, SA.TAXNR SATAXNR, SH.NAME + \' - \' + SH.ADDR1 AS SHIPADDRESSTITLE, SH.TAXNR SHIPADDRESSTAXNR, EIN.PLATENUM1, EIN.CHASSISNUM1, EIN.DRIVERNAME1, EIN.DRIVERSURNAME1, EIN.DRIVERTCKNO1 FROM %1$s I WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$s AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON I.CLIENTREF = C.LOGICALREF INNER JOIN %3$s AS SF WITH (NOLOCK) ON I.FICHENO = SF.INVNO LEFT JOIN %4$s SA WITH (NOLOCK) ON SA.CODE = I.SHPAGNCOD LEFT JOIN %5$s SH WITH (NOLOCK) ON SH.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPINFOREF LEFT JOIN %6$s EIN WITH (NOLOCK) ON EIN.INVOICEREF = I.LOGICALREF WHERE I.LOGICALREF = %7$d
SELECT TBL.LOGICALREF [LOGICALREF] FROM %1$s AS TBL WHERE TBL.GUID=\'%2$s\'

SELECT CLREF, IFNULL(SUM(VALUE),0) OPERATIONSTODAY FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE , CLREF FROM INVOICE I WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(I.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(I.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(I.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLREF FROM ORDERS O WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(O.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(O.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(O.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE , CLREF FROM CASECASH CASH WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(CASH.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CASH.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CASH.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLREF FROM CASHCREDIT CREDIT WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(CREDIT.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CREDIT.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CREDIT.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLREF FROM CHEQUEDEED CHEQ WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(CHEQ.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CHEQ.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CHEQ.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLREF FROM VISITINFO VISIT WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(VISIT.VISITDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(VISIT.VISITDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(VISIT.VISITDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLIENTREF AS CLREF FROM USERMAINPENETRATION P WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(P.DATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(P.DATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(P.DATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLIENTREF UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLIENTREF AS CLREF FROM CABINTRANS CB WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(DATE),1,10) ) GROUP BY CB.CLIENTREF ) K GROUP BY K.CLREF

SELECT U.WIDTH || \' \' || IFNULL(W.CODE, \' \') AS WIDTH, U.LENGTH || \' \' || IFNULL(L.CODE , \' \') AS LENGTH, U.HEIGHT || \' \' || IFNULL(H.CODE , \' \') AS HEIGHT FROM %1$s I INNER JOIN %2$s T ON I.SALESFICHEID = T.LOGICALREF INNER JOIN ITEMUNITS U ON I.UNIT = U.LOGICALREF AND I.ITEMREF = U.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN UNITS W ON W.LOGICALREF = U.WIDTHREF LEFT JOIN UNITS L ON L.LOGICALREF = U.LENGTHREF LEFT JOIN UNITS H ON H.LOGICALREF = U.HEIGHTREF WHERE T.FICHENO=? AND I.LINENR=?

SELECT TOP 1 LGMAIN.DATE_ ,LGMAIN.LOGICALREF ,LGMAIN.PRCURR ,LGMAIN.PRPRICE ,LGMAIN.PRICE ,LGMAIN.TRCURR ,LGMAIN.TRRATE ,LGMAIN.DIFFPRICE FROM %1$s LGMAIN WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s CLNTC WITH (NOLOCK) ON (LGMAIN.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %3$s STFIC WITH (NOLOCK) ON (LGMAIN.STFICHEREF = STFIC.LOGICALREF) WHERE (LGMAIN.DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATETIME, GETDATE(), 101)) AND (LGMAIN.STOCKREF = %4$d) AND (LGMAIN.CANCELLED = 0) AND (LGMAIN.LINETYPE = 0) AND (LGMAIN.CLIENTREF <> 0) AND (LGMAIN.TRCODE IN (1,4,26,30,31,32,33,34)) ORDER BY LGMAIN.DATE_ DESC ,LGMAIN.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT SF.LOGICALREF, SF.ANDFICHENO AS GUID, SF.FICHENO, 0 AS FTIME, \'\' AS DATE_, SF.FICHEDATE AS DOCDATE, 0 AS DOCTIME, \'\' AS SHIPDATE, 0 AS SHIPTIME, SF.CLREF AS CLIENTREF, SF.TRRATE, SF.TRCURR, C.CODE AS CCODE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CDEFINITION, C.ADDR1, C.ADDR2, C.CITY, C.DISTRICT, C.TELNRS1, C.TELNRS2, C.FAXNR, C.TAXNR, C.TAXOFFCODE, C.TOWN, C.TAXOFFICE, C.INCHARGE, C.EMAILADDR, C.TCKNO, C.WEBADDR, SF.TOTALVAT, SF.TOTALNET AS NETTOTAL, SF.DISCTOTAL AS TOTALDISCOUNTS, SF.GTOTAL AS GROSSTOTAL, SF.DESC1 AS GENEXP1, SF.DESC2 AS GENEXP2, SF.DESC3 AS GENEXP3, SF.DESC4 AS GENEXP4, \'\' AS SHPTYPCOD, SF.SHIPAGENT AS SHPAGNCOD, SF.WAREHOUSENR AS SOURCEINDEX, SA.TITLE SATITLE, SA.TAXNR SATAXNR, EIN.PLATE AS PLATENUM1, EIN.FIRSTTRAILERPLATE AS CHASSISNUM1, EIN.FIRSTDRIVERNAME AS DRIVERNAME1, EIN.FIRSTDRIVERLASTNAME AS DRIVERSURNAME1, EIN.FIRSTDRIVERIDENTITYNR AS DRIVERTCKNO1, SH.NAME + \' - \' + SH.ADDR1 AS SHIPADDRESSTITLE FROM INVOICE SF INNER JOIN CLCARD AS C ON SF.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SA ON SA.CODE = SF.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN EDESPATCHADDITIONALINFO EIN ON EIN.SALESFICHEID = SF.LOGICALREF AND EIN.SALESTYPE = SF.SALESTYPE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SH ON SH.LOGICALREF = SF.SHIPADDRREF WHERE SF.LOGICALREF = %1$d

SELECT 0 AS STFICHEREF, S.LOGICALREF, S.LINENR AS STFICHELNNO, S.LINETYPE, I.CODE, I.NAME, S.UNIT AS UOMREF, 0 AS USREF, S.AMOUNT, S.PRICE, S.TOTAL, 0 AS DISTDISC, S.VAT, S.VATAMNT, S.VATMATRAH, S.DESC AS LINEEXP, \'\' AS VATEXCEPTREASON, S.GUID, I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF, US.CODE UNITCODE, US.DIVUNIT FROM INVOICEDETAIL AS S LEFT JOIN ITEMS AS I ON I.LOGICALREF = S.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN UNITS AS US ON US.LOGICALREF = S.UNIT WHERE S.LINETYPE NOT IN (4, 2) AND S.SALESFICHEID = %1$d UNION SELECT 0 AS STFICHEREF, S.LOGICALREF, S.LINENR AS STFICHELNNO, S.LINETYPE, I.CODE, I.NAME, S.UNIT AS UOMREF, 0 AS USREF, S.AMOUNT, S.PRICE, S.TOTAL, 0 AS DISTDISC, S.VAT, S.VATAMNT, S.VATMATRAH, S.DESC AS LINEEXP, \'\' AS VATEXCEPTREASON, S.GUID, I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF, US.CODE UNITCODE, US.DIVUNIT FROM INVOICEDETAIL AS S LEFT JOIN SERVICE AS I ON I.LOGICALREF = S.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN UNITS AS US ON US.LOGICALREF = S.UNIT WHERE S.LINETYPE = 4 AND S.SALESFICHEID = %1$d

SELECT SF.LOGICALREF, SF.ANDFICHENO AS GUID, SF.FICHENO AS INVOICENO, SF.FICHEDATE AS INVOICEDATE, SF.FICHEDATE AS INVDOCDATE, SF.CLREF AS CLIENTREF, SF.TRRATE, SF.TRCURR, C.CODE AS CCODE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CDEFINITION, C.ADDR1, C.ADDR2, C.CITY, C.DISTRICT, C.TELNRS1, C.TELNRS2, C.FAXNR, C.TAXNR, C.TAXOFFCODE, C.TOWN, C.TAXOFFICE, C.INCHARGE, C.EMAILADDR, C.TCKNO, C.POSTCODE, C.WEBADDR, SF.TOTALVAT, SF.TOTALNET AS NETTOTAL, SF.DISCTOTAL AS TOTALDISCOUNTS, SF.GTOTAL AS GROSSTOTAL, SF.DESC1 AS GENEXP1, SF.DESC2 AS GENEXP2, SF.DESC3 AS GENEXP3, SF.DESC4 AS GENEXP4, \'\' AS SHPTYPCOD, SF.SHIPAGENT AS SHPAGNCOD, SF.WAREHOUSENR AS SOURCEINDEX, SF.FICHENO, SF.FICHEDATE AS DOCDATE, SA.TITLE SATITLE, SA.TAXNR SATAXNR, EIN.PLATE AS PLATENUM1, EIN.FIRSTTRAILERPLATE AS CHASSISNUM1, EIN.FIRSTDRIVERNAME AS DRIVERNAME1, EIN.FIRSTDRIVERLASTNAME AS DRIVERSURNAME1, EIN.FIRSTDRIVERIDENTITYNR AS DRIVERTCKNO1, SH.NAME + \' - \' + SH.ADDR1 AS SHIPADDRESSTITLE, \'\' AS SHIPADDRESSTAXNR FROM INVOICE SF INNER JOIN CLCARD AS C ON SF.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SA ON SA.CODE = SF.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN EDESPATCHADDITIONALINFO EIN ON EIN.SALESFICHEID = SF.LOGICALREF AND EIN.SALESTYPE = SF.SALESTYPE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SH ON SH.LOGICALREF = SF.SHIPADDRREF WHERE SF.LOGICALREF = %1$d
SELECT LDATA FROM %1$s I WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %2$s C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF=I.INFOREF WHERE C.IMAGEINC=1 AND I.INFOREF=%3$d AND I.DOCNR=%4$d AND I.INFOTYP=%5$d AND I.DOCTYP=%6$d

SELECT CONCAT(\'0-\',CODE) AS KEYPAIR , NAME AS VALUEPAIR FROM %1$s I WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE I.CODE IN (%2$s) UNION SELECT CONCAT(\'1-\',CODE) AS KEYPAIR , DEFINITION_ AS VALUEPAIR FROM %3$s S WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE S.CODE IN (%4$s) AND S.CARDTYPE = 2

SELECT BILGI AS LDATA FROM ( SELECT BILGI, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY KOD ORDER BY KAYITTAR DESC) AS RN FROM TBLEVRAK WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE EVRAKTIPI = 0 AND TABLOTIPI = 1 AND KOD = \'%1$s\' ) AS K WHERE RN = 1

SELECT IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE CLREF = @clRef AND ISTRANSFER = 0), 0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE CLREF = @clRef AND ISTRANSFER = 0), 0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM CASECASH WHERE CLREF = @clRef AND ISTRANSFER = 0), 0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTALNET) FROM INVOICE WHERE CLREF = @clRef AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE IN(1,3) AND INVTYPE = 1), 0) AS TOTALNET
SELECT IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTALNET) FROM INVOICE WHERE CLREF = @clRef AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE IN(1,3) AND INVTYPE = 0), 0) AS TOTALNET
SELECT TOTALNET FROM ORDERS WHERE CLREF = %1$s AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND ORDERTYPE = 0 AND FICHESTATUS = %2$s

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(TOTALNET), 0) AS TOTALNET FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(TOTALNET), 0) AS TOTALNET FROM INVOICE WHERE CLREF = %1$s AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND INVTYPE = 0 AND FTYPE <> 2 %2$s UNION SELECT - IFNULL(SUM(TOTALNET), 0) AS TOTALNET FROM INVOICE WHERE CLREF = %1$s AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND INVTYPE = 1 %2$s )
SELECT STATUS FROM %1$s WHERE LOGICALREF=%2$d AND STATUS=1

SELECT CASE WHEN X.TOPLAM > X.SEVK AND X.SEVK > 0 THEN 3 WHEN X.TOPLAM <= X.SEVK AND X.SEVK > 0 THEN 5 WHEN X.STATUS = 1 THEN 1 WHEN X.STATUS = 2 THEN 2 WHEN X.STATUS = 4 THEN 4 END STATUS, X.LOGICALREF FROM ( SELECT SUM(ISNULL(ORF.AMOUNT, 0)) TOPLAM, SUM(ISNULL(ORF.SHIPPEDAMOUNT, 0)) SEVK, F.STATUS, F.LOGICALREF FROM %1$s ORF LEFT JOIN %2$s F ON F.LOGICALREF = ORF.ORDFICHEREF WHERE F.LOGICALREF IN %3$s AND ORF.CLOSED = 0 GROUP BY ORF.CLOSED, F.STATUS, F.LOGICALREF ) X

SELECT CAST(ITMSM.YEAR_ AS VARCHAR(4)) + \'-\' + RIGHT(\'0\'+CAST(ITMSM.MONTH_ AS VARCHAR(2)),2) [MONTH], SUM(ITMSM.SALES_AMOUNT) [SALES_AMOUNT] , SUM(ITMSM.SALES_CASHAMNT) [SALES_CASHAMNT] FROM %1$S ITMSM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (ITMSM.STOCKREF = %2$d) AND (ITMSM.INVENNO = -1) AND (( ITMSM.MONTH_ >= 1 ) AND ( ITMSM.MONTH_ <= 12 ) ) AND (ITMSM.YEAR_ = %3$d) AND (ITMSM.MTRLINC = 0) AND (ITMSM.VIRTUALINVEN = 0) GROUP BY CAST(ITMSM.YEAR_ AS VARCHAR(4)) + \'-\' + RIGHT(\'0\'+CAST(ITMSM.MONTH_ AS VARCHAR(2)),2)

SELECT TOP 10 CLCARD.CODE [CODE], CLCARD.DEFINITION_ [NAME], SUM(CASE STLINE.IOCODE WHEN 1 THEN -1 WHEN 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END * STLINE.LINENET) [TOTAL] FROM %1$S STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$S STFIC WITH (NOLOCK) ON(STLINE.STFICHEREF = STFIC.LOGICALREF) INNER JOIN %3$S INVFC WITH (NOLOCK) ON(STFIC.INVOICEREF = INVFC.LOGICALREF) INNER JOIN %4$S CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON(STLINE.CLIENTREF = CLCARD.LOGICALREF) %6$S WHERE STLINE.LINETYPE IN(0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9, 11) AND STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,4) AND (STLINE.STOCKREF = %5$d) AND (STLINE.STFICHEREF <> 0) AND (STLINE.CLIENTREF <> 0) AND (STLINE.DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATETIME, \'12-31-2036\', 101)) AND (STLINE.DATE_ >= CONVERT(DATETIME, \'1-1-2016\', 101)) %7$S GROUP BY CLCARD.CODE, CLCARD.DEFINITION_
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT LOGICALREF, CODE, CURRENCY, CARDREF, PRICE FROM %1$s WHERE PTYPE = 1 ) R

SELECT STOCKREF FROM ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT TOP 5 S.STOCKREF FROM %1$s S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$s F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.STFICHEREF = F.LOGICALREF AND S.CLIENTREF = F.CLIENTREF WHERE F.TRCODE = 8 AND F.CLIENTREF = %3$d AND S.LINETYPE = 0 GROUP BY S.STOCKREF ORDER BY SUM(S.AMOUNT) DESC, COUNT(S.LOGICALREF) DESC ) AS KULLANILAN UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 5 S.STOCKREF FROM %1$s S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$s F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.STFICHEREF = F.LOGICALREF AND S.CLIENTREF = F.CLIENTREF WHERE F.TRCODE = 8 AND F.CLIENTREF = %3$d AND S.LINETYPE = 0 GROUP BY S.STOCKREF Having Count(S.STOCKREF) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(S.AMOUNT), COUNT(S.STOCKREF) ASC ) AS KULLANILMAYAN UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 5 S.STOCKREF FROM %1$s S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$s F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.STFICHEREF = F.LOGICALREF AND S.CLIENTREF = F.CLIENTREF WHERE F.TRCODE = 8 AND S.LINETYPE = 0 GROUP BY S.STOCKREF ORDER BY SUM(S.AMOUNT) DESC, COUNT(S.STOCKREF) DESC ) AS F UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 5 S.STOCKREF FROM %1$s S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$s F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.STFICHEREF = F.LOGICALREF AND S.CLIENTREF = F.CLIENTREF WHERE F.TRCODE = 8 AND S.LINETYPE = 0 GROUP BY S.STOCKREF HAVING Count(S.STOCKREF) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(S.AMOUNT), COUNT(S.STOCKREF) ASC ) AS K ) C GROUP BY STOCKREF

SELECT (RL_01 + RL_02 + (RL_03 * -1) + (RL_04 * -1) + RL_05 + RL_06 + RL_07 + RL_08) AS RISKLIMIT, (RC_01 + RC_02 + (RC_03 * -1) + (RC_04 * -1) + RC_05 + RC_06 + RC_07 + RC_08) AS RISKCLOSED, (RT_01 + RT_02 + (RT_03 * -1) + (RT_04 * -1) + RT_05 + RT_06 + RT_07 + RT_08) AS RISKTOTAL FROM( SELECT CLNUM.CLCARDREF, CLNUM.ACCRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS RL_01, CLNUM.MYCSRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS RL_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS RL_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS RL_04, CLNUM.DESPRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS RL_05, CLNUM.DESPRISKLIMITSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS RL_06, CLNUM.ORDRISKLIMIT * CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS RL_07, CLNUM.ORDRISKLIMITSUGG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS RL_08, CLNUM.ACCRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS RC_01, CLNUM.MYCSRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS RC_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS RC_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS RC_04, CLNUM.DESPRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS RC_05, CLNUM.DESPRSKBLNCEDSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS RC_06, CLNUM.ORDRSKBLNCED * CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS RC_07, CLNUM.ORDRSKBLNCEDSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS RC_08, CLNUM.ACCRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES1 AS RT_01, CLNUM.MYCSRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES2 AS RT_02, CLNUM.CSTCSRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES3 AS RT_03, CLNUM.CSTCSCIRORISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES7 AS RT_04, CLNUM.DESPRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES4 AS RT_05, CLNUM.DESPRISKTOTALSUG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES8 AS RT_06, CLNUM.ORDRISKTOTAL * CLNUM.RISKTYPES5 AS RT_07, CLNUM.ORDRISKTOTALSUGG * CLNUM.RISKTYPES6 AS RT_08 FROM %1$s CLNUM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CLNUM.CLCARDREF = %2$d) AS TMP_QRY

SELECT SUM(TOTAL) AS TOTAL FROM (SELECT P.TOTAL, P.SIGN FROM %1$s P WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE P.CANCELLED <> 1 AND P.PAID = 0 AND P.TRCURR = 0 AND P.CARDREF = %2$d AND P.DATE_ < \'%3$s\' AND P.PAIDINCASH = 0 AND SIGN = 0 UNION ALL SELECT (P.TOTAL * -1), P.SIGN FROM %1$s P WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE P.CANCELLED <> 1 AND P.PAID = 0 AND P.TRCURR = 0 AND P.CARDREF = %2$d AND P.PAIDINCASH = 0 AND SIGN = 1 ) TMPTABLE
SELECT BARKOD, MIKTAR, TAKIPNO, SKT, BIRIM, \'\' AS MIKTAR2, \'\' AS BIRIM2 FROM fnMSParseBarkod(\'%1$s\')
SELECT * FROM USERREPORTS WHERE RTYPE = 4 ORDER BY SUBTYPE, ID

SELECT US.USERID, US.USERNAME, US.FNAME, US.LNAME FROM WOR_USERS US WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN LG_SLSMAN SLM WITH(NOLOCK) ON SLM.CODE = US.CODE WHERE SLM.ACTIVE = 0 AND SLM.FIRMNR = %1$d AND (\'\' = \'%2$s\' OR SLM.CODE BETWEEN \'%3$s\' AND \'%4$s\') AND (\'\' = \'%5$s\' OR SLM.SPECODE = \'%5$s\') AND (\'\' = \'%6$s\' OR US.SPECODE IN(%7$s)) AND (\'\' = \'%8$s\' OR US.USERNAME LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.FNAME LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.LNAME LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.GROUPCODE LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.SPECODE LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\') AND US.USERID<>%9$d

SELECT ITM.TRACKTYPE, ITM.LOCTRACKING, 0 STTRANSREF, 0 SLTLOGICALREF, NULL LOCCODE, STITOTS.STOCKREF, ITM.CODE ITEMCODE, ITM.CARDTYPE, 0 VARIANTREF, NULL VARIANTCODE, NULL SERILOTN, NULL EXPDATE, NULL LINEEXP, USLINE.CODE UNITCODE, USLINE.CONVFACT1, USLINE.CONVFACT2, USLINE.LOGICALREF UNITREF, ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.ONHAND, 0)) - SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.TEMPIN, 0))), 7) AS REALSTOCK, 0 MAINAMOUNT, \'\' GRPBEGCODE, \'\' GRPENDCODE, 0 [USEDAMOUNT], \'\' [USEDGRPBEGCODE], \'\' [USEDGRPENDCODE], ITM.NAME ITEMNAME, USLINE.DIVUNIT, \'\' VARIANTNAME FROM %1$s STITOTS WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %2$s ITM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITM.LOGICALREF = STITOTS.STOCKREF LEFT OUTER JOIN %3$s USLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON(ITM.UNITSETREF = USLINE.UNITSETREF) AND MAINUNIT = 1 WHERE(STITOTS.INVENNO = %10$s) AND (STITOTS.DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATETIME, GETDATE(), 101)) AND ITM.CANCONFIGURE = 0 AND ITM.TRACKTYPE = 0 AND ITM.LOCTRACKING = 0 AND ITM.ACTIVE = 0 AND ITM.CARDTYPE NOT IN (20,21,22) %11$s GROUP BY STOCKREF, ITM.CODE, USLINE.CODE, USLINE.LOGICALREF, USLINE.CONVFACT1, USLINE.CONVFACT2, ITM.TRACKTYPE, ITM.LOCTRACKING, ITM.CARDTYPE, ITM.NAME, USLINE.DIVUNIT HAVING ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.ONHAND, 0)) - SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.TEMPIN, 0))), 7) > 0 UNION SELECT ITM.TRACKTYPE, ITM.LOCTRACKING, 0 STTRANSREF, 0 SLTLOGICALREF, NULL LOCCODE, STITOTS.STOCKREF, ITM.CODE ITEMCODE, ITM.CARDTYPE, STITOTS.VARIANTREF, VRNT.CODE VARIANTCODE, NULL SERILOTN, NULL EXPDATE, NULL LINEEXP, USLINE.CODE UNITCODE, USLINE.CONVFACT1, USLINE.CONVFACT2, USLINE.LOGICALREF UNITREF, ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.ONHAND, 0)) - SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.TEMPIN, 0))), 7) AS REALSTOCK, 0 MAINAMOUNT, \'\' GRPBEGCODE, \'\' GRPENDCODE, 0 [USEDAMOUNT], \'\' [USEDGRPBEGCODE], \'\' [USEDGRPENDCODE], ITM.NAME ITEMNAME, USLINE.DIVUNIT, VRNT.NAME VARIANTNAME FROM %4$s STITOTS WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %2$s ITM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITM.LOGICALREF = STITOTS.STOCKREF LEFT JOIN %5$s VRNT WITH(NOLOCK) ON VRNT.LOGICALREF = STITOTS.VARIANTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN %3$s USLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON(ITM.UNITSETREF = USLINE.UNITSETREF) AND MAINUNIT = 1 WHERE(STITOTS.INVENNO = %10$s) AND (STITOTS.DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATETIME, GETDATE(), 101)) AND ITM.CANCONFIGURE = 1 AND ITM.TRACKTYPE = 0 AND ITM.LOCTRACKING = 0 AND ITM.ACTIVE = 0 AND ITM.CARDTYPE NOT IN (20,21,22) %11$s GROUP BY STITOTS.STOCKREF, ITM.CODE, STITOTS.VARIANTREF, USLINE.CODE, USLINE.LOGICALREF, VRNT.CODE, USLINE.CONVFACT1, USLINE.CONVFACT2, ITM.TRACKTYPE, ITM.LOCTRACKING, ITM.CARDTYPE, ITM.NAME, USLINE.DIVUNIT, VRNT.NAME HAVING ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.ONHAND, 0)) - SUM(ISNULL(STITOTS.TEMPIN, 0))), 7) > 0 UNION SELECT ITM.TRACKTYPE, ITM.LOCTRACKING, LGMAIN.STTRANSREF, LGMAIN.LOGICALREF SLTLOGICALREF, INVLOC.CODE LOCCODE, LGMAIN.ITEMREF, ITM.CODE ITEMCODE, ITM.CARDTYPE, LGMAIN.VARIANTREF, VRNT.CODE VARIANTCODE, SLNOP.CODE SERILOTN, LGMAIN.EXPDATE, LGMAIN.LINEEXP, USLINE.CODE UNITCODE, USLINE.CONVFACT1, USLINE.CONVFACT2, USLINE.LOGICALREF UNITREF, SUM(LGMAIN.REMAMOUNT) AS REALSTOCK, LGMAIN.MAINAMOUNT [ORGAMOUNT], LGMAIN.GRPBEGCODE [ORGGRPBEGCODE], LGMAIN.GRPENDCODE [ORGGRPENDCODE], SLTR2.MAINAMOUNT [USEDAMOUNT], SLTR2.GRPBEGCODE [USEDGRPBEGCODE], SLTR2.GRPENDCODE [USEDGRPENDCODE], ITM.NAME ITEMNAME, USLINE.DIVUNIT, VRNT.NAME FROM %6$s LGMAIN WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN ( SELECT S.STOCKREF [ITEMREF], ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(S.ONHAND, 0)) - SUM(ISNULL(S.TEMPIN, 0))), 7) AS REALSTOCK FROM %1$s S WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %12$s W WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.INVENNO = W.NR AND W.FIRMNR = %13$s AND (S.DATE_ > CONVERT(DATETIME, \'5-19-1919\', 101)) AND (S.DATE_ <= GETDATE()) INNER JOIN %2$s I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.LOGICALREF = S.STOCKREF WHERE I.ACTIVE = 0 AND S.INVENNO = %10$s AND I.CARDTYPE NOT IN(20, 21, 22) AND ((I.TRACKTYPE <> 0) OR (I.LOCTRACKING <> 0)) GROUP BY S.INVENNO, S.STOCKREF) TOTS ON TOTS.ITEMREF = LGMAIN.ITEMREF LEFT OUTER JOIN %6$s SLTR2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON(LGMAIN.LOGICALREF = SLTR2.INSLTRANSREF) AND ((ISNULL(SLTR2.CANCELLED, 0) = 0)) AND SLTR2.SLTYPE = 3 LEFT OUTER JOIN %7$s INVLOC WITH(NOLOCK) ON(LGMAIN.LOCREF = INVLOC.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %8$s SLNOP WITH(NOLOCK) ON(LGMAIN.SLREF = SLNOP.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %9$s STFIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON(LGMAIN.STFICHEREF = STFIC.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %3$s USLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON(LGMAIN.UOMREF = USLINE.LOGICALREF) LEFT JOIN %2$s ITM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITM.LOGICALREF = LGMAIN.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN %5$s VRNT WITH(NOLOCK) ON VRNT.LOGICALREF = LGMAIN.VARIANTREF WHERE(LGMAIN.DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATETIME, GETDATE(), 101)) AND (LGMAIN.INVENNO = %10$s) AND (LGMAIN.EXIMFCTYPE IN(0, 4, 5, 3, 2, 7)) AND (LGMAIN.STATUS = 0) AND (LGMAIN.CANCELLED = 0) AND (LGMAIN.LPRODSTAT = 0) AND (LGMAIN.REMAMOUNT > 0) AND (LGMAIN.IOCODE IN(1, 2)) AND TOTS.REALSTOCK > 0 AND ITM.ACTIVE = 0 AND ((ITM.TRACKTYPE <> 0) OR (ITM.LOCTRACKING <> 0)) AND ITM.CARDTYPE NOT IN (20,21,22) %11$s GROUP BY LGMAIN.ITEMREF, LGMAIN.VARIANTREF, LGMAIN.SLREF, SLNOP.CODE, LGMAIN.EXPDATE, LGMAIN.LINEEXP, LGMAIN.INVENNO, LGMAIN.IOCODE, USLINE.CODE, USLINE.LOGICALREF, VRNT.CODE, ITM.CODE, USLINE.CONVFACT1, USLINE.CONVFACT2, LGMAIN.STTRANSREF, LGMAIN.LOGICALREF, INVLOC.CODE, ITM.TRACKTYPE, ITM.LOCTRACKING, ITM.CARDTYPE, LGMAIN.MAINAMOUNT, LGMAIN.GRPBEGCODE, LGMAIN.GRPENDCODE, SLTR2.MAINAMOUNT, SLTR2.GRPBEGCODE, SLTR2.GRPENDCODE, ITM.NAME, USLINE.DIVUNIT, VRNT.NAME HAVING SUM(LGMAIN.REMAMOUNT) >0

DELETE FROM WOR_CUSTGPSLOC WHERE CLCODE=\'%1$s\' AND (FIRM IS NULL OR FIRM = \'%2$s\')

SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT D.LOGICALREF, D.LINENO_, D.DEFINITION_, D.WHOUSE [WHOUSE], D.STYPE [STYPE], D.TYPE [TYPE], D.WRKTYPE [WORKTYPE], D.FORMGROUP [FORMGROUP], D.PRODUCTCLASSREF [PRODUCTCLASSREF], D.USEMINSTOCK [USEMINSTOCK], D.MINSTOCK [MINSTOCK], D.USEPENETRATION [USEPENET], D.PTYPE [PENETTYPE], D.ENTPRICE [PENETPRICE], D.FIRMNR [FIRMNR], D.INNERSQL [INNERSQL], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY D.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_DEFORDER D WITH(NOLOCK), WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ( LEN(D.GROUPCODE) > 0 AND LEN(U.GROUPCODE)> 0 AND D.GROUPCODE LIKE \'%%\' + U.GROUPCODE + \'%%\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI ) AND U.USERID =%1$d AND D.FIRMNR=%2$s AND (D.SLSMANREF=\'%3$s\' OR ISNULL(D.SLSMANREF,\'\')=\'\')) UNION (SELECT D.LOGICALREF, D.LINENO_, D.DEFINITION_, D.WHOUSE [WHOUSE], D.STYPE [STYPE], D.TYPE [TYPE], D.WRKTYPE [WORKTYPE], D.FORMGROUP [FORMGROUP], D.PRODUCTCLASSREF [PRODUCTCLASSREF],D.USEMINSTOCK [USEMINSTOCK], D.MINSTOCK [MINSTOCK], D.USEPENETRATION [USEPENET], D.PTYPE [PENETTYPE], D.ENTPRICE [PENETPRICE], D.FIRMNR [FIRMNR], D.INNERSQL [INNERSQL], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY D.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_DEFORDER D WITH(NOLOCK) , WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE D.GROUPCODE=\'\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI AND U.USERID =%1$d AND D.FIRMNR=%2$s AND (D.SLSMANREF=\'%3$s\' OR ISNULL(D.SLSMANREF,\'\')=\'\')) ) AS R

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT D.LOGICALREF, D.DEFORDERID [DEFORDERID], D.GROUP_ [GROUP_], D.PRODUCTID [ITEMREF], REPLACE(D.MINAMOUNT,\',\',\'.\') [MINAMOUNT], REPLACE(D.MAXAMOUNT,\',\',\'.\') [MAXAMOUNT], D.ISSLCTUNIT [ISSLCTUNIT], D.UNIT [UNIT], D.LINENO_ [LINENO_], D.MCODE [MCODE], D.MCODE [ITEMCODE], D.COLORID [COLORID], D.UNITREF [UNITCODE], D.LINETYPE [LINETYPE], ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY D.LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM WOR_DEFORDERDETAIL D WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE DEFORDERID IN ( (SELECT X.LOGICALREF FROM WOR_DEFORDER X WITH(NOLOCK) , WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (LEN(X.GROUPCODE)>0 AND (LEN(U.GROUPCODE)>0 AND X.GROUPCODE LIKE \'%%\' AND U.GROUPCODE LIKE \'%%\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI)) AND U.USERID=%1$d AND X.FIRMNR=%2$s) UNION (SELECT X.LOGICALREF FROM WOR_DEFORDER X WITH(NOLOCK), WOR_USERS U WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE X.GROUPCODE=\'\' COLLATE Turkish_CI_AI AND U.USERID=%1$d AND X.FIRMNR=%2$s)) ) AS R
SELECT ID KEYPAIR FROM WOR_PROCESS WHERE PREF = \'%1$s\' AND CLIENTREF = \'%2$s\' AND FIRM = %3$d AND PTYPE = %4$d AND USERID = %5$d
INSERT INTO WOR_BARCODETRACKING (DATE, FICHENO, USERCODE, CLIENTCODE, ITEMCODE, BARCODES) VALUES(GETDATE(), \'%1$s\', \'%2$s\', \'%3$s\', \'%4$s\', \'%5$s\') ;

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS (DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, VREASON, VNOTE, PDISTANCE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM,FIRM, VISITREF) VALUES(CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d, \'%3$s\', %4$d, \'%5$s\', \'\', \'\', \'\', 0, \'%6$s\', \'%7$s\', %8$s, %9$s,%10$d, %11$d) ;

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS (DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, VREASON, VNOTE, PDISTANCE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM,FIRM, VISITREF, APPVERSION) VALUES(CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d, \'%3$s\', %4$d, \'%5$s\', \'\', \'\', \'\', 0, \'%6$s\', \'%7$s\', %8$s, %9$s,%10$d, %11$d, \'%12$s\' ) ;

INSERT INTO WOR_USERPENETRATION (PNTID , PNTDETAILID , USERID , CLIENTID , DATE_ , VY, AMOUNT , PRICE , CURRENCY ,SOURCETYPE , DEFFIELD1 , DEFFIELD2 , DEFFIELD3 , DEFFIELD4 , DEFFIELD5 , DEFFIELD6 , DEFFIELD7 , DEFFIELD8 , DEFFIELD9 , DEFFIELD10 , PIMAGE) VALUES (%1$d, %2$d, %3$d, \'%4$s\', \'%5$s\', %6$d, %7$s, %8$s, \'%9$s\', %10$d, \'%11$s\', \'%12$s\', \'%13$s\', \'%14$s\', \'%15$s\', \'%16$s\', \'%17$s\', \'%18$s\', \'%19$s\', \'%20$s\', CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX),\'%21$s\'))
INSERT INTO WOR_PNTHEADER (PNT_ID , CLIENTREF, SALESMANREF , PICTURE, NOTE, DATE, PNT_GUID) VALUES (%1$d,\'%2$s\', %3$d, %4$s , \'%5$s\', \'%6$s\', \'%7$s\');

INSERT INTO WOR_PNTTRANS (PNT_ID ,PNTDTL_ID, CLIENTREF, SALESMANREF , PNTHEADER_REF, PRICE , NOTE, PICTURE , AMOUNT, DATE) VALUES (%1$d, %2$d,\'%3$s\', \'%4$s\', \'%5$s\', %6$s, \'%7$s\', %8$s , %9$s, \'%10$s\');

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, VREASON, VNOTE, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, PREF, PDISTANCE) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d,\'%3$s\',%4$d ,\'%5$s\',\'%6$s\',\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$s,%10$s,%11$d,%12$d,%13$d)

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, VREASON, VNOTE, CLCODE, CLNAME, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, PREF, PDISTANCE,APPVERSION) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d,\'%3$s\',%4$d ,\'%5$s\',\'%6$s\',\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$s,%10$s,%11$d,%12$d,%13$d,\'%14$s\')

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, PDISTANCE, VREASON, VNOTE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, SHIPINFOREF, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, USERTITLE, VISITIMAGE, VISITSTARTDATE, VISITENDDATE, VISITREF) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d,\'%3$s\',%4$d, %5$d,%6$d,\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$d,\'%10$s\',\'%11$s\',\'%12$s\',%13$s,%14$s,%15$d,%16$d,CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX),\'%17$s\'), CONVERT(datetime,%18$s,120), CONVERT(datetime,%19$s,120), %20$d )

INSERT INTO WOR_PROCESS ( DATE_, USERID, CLIENTREF, PTYPE, PREF, PDISTANCE, VREASON, VNOTE, ISPRINT, CLCODE, CLNAME, SHIPINFOREF, ENLEM, BOYLAM, FIRM, USERTITLE, VISITIMAGE, VISITSTARTDATE, VISITENDDATE, VISITREF, APPVERSION) VALUES (CONVERT(datetime,\'%1$s\',120), %2$d,\'%3$s\',%4$d, %5$d,%6$d,\'%7$s\',\'%8$s\',%9$d,\'%10$s\',\'%11$s\',\'%12$s\',%13$s,%14$s,%15$d,%16$d,CONVERT(VARBINARY(MAX),\'%17$s\'), CONVERT(datetime,%18$s,120), CONVERT(datetime,%19$s,120), %20$d, \'%21$s\')

SELECT * FROM( SELECT NETBANKAKODU AS BANKCODE, NETHESKODU, ACIKLAMA,dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI, DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NETHESKODU) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLBNKHESSABIT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE DURUM=0 AND (ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (SUBE_KODU=-1 OR SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT NETBANKAKODU, BANKAADI, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NETBANKAKODU) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLBNKSABIT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE DURUM=0 %1$s ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT KSMAS_KOD AS CODE, KSMAS_NAME AS KASA, MUH_KOD AS MUHCODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY KSMAS_KOD) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLKASAMAS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d AND KSMAS_KOD IN (%2$s) ) AS R
SELECT ULKEKODU AS COUNTRYCODE, SEHIRKODU AS CITYCODE, SEHIRKODU AS LOGICALREF, SEHIRADI AS CITYNAME FROM NETSIS..SEHIRSABIT

SELECT * FROM( SELECT KOLISTOK_KODU MAINID, BILESENSTOK_KODU AS STOCKID, BILESENYAPKOD, MIKTAR, ORAN, FIYAT, INCKEYNO AS LINENO_, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BILESENSTOK_KODU) AS RowNum FROM TBLSTOKKOLI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE KOLISTOK_KODU IN ( SELECT STOK_KODU FROM TBLSTSABIT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE KILIT=\'H\') %1$s ) AS R

SELECT CL.CARI_KOD, CL.CARI_ISIM, CL.CARI_TEL, CL.CARI_ADRES, CL.CARI_IL, CL.CARI_ILCE, CL.EMAIL, CL.FAX, CL.VERGI_DAIRESI, CL.VERGI_NUMARASI, CL.ODEMETIPI, CK.TCKIMLIKNO, CL.GRUP_KODU, CL.RAPOR_KODU1, CL.RAPOR_KODU2, CL.RAPOR_KODU3, CL.RAPOR_KODU4, CL.RAPOR_KODU5, CL.DOVIZ_TIPI, CL.DOVIZ_TURU, CL.DOVIZLIMI, CL.CARI_TIP, CL.CARI_TEL2, CL.POSTAKODU, CL.CM_ALACT AS CREDIT, CL.CM_BORCT AS DEBIT, ISNULL(CR.SIPRISKDAVRAN,2) SIPRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.SEVKRISKDAVRAN,2) SEVKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.YUKRISKDAVRAN,2) YUKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.IRSRISKDAVRAN,2) IRSRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.FATRISKDAVRAN,2) FATRISKDAVRAN, 1 AS ISTRANSFER, CK.ODEKOD AS ODEKOD, (CL.CM_BORCT-CL.CM_ALACT) AS BALANCE, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(CL.KAYITTARIHI,CL.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CL.CARI_KOD) AS LOGICALREF FROM TBLCASABIT CL WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLCASABITEK CK WITH(NOLOCK) ON CL.CARI_KOD=CK.CARI_KOD AND CK.S_YEDEK2=\'%1$s\' LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCARISK CR WITH(NOLOCK) ON CR.CARIKOD = CK.CARI_KOD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCAHAR CH WITH(NOLOCK) ON CH.CARI_KOD = CL.CARI_KOD AND CH.INC_KEY_NUMBER IN (SELECT MAX(INC_KEY_NUMBER) FROM TBLCAHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CARI_KOD=CH.CARI_KOD ) WHERE ((CL.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (CL.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=%3$d) OR CL.ISLETME_KODU=-1)
SELECT ULKEKODU AS COUNTRYREF, ULKEKODU AS COUNTRYCODE, ULKEADI AS COUNTRYNAME FROM NETSIS..ULKESABIT

SELECT AGG.CODE ,AGG.AGGREEMENT ,AGG.BEGDATE ,AGG.ENDDATE ,STUFF(( SELECT DISTINCT \',\' + INSTALLMENTINTERVAL FROM ( SELECT M.SOZKOD AS CODE ,M.ACIKLAMA AS AGGREEMENT ,M.BASTAR BEGDATE ,M.BITTAR ENDDATE ,STUFF(( SELECT \',\' + CAST(n AS VARCHAR(1000)) FROM ( (SELECT TOP 1 0 AS n FROM sys.all_objects) UNION (SELECT n = ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY [object_id] ) FROM sys.all_objects) ) AS Nums WHERE n BETWEEN T.TAKSITBAS AND T.TAKSITBIT FOR XML PATH(\'\') ), 1, 1, \'\') INSTALLMENTINTERVAL FROM TBLKRTSOZMAS M WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLKRTSOZTRA T WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.INCKEYNO = T.KRTSOZMASINCKEYNO WHERE (M.ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR M.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (M.SUBE_KODU=-1 OR M.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) ) DETAIL WHERE DETAIL.CODE = AGG.CODE AND DETAIL.AGGREEMENT = AGG.AGGREEMENT AND DETAIL.BEGDATE = AGG.BEGDATE AND DETAIL.ENDDATE = AGG.ENDDATE FOR XML PATH(\'\') ), 1, 1, \'\') AS INSTALLMENTINTERVAL FROM ( SELECT M.SOZKOD AS CODE ,M.ACIKLAMA AS AGGREEMENT ,M.BASTAR BEGDATE ,M.BITTAR ENDDATE ,STUFF(( SELECT \',\' + CAST(n AS VARCHAR(1000)) FROM ( (SELECT TOP 1 0 AS n FROM sys.all_objects) UNION (SELECT n = ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY [object_id] ) FROM sys.all_objects) ) AS Nums WHERE n BETWEEN T.TAKSITBAS AND T.TAKSITBIT FOR XML PATH(\'\') ), 1, 1, \'\') INSTALLMENTINTERVAL FROM TBLKRTSOZMAS M WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLKRTSOZTRA T WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.INCKEYNO = T.KRTSOZMASINCKEYNO WHERE (M.ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR M.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (M.SUBE_KODU=-1 OR M.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) ) AS AGG GROUP BY AGG.CODE ,AGG.AGGREEMENT ,AGG.BEGDATE ,AGG.ENDDATE

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TARIH) [RowNum], SIRA AS CURRTYPE, (SELECT ISIM FROM NETSIS..KUR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SIRA=NETSIS..DOVIZ.SIRA) AS CURRCODE, CAST(DOV_ALIS AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS RATE, CAST(dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(CAST(TARIH AS DATE),null) AS int) as DATE_ FROM NETSIS..DOVIZ WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CAST(TARIH AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) R
SELECT ISIM AS CURRCODE, SIRA AS CURRTYPE, \'\' AS SUBNAME FROM NETSIS..KUR WITH(NOLOCK)
SELECT MODUL_NO, PROGRAM_NO, CARI_KODU FROM TBLKILITDETAY

SELECT \'BALANCE\' AS TYP, SUM(-1 * CL.CM_BORCT) + SUM(CL.CM_ALACT) AS TOTAL FROM TBLCASABIT CL WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CL.CARI_KOD = \'%1$s\' UNION ALL SELECT \'ORDER\' AS TYP, SUM((SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK - SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT) * SIPATRA.STHAR_NF * (1 + (SIPATRA.STHAR_KDV / 100))) * -1 AS TOTAL FROM TBLSIPATRA SIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO = SIPATRA.FISNO AND SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = SIPATRA.STHAR_CARIKOD AND SIPAMAS.SUBE_KODU = SIPATRA.SUBE_KODU WHERE STHAR_GCKOD = \'C\' AND STHAR_FTIRSIP = \'6\' AND STHAR_HTUR <> \'K\' AND SIPAMAS.KAPATILMIS <> \'K\' AND SIPATRA.STHAR_CARIKOD = \'%1$s\' AND SIPATRA.SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND SIPAMAS.ISLETME_KODU = %3$d AND SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK > SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT UNION ALL SELECT \'INVOICE\' AS TYP, SUM((STHAR.STHAR_GCMIK - STHAR.FIRMA_DOVTUT) * STHAR.STHAR_NF * (1 + (STHAR.STHAR_KDV / 100))) * -1 AS TOTAT FROM TBLSTHAR STHAR WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLFATUIRS FATUIRS WITH(NOLOCK) ON FATUIRS.FATIRS_NO = STHAR.FISNO AND FATUIRS.CARI_KODU = STHAR.STHAR_CARIKOD AND FATUIRS.SUBE_KODU = FATUIRS.SUBE_KODU WHERE STHAR.STHAR_CARIKOD = \'%1$s\' AND STHAR.STHAR_HTUR = \'H\' AND FATUIRS.TIPI = 2 AND STHAR.STHAR_GCKOD = \'C\' AND STHAR.SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND FATUIRS.ISLETME_KODU = %3$d AND STHAR.STHAR_GCMIK > STHAR.FIRMA_DOVTUT

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEPART(YYYY, TARIH) AS VARCHAR(4)) + \'-\' + RIGHT(\'0\' + LTRIM(CAST(DATEPART(%3$s, TARIH) AS VARCHAR(2))), 2) AS PROP, SUM(GENELTOPLAM) TOTAT FROM TBLFATUIRS F WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND CARI_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND TIPI IN(1, 2) AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND DATEPART(YYYY, TARIH) = DATEPART(YYYY, GETDATE()) GROUP BY CAST(DATEPART(YYYY, TARIH) AS VARCHAR(4)) + \'-\' + RIGHT(\'0\' + LTRIM(CAST(DATEPART(%3$s, TARIH) AS VARCHAR(2))), 2) ) SUMMARYDATE ORDER BY PROP;

SELECT C.CARIKOD AS CARI_KOD, 0 AS RISKLIMIT, 0 AS RISKCLOSED, X.CHA + X.CHB + X.CHK + X.TEM + X.CAR + X.CCR + X.SAR + X.SCR + X.IRS + X.SIP + X.SVK + X.YUK + X.TOPLAM AS RISKTOTAL FROM TBLCARISK C INNER JOIN TBLCASABIT CS ON C.CARIKOD = CS.CARI_KOD CROSS APPLY INTERNALCARISKBUL( \'E\', \'TOP\', C.CARIKOD, GETDATE(), NULL, \'\') X WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.CARIKOD=\'%1$s\'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.CARIKOD AS CARI_KOD, 0 AS RISKLIMIT, 0 AS RISKCLOSED, X.CHA + X.CHB + X.CHK + X.TEM + X.CAR + X.CCR + X.SAR + X.SCR + X.IRS + X.SIP + X.SVK + X.YUK + X.TOPLAM AS RISKTOTAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY C.CARIKOD ) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLCARISK C INNER JOIN TBLCASABIT CS ON C.CARIKOD = CS.CARI_KOD CROSS APPLY INTERNALCARISKBUL( \'E\', \'TOP\', C.CARIKOD, GETDATE(), NULL, \'\' ) X WHERE 1 = 1 %1$s ) AS R

SELECT ISNULL(CR.SIPRISKDAVRAN,2) SIPRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.SEVKRISKDAVRAN,2) SEVKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.YUKRISKDAVRAN,2) YUKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.IRSRISKDAVRAN,2) IRSRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.FATRISKDAVRAN,2) FATRISKDAVRAN, RS.TEM AS RISK_TEMINAT, RS.SAR AS SENET_ASIL_RISK, RS.SCR AS SENET_CIRO_RISK, RS.CAR AS CEK_ASIL_RISK, RS.CCR AS CEK_CIRO_RISK, RS.SIP AS SIPARIS_RISKI, RS.SVK AS SEVK_RISKI, RS.YUK AS YUKLEME_RISKI, RS.IRS AS IRSALIYE_RISKI, DBO.CARISKBUL(\'E\',\'TOP\', \'%3$s\',\'%2$s\', \'S\', \'\') AS RISK_TOPLAMI FROM TBLCARISK CR WITH(NOLOCK) CROSS APPLY INTERNALCARISKBUL(\'H\',\'ALL\',\'%1$s\',\'%2$s\', NULL , NULL ) AS RS WHERE CR.CARIKOD = \'%3$s\'

SELECT TOP 10 F.CARI_KODU ,S.STOK_KODU CODE ,ST.STOK_ADI NAME ,COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) ADET ,SUM(S.STHAR_GCMIK) TOPLAM_MIKTAR ,SUM(S.STHAR_GCMIK * STHAR_NF) TOTAL FROM TBLSTHAR S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND F.FTIRSIP = S.STHAR_FTIRSIP INNER JOIN TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = S.STOK_KODU WHERE F.FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND F.CARI_KODU=\'%1$s\' AND TIPI IN (1,2) AND S.SUBE_KODU = %2$d GROUP BY F.CARI_KODU ,S.STOK_KODU ,ST.STOK_ADI ORDER BY COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) DESC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT CL.CARI_KOD, CL.CARI_ISIM, CL.CARI_TEL, CL.CARI_ADRES, CL.CARI_IL, CL.CARI_ILCE, CL.ULKE_KODU, CL.EMAIL, CL.FAX, CL.VERGI_DAIRESI, CL.VERGI_NUMARASI, CL.ODEMETIPI, CK.TCKIMLIKNO, CL.GRUP_KODU, CL.RAPOR_KODU1, CL.RAPOR_KODU2, CL.RAPOR_KODU3, CL.RAPOR_KODU4, CL.RAPOR_KODU5, CL.DOVIZ_TIPI, CL.DOVIZ_TURU, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(CL.DOVIZLIMI, \'H\') = \'H\' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS DOVIZLIMI, CL.CARI_TIP, CL.CARI_TEL2, CL.POSTAKODU, CL.CM_ALACT AS CREDIT, CL.CM_BORCT AS DEBIT, CL.ACIK1, ISNULL(CR.SIPRISKDAVRAN,2) SIPRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.SEVKRISKDAVRAN,2) SEVKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.YUKRISKDAVRAN,2) YUKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.IRSRISKDAVRAN,2) IRSRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.FATRISKDAVRAN,2) FATRISKDAVRAN, 1 AS ISTRANSFER, CL.ISKONTO_ORANI, CL.VADE_GUNU, CK.ODEKOD AS ODEKOD, ISNULL(CL.KOSULKODU, \'\') AS KOSULKODU, (CL.CM_BORCT-CL.CM_ALACT) AS BALANCE, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(CL.KAYITTARIHI,CL.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, CL.FIYATGRUBU AS PRICEGRP, CK.S_YEDEK2 AS MAINCLCODE, CASE WHEN EFATCARI.IDENTIFIER IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ACCEPTEINV, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(CL.MUSTERIBAZIKDV, \'H\') = \'H\' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS USECUSTOMERBASEDVAT, ISNULL(CLVAT.SATISKDVORANI, 0) CUSTOMERSALESVAT, CL.C_YEDEK1, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CL.CARI_KOD) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLCASABIT CL WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLCASABITEK CK WITH(NOLOCK) ON CL.CARI_KOD=CK.CARI_KOD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCARISK CR WITH(NOLOCK) ON CR.CARIKOD = CK.CARI_KOD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCAHAR CH WITH(NOLOCK) ON CH.CARI_KOD = CL.CARI_KOD AND CH.INC_KEY_NUMBER IN (SELECT MAX(INC_KEY_NUMBER) FROM TBLCAHAR WHERE CARI_KOD=CH.CARI_KOD ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IDENTIFIER FROM NETSIS..TBLEFATCARI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE AKTIF <>\'H\' GROUP BY IDENTIFIER ) EFATCARI ON EFATCARI.IDENTIFIER = ISNULL(CL.VERGI_NUMARASI, CK.TCKIMLIKNO) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CSK.CARI_KOD, MIN(CSK.SATISKDVORANI) SATISKDVORANI FROM TBLCARISTOK CSK WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CSK.CARI_KOD IS NOT NULL AND CSK.STOK_KODU IS NULL AND ((CSK.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND CSK.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (CSK.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND CSK.SUBE_KODU=%3$d) OR CSK.ISLETME_KODU=-1) AND ISNULL(CSK.BASTAR, GETDATE()) <= GETDATE() GROUP BY CSK.CARI_KOD ) CLVAT ON CLVAT.CARI_KOD = CL.CARI_KOD %6$s WHERE ((CL.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (CL.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=%3$d) OR CL.ISLETME_KODU=-1) %1$s %4$s %5$s GROUP BY CL.CARI_KOD ,CL.CARI_ISIM ,CL.CARI_TEL ,CL.CARI_ADRES ,CL.CARI_IL ,CL.CARI_ILCE ,CL.ULKE_KODU ,CL.EMAIL ,CL.FAX ,CL.VERGI_DAIRESI ,CL.VERGI_NUMARASI ,CL.ODEMETIPI ,CK.TCKIMLIKNO ,CL.GRUP_KODU ,CL.RAPOR_KODU1 ,CL.RAPOR_KODU2 ,CL.RAPOR_KODU3 ,CL.RAPOR_KODU4 ,CL.RAPOR_KODU5 ,CL.DOVIZ_TIPI ,CL.DOVIZ_TURU ,CL.DOVIZLIMI ,CL.CARI_TIP ,CL.CARI_TEL2 ,CL.POSTAKODU ,CL.CM_ALACT ,CL.CM_BORCT ,CL.ACIK1 ,SIPRISKDAVRAN ,SEVKRISKDAVRAN ,YUKRISKDAVRAN ,IRSRISKDAVRAN ,FATRISKDAVRAN ,CK.ODEKOD ,CL.KOSULKODU ,CL.ISKONTO_ORANI ,CL.VADE_GUNU ,(CL.CM_BORCT - CL.CM_ALACT) ,CL.KAYITTARIHI, CL.DUZELTMETARIHI ,CL.FIYATGRUBU ,CK.S_YEDEK2 ,EFATCARI.IDENTIFIER ,CL.MUSTERIBAZIKDV ,CLVAT.SATISKDVORANI ,CL.C_YEDEK1 ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT CE.CARI_KOD AS CLCODE, CE.YETKILIKISI AS INCHARGE, CE.UNVAN AS DEFINITION_, CE.TEL, CE.ULKETELKODU AS TELCODE, CE.EMAIL, CE.KAYITTARIHI AS CREATEDDATE, CONVERT(int,ISNULL(CE.RECID,0)) AS RECID, CONVERT(int,ISNULL(CE.AKTIF,0)) AS ACTIVE, CE.ISLEMTIPI AS PROCESSTYPE, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(CE.KAYITTARIHI,CE.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CE.CARI_KOD) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLCARIEMAIL CE WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCASABIT CL WITH(NOLOCK) ON CE.CARI_KOD = CL.CARI_KOD WHERE ((CL.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (CL.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) OR CL.ISLETME_KODU=-1) %3$s %4$s ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT D.KOSUL_KOD, D.ACIKLAMA, 1 AS TYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY D.KOSUL_KOD) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLKOSGENEL D WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLKOSULMAS K WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.KOSUL_KOD=K.KOSUL_KOD WHERE (K.ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR K.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d) AND (K.SUBE_KODU=-1 OR K.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) AND KAPATILMIS=\'H\') AS R

SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT SERI AS SERIAL, 0 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEFATSERI WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ISNULL(C_YEDEK1,\'X\')<>\'A\' AND SUBE_KODU=%1$d AND (SELECT ISNULL(COKLUBIRIM,\'X\') FROM TBLEFATPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d) = \'E\') UNION (SELECT BIRIMKOD AS SERIAL, 0 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEFATPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d) UNION (SELECT SERI AS SERIAL, 1 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEFATSERI WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE C_YEDEK1=\'A\' AND SUBE_KODU=%1$d AND ISNULL(C_YEDEK2,\'X\')<>\'E\' AND (SELECT ISNULL(COKLUBIRIM,\'X\') FROM TBLEARSIVPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d) = \'E\') UNION (SELECT BIRIMKOD AS SERIAL, 1 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEARSIVPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d) UNION (SELECT SERI AS SERIAL, 2 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEFATSERI WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE C_YEDEK1=\'A\' AND C_YEDEK2=\'E\' AND SUBE_KODU=%1$d AND (SELECT ISNULL(COKLUBIRIM,\'X\') FROM TBLEARSIVPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d) = \'E\') UNION (SELECT SERI AS SERIAL, 3 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEIRSSERI WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ISNULL(C_YEDEK1,\'X\')<>\'E\' AND SUBE_KODU=%1$d) UNION (SELECT SERI AS SERIAL, 4 SERIALTYPE FROM TBLEIRSSERI WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE C_YEDEK1 = \'E\' AND SUBE_KODU=%1$d) ) SERI ORDER BY SERIALTYPE
SELECT GIB_FATIRS_NO GIBDocumentNumber, ZARFID EnvelopeId, UUID ETTN FROM TBLEFATURA WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE FTIRSIP = %1$d AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND FATIRS_NO = \'%3$s\' AND CARI_KODU = \'%4$s\'
SELECT GIB_FATIRS_NO GIBDocumentNumber, UUID EnvelopeId, UUID ETTN FROM TBLEARSIV WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE FTIRSIP = %1$d AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND FATIRS_NO = \'%3$s\' AND CARI_KODU = \'%4$s\'
SELECT DURUM FROM %5$s WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE FTIRSIP = %1$d AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND FATIRS_NO = \'%3$s\' AND CARI_KODU = \'%4$s\'

SELECT I.STOK_ADI AS NAME, S.STHAR_GCMIK AS AMOUNT, S.STHAR_BF AS PRICE, CASE S.OLCUBR WHEN 3 THEN I.OLCU_BR3 WHEN 2 THEN I.OLCU_BR2 ELSE I.OLCU_BR1 END UNITCODE FROM TBLSTHAR AS S WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTSABIT AS I WITH (NOLOCK) ON I.STOK_KODU=S.STOK_KODU WHERE S.FISNO = \'%1$s\' AND STHAR_FTIRSIP = %2$d AND S.SUBE_KODU = %3$d

SELECT SF.FATIRS_NO AS FICHENO, SF.TARIH AS DOCDATE, SF.SAT_ISKT AS TOTALDISCOUNTS, SF.KDV AS TOTALVAT, SF.GENELTOPLAM AS NETTOTAL, SF.GEN_ISK1T, SF.GEN_ISK2T, SF.GEN_ISK3T, SF.BRUTTUTAR AS GROSSTOTAL, SF.ACIKLAMA AS GENEXP1, C.CARI_KOD AS CCODE, C.CARI_ISIM AS CDEFINITION, C.CARI_ADRES AS ADDR1, C.CARI_IL AS CITY, C.CARI_TEL AS TELNRS1, C.FAX AS FAXNR, C.VERGI_NUMARASI AS TAXNR, C.CARI_ILCE AS TOWN, C.VERGI_DAIRESI AS TAXOFFICE, C.CM_BORCT-C.CM_ALACT AS BAKIYE, C.EMAIL AS EMAILADDR, C.WEB AS WEBADDR, SA.CARI_ISIM AS SHIPADDRESSTITLE, SA.VERGI_NUMARASI AS SHIPADDRESSTAXNR, SU.UNVAN AS FIRMTITLE, SU.ADRES AS FIRMADDR1, SU.EMAIL AS FIRMEMAILADDR, SU.FAX AS FIRMFAXNR, SU.ILCE AS FIRMTOWN, SU.SEHIRKODU AS FIRMCITY, SU.WEBADRESI AS FIRMWEBADDR, SU.TEL AS FIRMTELNRS1, SU.VDAIRE AS FIRMTAXOFFICE, SU.VNO AS FIRMTAXNR, IR.LICENSEPLATEID, IR.DORSEPLAKA1, IR.DPERSON1FIRSTNAME, IR.DPERSON1FAMILYNAME, IR.DPERSON1NID, NEWID() AS GUID FROM TBLFATUIRS AS SF WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLCASABIT AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON SF.CARI_KODU = C.CARI_KOD LEFT JOIN TBLCASABIT AS SA WITH (NOLOCK) ON SF.CARI_KOD2 = SA.CARI_KOD LEFT JOIN TBLSUBELER AS SU WITH (NOLOCK) ON SF.SUBE_KODU = SU.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLEIRSEK AS IR WITH (NOLOCK) ON SF.FATIRS_NO = IR.FATIRS_NO WHERE SF.FATIRS_NO = \'%1$s\' AND SF.FTIRSIP = %2$d AND SF.SUBE_KODU = %3$d
SELECT TBL.FATIRSNO AS VALUEPAIR FROM TBLFATUEK TBL WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TBL.CKOD=\'%1$s\' AND TBL.FKOD=\'%2$s\' AND TBL.SUBE_KODU = %3$d AND TBL.ACIK15=\'%4$s\'
SELECT TBL.FATIRSNO AS VALUEPAIR FROM TBLFATUEK TBL WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TBL.FKOD=\'%1$s\' AND TBL.SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND TBL.ACIK15=\'%3$s\'

SELECT * FROM( SELECT K.KOSUL_KOD, ISNULL(K.ACIKLAMA,K.KOSUL_KOD) ACIKLAMA, 0 AS TYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY K.KOSUL_KOD) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLKOSULMAS K WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (K.ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR K.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d) AND (K.SUBE_KODU=-1 OR K.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) AND K.AP=\'E\' AND K.KOSUL_KOD NOT IN ( SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR DENYL WHERE DENYL.TABLENAME = \'TBLKOSULMAS\' AND DENYL.SUBE_KODU = %2$d )) AS R
SELECT GRUP_KOD AS GROUP_CODE FROM TBLCAGRUP WHERE SUBE_KODU = %1$d AND ISLETME_KODU = %2$d

SELECT CLCODE, IFNULL(SUM(VALUE),0) OPERATIONSTODAY FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE , CLCODE FROM INVOICE I WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(I.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(I.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(I.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLCODE FROM ORDERS O WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(O.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(O.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(O.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE , CLCODE FROM CASECASH CASH WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(CASH.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CASH.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CASH.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLCODE FROM CASHCREDIT CREDIT WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(CREDIT.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CREDIT.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CREDIT.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLCODE FROM CHEQUEDEED CHEQ WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(CHEQ.GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CHEQ.GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(CHEQ.GDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLCODE FROM VISITINFO VISIT WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(VISIT.VISITDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(VISIT.VISITDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(VISIT.VISITDATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLIENTCODE AS CLCODE FROM USERMAINPENETRATION P WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(P.DATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(P.DATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(P.DATE),1,2)) GROUP BY CLIENTCODE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) VALUE, CLIENTCODE AS CLCODE FROM CABINTRANS CB WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(DATE),1,10) ) GROUP BY CB.CLIENTCODE ) K GROUP BY K.CLCODE

SELECT KOD, BILGI, CMDATE, RowNum FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY KOD) AS RowNum FROM ( SELECT KOD, BILGI, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTAR,DUZELTTAR) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY KOD ORDER BY KAYITTAR DESC) AS RN FROM TBLEVRAK WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE EVRAKTIPI = 0 AND TABLOTIPI = 1 %1$s ) AS K WHERE RN = 1 )R

SELECT * FROM(SELECT TMP.*, CONVERT(NVARCHAR(18), CAST(TMP.PRICE AS DECIMAL(18, 5))) + \' /\' + ( CASE WHEN C.ISIM IS NULL THEN \'%6$s\' ELSE C.ISIM END ) CPRICE ,ISNULL(C.SIRA, 0) AS CURNR ,ISNULL(C.ISIM, \'%6$s\') AS CURCODE ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STOK_KODU) AS RowNum FROM ( (%1$s) UNION (%2$s) UNION (%3$s) UNION (%4$s) %5$s ) AS TMP LEFT JOIN NETSIS..KUR C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.SIRA=FIATDOVTIP ) AS R

SELECT U.WEIGHT, U.WIDTH, U.LENGTH, U.HEIGHT FROM %1$s I INNER JOIN %2$s T ON I.SALESFICHEID = T.LOGICALREF INNER JOIN ITEMUNITS U ON I.UNITCODE = U.CODE AND I.ITEMCODE = U.ITEMCODE WHERE T.FICHENO=? AND I.LINENR=?

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DEPO_KODU, DEPO_ISMI, ITEMCODE, STOK_KODU, (TOTAL_GIRIS - TOTAL_CIKIS - RESERVED) AS REALSTOCK, (TOTAL_GIRIS - TOTAL_CIKIS) AS ACTUALSTOCK, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STOK_KODU,DEPO_KODU) AS RowNum FROM(SELECT PH.DEPO_KODU, DP.DEPO_ISMI, PH.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, PH.STOK_KODU, SUM(PH.TOP_GIRIS_MIK) AS TOTAL_GIRIS, SUM(PH.TOP_CIKIS_MIK) AS TOTAL_CIKIS, SUM(PH.STOK_DAGITIM) AS RESERVED FROM TBLSTOKPH PH WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTOKDP DP WITH (NOLOCK) ON PH.DEPO_KODU = DP.DEPO_KODU WHERE PH.SUBE_KODU = %1$s %2$s GROUP BY PH.DEPO_KODU, DP.DEPO_ISMI, PH.STOK_KODU ) AS TMP ) AS R

SELECT MAS.KOSUL_KOD KOSULKOD,MAS.ACIKLAMA,DET.ORANTUTAR ,DET.DEGERI IND1,DET.ISKORAN2 IND2,DET.ISKORAN3 IND3 ,DET.ISKORAN4 IND4,DET.ISKORAN5 IND5,DET.ISKORAN6 IND6 ,DET.MALFSTOKKODU,DET.MALFMIKTAR1,DET.MALFAZLASI1 FROM TBLKOSDETAY DET WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLKOSULMAS MAS WITH (NOLOCK) ON MAS.KOSUL_KOD = DET.KOSUL_KOD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSTSABIT SBT1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON SBT1.STOK_KODU = DET.STOKKODU LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSTSABIT SBT2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON ( ( CASE WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 1 THEN SBT2.GRUP_KODU WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 2 THEN SBT2.KOD_1 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 3 THEN SBT2.KOD_2 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 4 THEN SBT2.FIYATKODU WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 5 THEN SBT2.KOD_3 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 6 THEN SBT2.KOD_4 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 7 THEN SBT2.KOD_5 END ) ) = DET.RAPORKODU WHERE ( ( STOKKODU = \'%1$s\' AND RAPORKODU IS NULL AND MAS.KOSUL_KOD = \'%2$s\' ) OR ( RAPORKODU = ( CASE WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 1 THEN SBT2.GRUP_KODU WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 2 THEN SBT2.KOD_1 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 3 THEN SBT2.KOD_2 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 4 THEN SBT2.FIYATKODU WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 5 THEN SBT2.KOD_3 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 6 THEN SBT2.KOD_4 WHEN KOSRAPORKODU = 7 THEN SBT2.KOD_5 END ) AND SBT2.STOK_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND MAS.KOSUL_KOD = \'%2$s\' ) )
SELECT T.TAGGEDDATA AS ITEMCODE, M.TAG FROM TBLHASHTAGTRA T WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLHASHTAGMAS M ON M.TAGID = T.TAGID WHERE T.MODULID = 4

SELECT * FROM( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY STOK_KODU , CODE) AS RowNum FROM ( (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, OLCU_BR1 AS CODE, 1 AS PAY, 1 AS PAYDA, 1 AS PURCHCLAS, 1 AS SALESCLAS, 1 AS LINENR, ST.SUBE_KODU, ST.ISLETME_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI, ST.BIRIM_AGIRLIK, ST.EN, ST.BOY, ST.GENISLIK FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU) UNION (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, OLCU_BR2 AS CODE, PAY_1 AS PAY, PAYDA_1 AS PAYDA, 1 AS PURCHCLAS, 1 AS SALESCLAS, 2 AS LINENR, ST.SUBE_KODU, ST.ISLETME_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI, ST.BIRIM_AGIRLIK, ST.EN, ST.BOY, ST.GENISLIK FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU) UNION (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, OLCU_BR3 AS CODE, PAY2 AS PAY, PAYDA2 AS PAYDA, 1 AS PURCHCLAS, 1 AS SALESCLAS, 3 AS LINENR, ST.SUBE_KODU, ST.ISLETME_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI, ST.BIRIM_AGIRLIK, ST.EN, ST.BOY, ST.GENISLIK FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU) UNION (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, BR.OLCUBIRIMI AS CODE, BR.PAY AS PAY, BR.PAYDA AS PAYDA, 1 AS PURCHCLAS, 1 AS SALESCLAS, 3 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BR.KOD ORDER BY BR.INCKEYNO) AS LINENR, ST.SUBE_KODU, ST.ISLETME_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI, ST.BIRIM_AGIRLIK, ST.EN, ST.BOY, ST.GENISLIK FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU INNER JOIN TBLSTBIRIM BR WITH(NOLOCK) ON BR.KOD=ST.STOK_KODU) ) AS TMP WHERE STOK_KODU<>\'KONFIG\' AND CODE IS NOT NULL AND STOK_KODU NOT IN (SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TABLENAME=\'TBLSTSABIT\' AND SUBE_KODU=%2$d) AND ((ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND SUBE_KODU=%2$d) OR ISLETME_KODU=-1) %3$s %4$s) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ST.STOK_KODU, ST.STOK_ADI, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(ST.YAPILANDIR,\'H\') = \'H\' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS ISVARYANT, (CASE WHEN SKO.KOLISTOK_KODU IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS CARDTYPE, ISNULL(ST.GRUP_KODU, \'\') AS GRUP_KODU, ISNULL(GRP.GRUP_ISIM, \'\') AS STGRPNAME, ISNULL(ST.KOD_1, \'\') AS KOD_1, ISNULL(ST.KOD_2, \'\') AS KOD_2, ISNULL(ST.KOD_3, \'\') AS KOD_3, ISNULL(ST.KOD_4, \'\') AS KOD_4, ISNULL(ST.KOD_5, \'\') AS KOD_5, ST.KDV_ORANI AS VAT, ST.ALIS_KDV_KODU AS RETURNVAT, (CASE WHEN ISNULL(CIKIS_SERI, \'H\') = \'E\' OR ISNULL(GIRIS_SERI, \'H\') = \'E\' THEN(CASE WHEN SERI_MIK = \'E\' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) ELSE 0 END) TRACKTYPE, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, 0 AS ISACTIVE, 1 AS IMAGEINC, 0 AS ADDTAXREF, ST.SAT_DOV_TIP AS CURRTYPE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ST.STOK_KODU) AS RowNum FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = SEK.STOK_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLSTOKKOLI SKO WITH(NOLOCK) ON SKO.KOLISTOK_KODU=ST.STOK_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLSTGRUP GRP WITH(NOLOCK) ON GRP.GRUP_KOD = ST.GRUP_KODU WHERE ST.STOK_KODU <> \'KONFIG\' AND ST.STOK_KODU NOT IN (SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TABLENAME=\'TBLSTSABIT\' AND SUBE_KODU=%2$d) AND ((ST.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND ST.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (ST.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND ST.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) OR ST.ISLETME_KODU=-1) %3$s %4$s %5$s ) AS R

SELECT * ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CODETYPE ,GRPCODE ) AS LOGICALREF FROM ( ( SELECT 1 CODETYPE ,GRUP_KOD GRPCODE ,GRUP_ISIM GRPNAME ,dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLSTOKKOD1 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (SUBE_KODU=-1 OR SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) UNION ( SELECT 2 CODETYPE ,GRUP_KOD GRPCODE ,GRUP_ISIM GRPNAME ,dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLSTOKKOD2 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (SUBE_KODU=-1 OR SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) UNION ( SELECT 3 CODETYPE ,GRUP_KOD GRPCODE ,GRUP_ISIM GRPNAME ,dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLSTOKKOD3 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (SUBE_KODU=-1 OR SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) UNION ( SELECT 4 CODETYPE ,GRUP_KOD GRPCODE ,GRUP_ISIM GRPNAME ,dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLSTOKKOD4 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (SUBE_KODU=-1 OR SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) UNION ( SELECT 5 CODETYPE ,GRUP_KOD GRPCODE ,GRUP_ISIM GRPNAME ,dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLSTOKKOD5 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ISLETME_KODU=%1$d ) AND (SUBE_KODU=-1 OR SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) ) TMP
