SELECT TOP 1 CAST(IIF(STHAR_DOVFIAT = 0 OR STHAR_DOVFIAT IS NULL OR STHAR_DOVTIP = 0, ISNULL(STHAR_NF, 0), STHAR_DOVFIAT) AS DECIMAL(18, 5)) PRICE, OL.STHAR_TARIH DATE_, OL.INCKEYNO LOGICALREF, CONVERT(NVARCHAR(18), CAST(IIF(STHAR_DOVFIAT = 0 OR STHAR_DOVFIAT IS NULL OR STHAR_DOVTIP = 0, ISNULL(STHAR_NF, 0), STHAR_DOVFIAT) AS DECIMAL(18, 5))) + \'/\' + IIF(STHAR_DOVTIP = 0, \'%1$s\', K.ISIM) AS CPRICE, 0 INCVAT, 99999 PRICEREF, ISNULL(K.ISIM, \'%1$s\') CURCODE, ISNULL(K.SIRA, 0) CURTYPE FROM TBLSTHAR OL WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLFATUIRS ORF WITH(NOLOCK) ON OL.FISNO = ORF.FATIRS_NO AND OL.SUBE_KODU = ORF.SUBE_KODU AND OL.STHAR_FTIRSIP = ORF.FTIRSIP LEFT JOIN NETSIS..KUR K WITH(NOLOCK) ON K.SIRA = OL.STHAR_DOVTIP WHERE OL.STHAR_HTUR IN(\'J\', \'H\') AND OL.STHAR_FTIRSIP IN(\'1\', \'3\') AND OL.DEPO_KODU = %2$d AND ORF.ONAYTIPI = \'A\' AND OL.SUBE_KODU = %3$d AND ORF.ISLETME_KODU = %4$d AND ORF.TIPI IN(2, 1) AND (ORF.KAPATILMIS IS NULL OR ORF.KAPATILMIS <> \'S\') AND (\'\' = \'%5$s\' OR OL.STHAR_ACIKLAMA=\'%5$s\') AND OL.STOK_KODU = \'%6$s\' AND ISNULL(OL.YAPKOD,\'\')=\'%7$s\' ORDER BY OL.STHAR_TARIH DESC, OL.FISNO DESC
SELECT SON_GIR_NET_FIAT PRICE, 0 AS PRCURR FROM TBLSTOKPH WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND DEPO_KODU = %3$d AND ISNULL(YAPKOD, \'\') = \'%4$s\'
SELECT GRUP_KOD, GRUP_ISIM, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(KAYITTARIHI,DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLMUHAREF WITH(NOLOCK)

SELECT * FROM( (SELECT \'FIAT_LISTE\' AS PARAMNO, C_YEDEK4 AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSTOKPARAM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ISLETME_KODU=%1$d) UNION (SELECT \'MUHASEBE_REFERANS\' AS PARAMNO, C_YEDEK11 AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'MUHREF_KODU\' AS PARAMNO, REFKOD AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'FIAT_SISTEMI\' AS PARAMNAME, FIAT_SISTEMI AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLPARAM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'OLCUBIRIMITABLODAN\' AS PARAMNAME, OLCUBIRIMITABLODAN AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'MUSTERI_RISK_UYARISI\' AS PARAMNAME, MUSTERI_RISK_UYARISI AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'SATISFIAT_DOVFIAT\' AS PARAMNAME, SATISFIAT_DOVFIAT AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'STOK_AYIR\' AS PARAMNAME, STOK_AYIR AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'SATIR_VADE_TAR\' AS PARAMNAME, VADE_TAR AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'MAL_FAZLASI_ISKONTO\' AS PARAMNAME, MAL_FAZLASI_ISKONTO AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'LOKAL_KUR\' AS PARAMNAME, ISNULL(YEDEK6, \'TL\') AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLPARAM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'LOKAL_ALTKUR\' AS PARAMNAME, YEDEK7 AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLPARAM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'TESLIMAT_CARI\' AS PARAMNAME , CASE(select COUNT(1) FROM NETSIS..PRGOZELPRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE GRUPKOD = \'CARI\' AND ANAHTAR = \'TESLIMCARIGOSTERME\') WHEN 0 THEN \'H\' ELSE \'E\' END AS PARAMVALUE) UNION (SELECT \'USEEINVOICE\' AS PARAMNAME ,CASE WHEN EFATENTEG=\'E\' THEN \'1\' ELSE \'0\' END AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLEFATPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d ) UNION (SELECT \'USEEDESPATCH\' AS PARAMNAME ,CASE WHEN IRSALIYE=\'E\' THEN \'1\' ELSE \'0\' END AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLEFATPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'USEEARCHIVE\' AS PARAMNAME ,CASE WHEN EARSIVENTEG=\'E\' THEN \'1\' ELSE \'0\' END AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLEARSIVPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'FARKLI_TESLIM_YERI\' AS PARAMNO, FARKLI_TESLIM_YERI AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'EKSIDE_CIKMA\' AS PARAMNO, EKSIDE_CIKMA AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) UNION (SELECT \'EKSI_BAKIYE_GOSTERIM\' AS PARAMNO, EKSI_BAKIYE_GOSTERIM AS PARAMVALUE FROM TBLSFATUPRM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%2$d) ) AS TMP

SELECT IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE CLCODE = @clcode AND ISTRANSFER = 0), 0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE CLCODE = @clcode AND ISTRANSFER = 0), 0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM CASECASH WHERE CLCODE = @clcode AND ISTRANSFER = 0), 0) + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTALNET) FROM INVOICE WHERE CLCODE = @clcode AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE IN(1,3) AND INVTYPE = 1), 0) AS TOTALNET
SELECT IFNULL((SELECT SUM(TOTALNET) FROM INVOICE WHERE CLCODE = @clcode AND ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE IN(1,3) AND INVTYPE = 0), 0) AS TOTALNET

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP+1) + \';\' + SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO + \';\' + SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU AS KOD, SIPATRA.INCKEYNO AS ORDERLINELOGICALREF, (SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK) - (SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT + SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL) AS AVAILABLEAMOUNT FROM TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSIPATRA SIPATRA WITH (NOLOCK) ON SIPATRA.FISNO = SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO AND SIPATRA.STHAR_FTIRSIP = SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP AND SIPATRA.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU WHERE (SIPATRA.STHAR_HTUR = \'H\') AND (SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = %1$S) AND (SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO IN (%2$S) ) AND (SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = \'%3$S\') AND (ISNULL(SIPAMAS.UPDATE_KODU, \'\') <> \'Y\') AND (SIPAMAS.TIPI <> 6) AND (SIPAMAS.TIPI <> 1) AND (SIPAMAS.TIPI <> 3) AND (STHAR_GCKOD = \'C\') AND ((((SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT) OR (SIPATRA.STHAR_MALFISK <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL)) AND (SIPATRA.L_YEDEK9 <> - 1)) OR (((SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK2 <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT) OR (SIPATRA.KKMALF <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL)) AND (SIPATRA.L_YEDEK9 = - 1))) AND (ISNULL(SIPATRA.C_YEDEK6, \'\') <> \'P\') AND (SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK - (SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT + SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL)) > 0 AND (SIPATRA.DEPO_KODU IN (%4$S)) ORDER BY SIPATRA.STRA_SIPKONT

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP+1) + \';\' + SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO + \';\' + SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU AS KOD, SIPATRA.INCKEYNO AS ORDERLINELOGICALREF, (SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK) - (SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT + SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL) AS AVAILABLEAMOUNT FROM TBLSIPATRA SIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO = SIPATRA.FISNO AND SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = SIPATRA.STHAR_FTIRSIP AND SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = SIPATRA.STHAR_ACIKLAMA WHERE (CONVERT(VARCHAR, SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP) + \';\' + SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO + \';\' + SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU) = (SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, STHAR_FTIRSIP) + \';\' + FISNO + \';\' + STHAR_ACIKLAMA FROM TBLSIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE INCKEYNO = %1$d ) ORDER BY SIPATRA.STRA_SIPKONT

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP+1) + \';\' + SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO + \';\' + SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU AS KOD, SIPATRA.INCKEYNO AS ORDERLINELOGICALREF, (SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK) - (SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT + SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL) AS AVAILABLEAMOUNT FROM TBLSIPATRA SIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS ON SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO = SIPATRA.FISNO AND SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = SIPATRA.STHAR_FTIRSIP AND SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = SIPATRA.STHAR_ACIKLAMA WHERE SIPATRA.INCKEYNO IN ( %1$s ) ORDER BY SIPATRA.STRA_SIPKONT

SELECT SIPAMAS.GEN_ISK1T + SIPAMAS.GEN_ISK2T + SIPAMAS.GEN_ISK3T AS ADDDISCOUNTS, SUM(SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK * SIPATRA.STHAR_BF) AS GROSSTOTAL FROM TBLSIPATRA SIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS ON SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO = SIPATRA.FISNO AND SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = SIPATRA.STHAR_FTIRSIP AND SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = SIPATRA.STHAR_ACIKLAMA WHERE SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = (SELECT STHAR_FTIRSIP FROM TBLSIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE INCKEYNO = %1$d) AND SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO = (SELECT FISNO FROM TBLSIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE INCKEYNO = %1$d) AND SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = (SELECT STHAR_ACIKLAMA FROM TBLSIPATRA WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE INCKEYNO = %1$d) GROUP BY SIPAMAS.GEN_ISK1T + SIPAMAS.GEN_ISK2T + SIPAMAS.GEN_ISK3T

SELECT CASE WHEN X.TOPLAM > X.SEVK AND X.SEVK > 0 THEN 3 WHEN X.TOPLAM <= X.SEVK AND X.SEVK > 0 THEN 5 WHEN X.TIPI = 3 THEN 1 WHEN X.TIPI = 1 THEN 2 WHEN X.TIPI = 2 THEN 4 END STATUS, X.FATIRS_NO AS FICHENO FROM ( SELECT SUM(ISNULL(ORF.STHAR_GCMIK, 0)) TOPLAM, SUM(ISNULL(ORF.FIRMA_DOVTUT, 0)) SEVK, F.TIPI, F.FATIRS_NO FROM TBLSIPATRA ORF LEFT JOIN TBLSIPAMAS F ON F.FATIRS_NO = ORF.FISNO AND F.SUBE_KODU = ORF.SUBE_KODU AND F.CARI_KODU = ORF.STHAR_ACIKLAMA WHERE F.FATIRS_NO IN %1$s AND F.FTIRSIP = 6 AND F.SUBE_KODU = %2$d GROUP BY F.FATIRS_NO, F.TIPI ) X
SELECT TIPI AS STATUS FROM TBLSIPAMAS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE FATIRS_NO = \'%1$s\' AND FTIRSIP = \'6\' AND CARI_KODU = \'%2$s\' AND SUBE_KODU = %3$d AND ISLETME_KODU = %4$d;

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ODM.ODEKOD) AS ROWNUM, ODM.ODEKOD AS CODE, (ODM.ODEKOD + \', \'+ ODM.ACIKLAMA) AS ODEMEPLAN, ACIKLAMA AS DEFINITION_, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(ODM.KAYITTARIHI, ODM.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLCAODEMAS ODM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE (ODM.ISLETME_KODU=-1 OR ODM.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d) AND (ODM.SUBE_KODU=-1 OR ODM.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) %3$s ) AS R

SELECT ST.STOK_KODU, ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, STOK_ADI, %1$s AS PRICE, 2 AS PTYPE, FIAT_BIRIMI AS UNITCODE, 1 AS UNITCONVERT, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTAR, SEK.DEGISIKTAR) AS CMDATE, %6$s AS FIATDOVTIP, \'%7$s\' AS PRICECODE, \'%7$s\' AS DEFINITION_, %8$s AS PRIORITY ,CONVERT(VARCHAR, SEK.BASTAR ,112) [BEGDATE] ,CONVERT(VARCHAR, SEK.BITTAR ,112) [ENDDATE] ,SEK.FIYATGRUBU AS GRPCODE ,NULL AS VARIANTCODE FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTOKFIAT SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = SEK.STOKKODU AND SEK.BASTAR IN ( SELECT MAX(BASTAR) FROM TBLSTOKFIAT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOKKODU = ST.STOK_KODU AND BASTAR <= GETDATE() AND ((BITTAR IS NULL) OR (BITTAR >=GETDATE())) AND ((FIYATGRUBU=SEK.FIYATGRUBU)OR(SEK.FIYATGRUBU IS NULL AND FIYATGRUBU IS NULL)) AND (A_S=SEK.A_S) GROUP BY A_S,FIYATGRUBU ) WHERE %1$s > 0.00 AND SEK.A_S=\'S\' AND (GETDATE()>=BASTAR AND GETDATE()<=ISNULL(BITTAR,GETDATE())) AND ST.STOK_KODU<>\'KONFIG\' AND ST.STOK_KODU NOT IN (SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TABLENAME=\'TBLSTSABIT\' AND SUBE_KODU=%3$d) AND ((ST.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND ST.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (ST.ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND ST.SUBE_KODU=%3$d) OR ST.ISLETME_KODU=-1) %4$s %5$s

SELECT ST.STOK_KODU, ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, STOK_ADI, %1$s AS PRICE, 2 AS PTYPE, FIAT_BIRIMI AS UNITCODE, 1 AS UNITCONVERT, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, %6$s AS FIATDOVTIP, \'%7$s\' AS PRICECODE, \'%7$s\' AS DEFINITION_, %8$s AS PRIORITY ,NULL AS BEGDATE ,NULL AS ENDDATE ,NULL AS GRPCODE ,NULL AS VARIANTCODE FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = SEK.STOK_KODU WHERE %1$s > 0.00 AND ST.STOK_KODU<>\'KONFIG\' AND ST.STOK_KODU NOT IN (SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TABLENAME=\'TBLSTSABIT\' AND SUBE_KODU=%3$d) AND ((ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (ISLETME_KODU=%2$d AND SUBE_KODU=%3$d) OR ISLETME_KODU=-1) %4$s %5$s

SELECT DOK.SUBE_KODU, SU.ISLETME_KODU, ISNULL(PLA.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA, \'%1$s\') PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA FROM %2$s DOK WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSUBELER SU WITH(NOLOCK) ON SU.SUBE_KODU = DOK.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER PLA WITH(NOLOCK) ON PLA.PLASIYER_KODU = DOK.PLASIYER_KODU WHERE DOK.SC_ALB_NO = \'%3$s\' AND DOK.SUBE_KODU = %4$d;

SELECT F.CARI_KODU, F.FTIRSIP, F.FATIRS_NO, EF.UUID, S.STOK_KODU, CS.CARISTOK_KODU, CS.CARISTOKISMI, CP.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA, CS.SUBE_KODU, CS.ISLETME_KODU FROM TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTHAR S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND S.STHAR_FTIRSIP = F.FTIRSIP AND S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN %6$s EF WITH(NOLOCK) ON EF.CARI_KODU = F.CARI_KODU AND EF.FTIRSIP = F.FTIRSIP AND EF.FATIRS_NO = F.FATIRS_NO AND EF.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLCARISTOK CS WITH(NOLOCK) ON CS.STOK_KODU = S.STOK_KODU AND CS.CARI_KOD = S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA AND (CS.ISLETME_KODU = -1 OR CS.ISLETME_KODU = %4$d) AND (CS.SUBE_KODU = -1 OR CS.SUBE_KODU = %5$d) AND ISNULL(CS.BASTAR, GETDATE()) <= GETDATE() LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER CP WITH (NOLOCK) ON CP.PLASIYER_KODU = F.PLA_KODU AND CP.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU AND CP.ISLETME_KODU = F.ISLETME_KODU WHERE F.FATIRS_NO = \'%1$s\' AND F.FTIRSIP = %2$d AND F.CARI_KODU = \'%3$s\'

SELECT KASA.SUBE_KODU, SU.ISLETME_KODU, ISNULL(PLA.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA,\'%6$s\') PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA FROM TBLKASA KASA WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSUBELER SU WITH(NOLOCK) ON SU.SUBE_KODU = KASA.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER PLA WITH(NOLOCK) ON PLA.PLASIYER_KODU = KASA.PLASIYER_KODU WHERE KASA.KSMAS_KOD = \'%1$s\' AND KASA.FISNO = \'%2$s\' AND KASA.KOD = \'%3$s\' AND KASA.TARIH = CONVERT(DATETIME, \'%4$s\', 120) AND KASA.SUBE_KODU = %5$d;

SELECT F.CARI_KODU, F.FTIRSIP, F.FATIRS_NO, S.STOK_KODU, CS.CARISTOK_KODU, CS.CARISTOKISMI, CP.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA, CS.SUBE_KODU, CS.ISLETME_KODU FROM TBLSIPAMAS F WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSIPATRA S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND S.STHAR_FTIRSIP = F.FTIRSIP AND S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLCARISTOK CS WITH(NOLOCK) ON CS.STOK_KODU = S.STOK_KODU AND CS.CARI_KOD = S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA AND (CS.ISLETME_KODU = -1 OR CS.ISLETME_KODU = %4$d) AND (CS.SUBE_KODU = -1 OR CS.SUBE_KODU = %5$d) AND ISNULL(CS.BASTAR, GETDATE()) <= GETDATE() LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER CP WITH (NOLOCK) ON CP.PLASIYER_KODU = F.PLA_KODU AND CP.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU AND CP.ISLETME_KODU = F.ISLETME_KODU WHERE FATIRS_NO = \'%1$s\' AND FTIRSIP = %2$d AND CARI_KODU = \'%3$s\'

SELECT KASA.SUBE_KODU, SU.ISLETME_KODU, ISNULL(PLA.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA, \'%1$s\') PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA FROM TBLKASA KASA WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSUBELER SU WITH(NOLOCK) ON SU.SUBE_KODU = KASA.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER PLA WITH(NOLOCK) ON PLA.PLASIYER_KODU = KASA.PLASIYER_KODU WHERE KASA.FISNO = \'%2$s\' AND KASA.SUBE_KODU = %3$d AND KASA.KOD = \'%4$s\'

SELECT F.CARI_KODU, F.FTIRSIP, F.FATIRS_NO, S.STOK_KODU, CS.CARISTOK_KODU, CS.CARISTOKISMI, CP.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA, CS.SUBE_KODU, CS.ISLETME_KODU FROM TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTHAR S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND S.STHAR_FTIRSIP = F.FTIRSIP AND S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU LEFT JOIN TBLCARISTOK CS WITH(NOLOCK) ON CS.STOK_KODU = S.STOK_KODU AND CS.CARI_KOD = S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA AND (CS.ISLETME_KODU = -1 OR CS.ISLETME_KODU = %3$d) AND (CS.SUBE_KODU = -1 OR CS.SUBE_KODU = %4$d) AND ISNULL(CS.BASTAR, GETDATE()) <= GETDATE() LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER CP WITH (NOLOCK) ON CP.PLASIYER_KODU = F.PLA_KODU AND CP.SUBE_KODU = F.SUBE_KODU AND CP.ISLETME_KODU = F.ISLETME_KODU WHERE F.FATIRS_NO = \'%1$s\' AND F.FTIRSIP = %2$d

SELECT SERI_NO AS SERI_1, ACIK1 AS SERI_2, SUM(MIKTAR) AS MIKTAR FROM( SELECT SERI_NO, ACIK1, SUM(MIKTAR*-1) MIKTAR FROM TBLSERITRA WHERE STOK_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND GCKOD = \'C\' and SUBE_KODU = \'%2$s\' GROUP BY SERI_NO,ACIK1 UNION ALL SELECT SERI_NO, ACIK1, SUM(MIKTAR) MIKTAR FROM TBLSERITRA WHERE STOK_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND GCKOD = \'G\' and SUBE_KODU = \'%2$s\' GROUP BY SERI_NO, ACIK1 ) X WHERE MIKTAR >= 0 GROUP BY SERI_NO, ACIK1

SELECT TOP 10 CS.CARI_KOD [CODE] ,CS.CARI_ISIM [NAME] ,SUM(STHAR_GCMIK * STHAR_NF) [TOTAL] FROM TBLSTHAR S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO INNER JOIN TBLCASABIT CS WITH (NOLOCK) ON F.CARI_KODU = CS.CARI_KOD AND S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND F.FTIRSIP = S.STHAR_FTIRSIP WHERE FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND F.TARIH<=\'2036-01-01\' AND F.TARIH>=\'2016-01-01\' AND S.STOK_KODU = \'%1$s\' %2$S GROUP BY CS.CARI_KOD,CS.CARI_ISIM ORDER BY COUNT(STOK_KODU) DESC
SELECT * FROM( SELECT PROJE_KODU AS CODE, PROJE_ACIKLAMA AS PROJE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY PROJE_KODU) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLPROJE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ISLETME_KODU=%1$d) AS R

SELECT CODE FROM ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT TOP 5 S.STOK_KODU CODE FROM TBLSTHAR S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND F.FTIRSIP = S.STHAR_FTIRSIP WHERE F.FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND F.CARI_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND TIPI IN (1,2) AND S.SUBE_KODU = %2$d GROUP BY S.STOK_KODU ORDER BY SUM(S.STHAR_GCMIK) DESC, COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) DESC ) AS KULLANILAN UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 5 S.STOK_KODU CODE FROM TBLSTHAR S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND F.FTIRSIP = S.STHAR_FTIRSIP WHERE F.FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND F.CARI_KODU = \'%1$s\' AND TIPI IN (1,2) AND S.SUBE_KODU = %2$d GROUP BY S.STOK_KODU HAVING COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(S.STHAR_GCMIK), COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) ASC ) AS KULLANILMAYAN UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 5 S.STOK_KODU CODE FROM TBLSTHAR S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND F.FTIRSIP = S.STHAR_FTIRSIP WHERE F.FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND TIPI IN (1,2) AND S.SUBE_KODU = %2$d GROUP BY S.STOK_KODU ORDER BY SUM(S.STHAR_GCMIK)DESC, COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) DESC ) AS F UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TOP 5 S.STOK_KODU CODE FROM TBLSTHAR S WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLFATUIRS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.FISNO = F.FATIRS_NO AND S.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = F.CARI_KODU AND F.FTIRSIP = S.STHAR_FTIRSIP WHERE F.FTIRSIP = \'1\' AND TIPI IN (1,2) AND S.SUBE_KODU = %2$d GROUP BY S.STOK_KODU HAVING COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(S.STHAR_GCMIK), COUNT(S.STOK_KODU) ASC ) AS K ) C GROUP BY CODE

SELECT SUM(BORC) DEBIT, SUM(ALACAK) CREDIT FROM( SELECT SUM(BORC-KAPATILMIS_TUTAR) BORC, 0 ALACAK FROM TBLCAHAR WHERE CARI_KOD = \'%2$s\' AND VADE_TARIHI < \'%1$s\' AND BORC > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0 BORC, SUM(ALACAK - KAPATILMIS_TUTAR) ALACAK FROM TBLCAHAR WHERE CARI_KOD = \'%2$s\' AND ALACAK > 0 ) X

SELECT %1$s CONVERT(VARCHAR, SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP) + \';\' + SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO + \';\' + SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU AS KOD, SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO, SIPAMAS.TARIH, SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU, CASABIT.CARI_ISIM, SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU, PLA.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA %2$s FROM TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSIPATRA SIPATRA WITH (NOLOCK) ON SIPATRA.FISNO = SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO AND SIPATRA.STHAR_FTIRSIP = SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP AND SIPATRA.STHAR_ACIKLAMA = SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCASABIT CASABIT WITH (NOLOCK) ON CASABIT.CARI_KOD = SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER PLA WITH (NOLOCK) ON PLA.PLASIYER_KODU = SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU %3$s WHERE (SIPATRA.STHAR_HTUR = \'H\') AND (ISNULL(SIPAMAS.UPDATE_KODU, \'\') <> \'Y\') AND (SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU = \'%4$S\') AND (SIPAMAS.TIPI <> 6) AND (SIPAMAS.TIPI <> 1) AND (SIPAMAS.TIPI <> 3) AND (SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = 6) AND ((((SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT) OR (SIPATRA.STHAR_MALFISK <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL)) AND (SIPATRA.L_YEDEK9 <> - 1)) OR (((SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK2 <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT) OR (SIPATRA.KKMALF <> SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL)) AND (SIPATRA.L_YEDEK9 = - 1))) AND (ISNULL(SIPATRA.C_YEDEK6, \'\') <> \'P\') AND (SIPATRA.STHAR_GCMIK - (SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVTUT + SIPATRA.FIRMA_DOVMAL)) > 0 %5$S ORDER BY SIPAMAS.TARIH DESC,SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO DESC

SELECT SERI_NO, TMP.STOK_KODU, MIN(SIRA_NO) SIRA_NO, (SUM(ISNULL(TMP.M1, 0)) - SUM(ISNULL(TMP.M2, 0))) AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SERI_NO, STOK_KODU, MIN(SIRA_NO) SIRA_NO, CASE WHEN GCKOD = \'G\' THEN SUM(MIKTAR) END M1, CASE WHEN GCKOD = \'C\' THEN SUM(MIKTAR) END M2 FROM TBLSERITRA WHERE SUBE_KODU = %1$d AND DEPOKOD = %2$d AND STOK_KODU = \'%3$s\' %4$s GROUP BY SERI_NO, STOK_KODU, GCKOD ) TMP GROUP BY TMP.SERI_NO, TMP.STOK_KODU %5$s

SELECT * FROM( SELECT CS.BAGLICARIKOD AS CLCODE, CS.CARI_KOD, CS.CARI_ADRES, CS.CARI_ISIM, CS.CARI_IL, CS.CARI_ILCE, CS.ULKE_KODU, CS.CARI_TEL, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(CS.KAYITTARIHI,CS.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CS.CARI_KOD) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLCASABIT CS WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CS.CARI_KOD NOT IN ( SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TABLENAME = \'TBLCASABIT\' AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d ) AND ( ( CS.ISLETME_KODU =%1$d AND CS.SUBE_KODU = %2$d ) OR ( CS.ISLETME_KODU = %1$d AND CS.SUBE_KODU = -1 ) OR CS.ISLETME_KODU =-1 %5$s ) %3$s %4$s ) AS R

SELECT CL.CARI_KOD, CL.CARI_ISIM, CL.CARI_TEL, CL.CARI_ADRES, CL.CARI_IL, CL.CARI_ILCE, CL.EMAIL, CL.FAX, CL.VERGI_DAIRESI, CL.VERGI_NUMARASI, CL.ODEMETIPI, CK.TCKIMLIKNO, CL.GRUP_KODU, CL.RAPOR_KODU1, CL.RAPOR_KODU2, CL.RAPOR_KODU3, CL.RAPOR_KODU4, CL.RAPOR_KODU5, CL.DOVIZ_TIPI, CL.DOVIZ_TURU, CL.DOVIZLIMI, CL.CARI_TIP, CL.CARI_TEL2, CL.POSTAKODU, CL.CM_ALACT AS CREDIT, CL.CM_BORCT AS DEBIT, ISNULL(CR.SIPRISKDAVRAN,2) SIPRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.SEVKRISKDAVRAN,2) SEVKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.YUKRISKDAVRAN,2) YUKRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.IRSRISKDAVRAN,2) IRSRISKDAVRAN, ISNULL(CR.FATRISKDAVRAN,2) FATRISKDAVRAN, 1 AS ISTRANSFER, CK.ODEKOD AS ODEKOD, (CL.CM_BORCT-CL.CM_ALACT) AS BALANCE, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(CL.KAYITTARIHI,CL.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CL.CARI_KOD) AS LOGICALREF FROM TBLCASABIT CL WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLCASABITEK CK WITH(NOLOCK) ON CL.CARI_KOD=CK.CARI_KOD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCARISK CR WITH(NOLOCK) ON CR.CARIKOD = CK.CARI_KOD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCAHAR CH WITH(NOLOCK) ON CH.CARI_KOD = CL.CARI_KOD AND CH.INC_KEY_NUMBER IN (SELECT MAX(INC_KEY_NUMBER) FROM TBLCAHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CARI_KOD=CH.CARI_KOD ) WHERE CL.ISLETME_KODU=-3

SELECT * ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY SPECODETYPE ,SPECODE ) AS LOGICALREF FROM ( (SELECT 1 CODETYPE ,OZELKOD SPECODE ,(OZELKOD + \'- \'+ ISNULL(ACIKLAMA,\'\')) DEFINITION ,1 SPECODETYPE FROM TBLOZELKOD1 WHERE ISLETME_KODU = %1$d) UNION (SELECT 1 CODETYPE ,OZELKOD SPECODE ,(OZELKOD + \'- \'+ ISNULL(ACIKLAMA,\'\')) DEFINITION ,2 SPECODETYPE FROM TBLOZELKOD2 WHERE ISLETME_KODU = %1$d) ) TMP

SELECT SUBE_KODU AS BRANCHCODE, OZEL_KOD1 AS SPECODE1, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM11 AS SPECODE11, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM12 AS SPECODE12, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM21 AS SPECODE21, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM22 AS SPECODE22, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM31 AS SPECODE31, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM32 AS SPECODE32, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM41 AS SPECODE41, OZEL_KOD1_SECIM42 AS SPECODE42 FROM TBLSFATUPRM
SELECT ULKEKODU AS COUNTRYCODE, SEHIRKODU AS CITYCODE, ILCEKODU AS TOWNCODE, ILCEADI AS TOWNNAME FROM NETSIS..ILCESABIT

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY BARKOD) AS RowNum FROM ( (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, ST.BARKOD1 AS BARKOD, ST.YAPKOD AS VARIANTCODE, ST.YAPKOD, ST.ISLETME_KODU, ST.SUBE_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU) UNION (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, ST.BARKOD2 AS BARKOD, ST.YAPKOD AS VARIANTCODE, ST.YAPKOD, ST.ISLETME_KODU, ST.SUBE_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU) UNION (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, ST.BARKOD3 AS BARKOD, ST.YAPKOD AS VARIANTCODE, ST.YAPKOD, ST.ISLETME_KODU, ST.SUBE_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SEK.KAYITTARIHI,SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE, SEK.KAYITTARIHI, SEK.DUZELTMETARIHI FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBLSTSABITEK SEK WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU=SEK.STOK_KODU) UNION (SELECT ST.STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, ST.STOK_KODU, SB.BARKOD, SB.YAPKOD AS VARIANTCODE, SB.YAPKOD, ST.ISLETME_KODU, ST.SUBE_KODU, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(SB.BARTARIH,NULL) AS CMDATE, SB.BARTARIH AS KAYITTARIHI, NULL AS DUZELTMETARIHI FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTOKBAR SB WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = SB.STOK_KODU) ) AS TMP WHERE BARKOD <> \'\' AND STOK_KODU <> \'KONFIG\' AND STOK_KODU NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT KOLISTOK_KODU FROM TBLSTOKKOLI WITH(NOLOCK)) AND STOK_KODU NOT IN (SELECT KOD FROM TBLKODHARICHAR WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TABLENAME = \'TBLSTSABIT\' AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d ) AND ((ISLETME_KODU = %1$d AND SUBE_KODU = -1) OR (ISLETME_KODU = %1$d AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d) OR ISLETME_KODU = -1) %3$s %4$s ) AS R

SELECT US.USERID, US.USERNAME, US.FNAME, US.LNAME FROM WOR_USERS US WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER PLS WITH(NOLOCK) ON PLS.PLASIYER_KODU = US.CODE WHERE ISLETME_KODU = %1$d AND SUBE_KODU = %2$d AND (\'\' = \'%3$s\' OR PLS.PLASIYER_KODU BETWEEN \'%4$s\' AND \'%5$s\') AND (\'\' = \'%6$s\' OR US.SPECODE IN(%7$s)) AND (\'\' = \'%8$s\' OR US.USERNAME LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.FNAME LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.LNAME LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.GROUPCODE LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\' OR US.SPECODE LIKE N\'%%%8$s%%\') AND US.USERID<>%9$d

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ST.STOK_KODU,B.YAPKOD) AS RowNum, ST.STOK_KODU, B.YAPKOD CODE, ISNULL(NULLIF(DBO.NSF_YAPACIK(B.YAPKOD,STOKPARAM.C_YEDEK8,B.YAPACIK), \'\'), B.YAPACIK) NAME, CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), B.GECBASTAR,112) AS INT) [STARTDATE], CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), B.GECBITTAR,112) AS INT) [ENDDATE], dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(B.KAYITTARIHI,B.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLSTSABIT ST WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLESNYAPMAS B WITH (NOLOCK) ON (ST.STOK_KODU = B.YPLNDRSTOKKOD) INNER JOIN TBLSTOKPARAM STOKPARAM WITH(NOLOCK) ON STOKPARAM.ISLETME_KODU = B.ISLETME_KODU AND (STOKPARAM.ISLETME_KODU IS NOT NULL) WHERE ST.KILIT = \'H\' AND ISNULL(ST.YAPILANDIR, \'H\') = \'E\' AND ST.STOK_KODU <> \'KONFIG\' AND ST.KILIT = \'H\' AND ISNULL(ST.YAPILANDIR, \'H\') = \'E\' AND ((B.ISLETME_KODU = %1$d AND B.SUBE_KODU = -1) OR (B.ISLETME_KODU = %1$d AND B.SUBE_KODU = %2$d) OR B.ISLETME_KODU = -1) %3$s %4$s %5$s ) AS R

( SELECT YPLNDRSTOKKOD STOK_KODU, YPLNDRSTOKKOD ITEMCODE, ESNFIYAT.STOK_ADI, (SUM(ESNFIYAT.%3$s) + STOKFIAT.%3$s) PRICE, 2 PTYPE, ESNFIYAT.UNITCODE, 1 AS UNITCONVERT, ESNFIYAT.CMDATE, STOKFIAT.FIYATDOVIZTIPI FIATDOVTIP, \'%1$s\' AS PRICECODE, \'%1$s\' AS DEFINITION_, %2$d AS PRIORITY, CONVERT(VARCHAR, ESNFIYAT.BASTAR, 112) [BEGDATE], CONVERT(VARCHAR, ESNFIYAT.BITTAR, 112) [ENDDATE], ISNULL(ESNFIYAT.FIYATGRUBU, \'\') GRPCODE ,ESNFIYAT.YAPKOD VARIANTCODE FROM ( SELECT A_S, YPLNDRSTOKKOD, ESNYAPMAS.YAPKOD, ST.STOK_ADI, OZKOD, DEGERKOD, %3$s, TBLESNOZFIY.BASTAR, TBLESNOZFIY.BITTAR, ISNULL(FIYATGRUBU, \'\') FIYATGRUBU, FIAT_BIRIMI AS UNITCODE, dbo.GetWebOrderDateInt(TBLESNOZFIY.KAYITTARIHI, TBLESNOZFIY.DUZELTMETARIHI) AS CMDATE FROM TBLESNYAPTRA ESNYAPTRA WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLESNYAPMAS ESNYAPMAS WITH(NOLOCK) ON ESNYAPTRA.YAPKOD = ESNYAPMAS.YAPKOD INNER JOIN TBLESNOZFIY WITH(NOLOCK) ON(TBLESNOZFIY.STOK_KODU = ESNYAPMAS.YPLNDRSTOKKOD AND TBLESNOZFIY.OZTRADEGKOD = ESNYAPTRA.DEGERKOD AND TBLESNOZFIY.OZMASKOD = ESNYAPTRA.OZKOD) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = TBLESNOZFIY.STOK_KODU ) ESNFIYAT LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLSTOKFIAT STOKFIAT WITH(NOLOCK) ON(STOKFIAT.STOKKODU = ESNFIYAT.YPLNDRSTOKKOD AND ISNULL(ESNFIYAT.FIYATGRUBU, \'\') = ISNULL(STOKFIAT.FIYATGRUBU, \'\') AND STOKFIAT.A_S = ESNFIYAT.A_S) WHERE STOKFIAT.FIYAT1 IS NOT NULL AND STOKFIAT.FIYAT2 IS NOT NULL AND STOKFIAT.FIYAT3 IS NOT NULL AND STOKFIAT.FIYAT4 IS NOT NULL AND ESNFIYAT.A_S = \'S\' AND ((STOKFIAT.ISLETME_KODU=%5$d AND STOKFIAT.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (STOKFIAT.ISLETME_KODU=%5$d AND STOKFIAT.SUBE_KODU=%6$d) OR STOKFIAT.ISLETME_KODU=-1) %4$s AND STOKFIAT.BASTAR IN ( SELECT MAX(BASTAR) FROM TBLSTOKFIAT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOKKODU = ESNFIYAT.YPLNDRSTOKKOD AND BASTAR <= GETDATE() AND ((BITTAR IS NULL) OR (BITTAR >= GETDATE())) AND (A_S = \'S\') GROUP BY A_S, FIYATGRUBU ) AND ESNFIYAT.BASTAR <= GETDATE() AND ((ESNFIYAT.BITTAR IS NULL) OR (ESNFIYAT.BITTAR >= GETDATE())) %7$s GROUP BY ESNFIYAT.A_S, YPLNDRSTOKKOD, ESNFIYAT.FIYATGRUBU, ESNFIYAT.YAPKOD, STOKFIAT.%3$s, ESNFIYAT.BASTAR, ESNFIYAT.BITTAR, FIYATDOVIZTIPI, ESNFIYAT.STOK_ADI, ESNFIYAT.UNITCODE, STOKFIAT.FIYATDOVIZTIPI, ESNFIYAT.CMDATE )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DEPO_KODU, DEPO_ISMI WAREHOUSE, STOK_KODU AS ITEMCODE, (TOTAL_GIRIS - TOTAL_CIKIS) AS REALSTOCK, (TOTAL_GIRIS - TOTAL_CIKIS) AS ACTUALSTOCK, YAPKOD VARIANTCODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY DEPO_KODU, STOK_KODU, YAPKOD) AS RowNum FROM ( SELECT PH.DEPO_KODU, DP.DEPO_ISMI, PH.STOK_KODU, PH.YAPKOD, SUM(PH.TOP_GIRIS_MIK) AS TOTAL_GIRIS, SUM(PH.TOP_CIKIS_MIK) AS TOTAL_CIKIS FROM TBLSTOKPH PH WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBLSTSABIT ST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ST.STOK_KODU = PH.STOK_KODU INNER JOIN TBLESNYAPMAS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON(B.YPLNDRSTOKKOD = PH.STOK_KODU AND B.YAPKOD = PH.YAPKOD) LEFT JOIN TBLSTOKDP DP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PH.DEPO_KODU = DP.DEPO_KODU WHERE PH.SUBE_KODU = %1$s AND ISNULL(ST.YAPILANDIR, \'H\') = \'E\' AND PH.YAPKOD IS NOT NULL %2$s GROUP BY PH.DEPO_KODU, DP.DEPO_ISMI, PH.STOK_KODU, PH.YAPKOD ) AS TMP ) AS R

SELECT * FROM( SELECT DEPO_KODU AS LOGICALREF, DEPO_KODU AS NR, DEPO_KODU AS CODE, EKSIBAKIYE, C_YEDEK2, CONVERT(varchar(15), DEPO_KODU) + + \' - \' + DEPO_ISMI AS NAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY DEPO_KODU) AS ROWNUM FROM TBLSTOKDP WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SUBE_KODU=%1$d %2$S ) AS R

SELECT U.WEIGHT, U.WIDTH, U.LENGTH, U.HEIGHT, (U.WIDTH * U.LENGTH * U.HEIGHT) AS VOLUME FROM INVOICEDETAIL I INNER JOIN INVOICE T ON I.SALESFICHEID = T.LOGICALREF INNER JOIN ITEMUNITS U ON I.UNITCODE = U.CODE AND I.ITEMCODE = U.ITEMCODE WHERE T.FICHENO=? AND I.LINENR=?

SELECT CL.CARI_KOD, CL.CARI_ISIM, 0 AS CREDIT, 0 AS DEBIT, 0 AS BALANCE, CL.CARI_IL, CL.CARI_ILCE, CL.VERGI_NUMARASI, CL.POSTAKODU, CL.ULKE_KODU, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CL.CARI_KOD) AS LOGICALREF FROM TBLCASABIT CL WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ((CL.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=-1) OR (CL.ISLETME_KODU=%1$d AND CL.SUBE_KODU=%2$d) OR CL.ISLETME_KODU=-1) %3$s ORDER BY CL.CARI_KOD

SELECT X.* FROM (SELECT -999 AS WAREHOUSEREF) AS dummy CROSS APPLY ( SELECT U.USERID, U.CODE, U.TYPE, F.PERIODNR, F.FIRMNR, U.USERROLEID, U.GROUPCODE, U.DOSHIP, (SELECT (CASE WHEN (SELECT W.VALUE [K] FROM WOR_PARAMUSER W WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE W.UserId = %1$d AND W.ParameterId = \'196\') = \'True\' THEN (SELECT [PARAMVALUE] = 1 WHERE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),GETDATE(),114) NOT BETWEEN (SELECT A.VALUE [X] FROM WOR_PARAMUSER A WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE A.UserId =%1$d AND A.ParameterId = \'194\') AND (SELECT B.VALUE [Y] FROM WOR_PARAMUSER B WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE B.UserId =%1$d AND B.ParameterId = \'195\')) END)) [WORKTIME], U.PASSWORD, U.USERNAME, (U.FNAME + \' \' +U.LNAME) AS [NAME], L.ADI [FIRMNAME], U.USERID [SALESPERSONREF], LUSR.KULLANICI_NO AS LOGONR, LUSR.SSOUSERID AS LOGOLOGICALREF, \'\' as DBNAME, LUSR.KULLANICI_ISIM AS LOGOUSERNAME, U.EMAIL ,ISNULL(WAREHOUSEREF,-999) WAREHOUSEREF ,ISNULL(WAREHOUSEREF, -999) WAREHOUSENR, (SELECT REVISION FROM WOR_VERSION WITH (NOLOCK)) PANELVERSION FROM WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN WOR_USERFIRMS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON U.USERID=F.USERID LEFT JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER SL WITH (NOLOCK) ON SL.PLASIYER_KODU=U.CODE LEFT JOIN TBLKULLANP LUSR WITH (NOLOCK) ON LUSR.KULLANICI_ISIM = U.LOGOUSER LEFT JOIN TBLISLETMELER L WITH (NOLOCK) ON L.ISLETME_KODU=F.FIRMNR WHERE U.APPTYPE=1 AND U.USERNAME=\'%2$s\' AND F.FIRMNR=%3$d AND U.PASSWORD=\'%4$s\') AS X;

AND (SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU LIKE \'%3$s%%\' OR CASABIT.CARI_ISIM LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR CASABIT.CARI_ISIM LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR CASABIT.CARI_ISIM LIKE \'%3$s%%\' OR CASABIT.CARI_KOD LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR CASABIT.CARI_KOD LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR CASABIT.CARI_KOD LIKE \'%3$s%%\' OR SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\') \n

SELECT U.WEIGHT, U.WIDTH, U.LENGTH, U.HEIGHT, (U.WIDTH * U.LENGTH * U.HEIGHT) AS VOLUME FROM ORDERDETAIL O INNER JOIN ORDERS F ON O.SALESFICHEID = F.LOGICALREF INNER JOIN ITEMUNITS U ON O.UNITCODE = U.CODE AND O.ITEMCODE = U.ITEMCODE WHERE F.FICHENO=? AND O.LINENR=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,DEFINITION_ AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM BANKACCOUNTS WHERE BANKCODE=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,KASA AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM USERCASE WHERE CODE=?

SELECT IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ORDSENDEMAILADDR,\';\'),\'\') AS ORDSENDEMAILADDR, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DSPSENDEMAILADDR,\';\'),\'\') AS DSPSENDEMAILADDR, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(INVSENDEMAILADDR,\';\'),\'\') AS INVSENDEMAILADDR, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(EXTSENDEMAILADDR,\';\'),\'\') AS EXTSENDEMAILADDR FROM ( SELECT CLCODE, CASE WHEN (INSTR(PROCESSTYPE,\'A\')> 0) THEN EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS ORDSENDEMAILADDR, CASE WHEN (INSTR(PROCESSTYPE,\'B\')> 0) THEN EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS DSPSENDEMAILADDR, CASE WHEN (INSTR(PROCESSTYPE,\'C\')> 0) THEN EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS INVSENDEMAILADDR, CASE WHEN (INSTR(PROCESSTYPE,\'J\')> 0) THEN EMAIL ELSE NULL END AS EXTSENDEMAILADDR FROM CLCARDINCHARGE WHERE CLCODE = \'%1$s\' )

INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM( SELECT ISSLCTUNIT, LINENO_, 0 AS UNITREF,ITEMCODE FROM DEFORDERDETAIL WHERE DEFORDERID=%1$d AND LINETYPE=%4$d UNION SELECT 0 AS ISSLCTUNIT , 0 AS LINENO_ , 0 AS UNITREF , CODE AS ITEMCODE FROM %2$s WHERE LOGICALREF IN (%3$s)) ) AS W ON(W.ITEMCODE=I.CODE)

SELECT O.LOGICALREF AS REF,1 TYPE, O.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, O.SPECODE AS SPE, O.DESC1 AS DESC, O.FICHEDATE AS SDATE , O.FICHENO, O.DOCTRACINGNR , O.STATUS, O.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, S.CODE AS SHIPCODE, S.NAME AS SHIPNAME, P.ODEMEPLAN AS PAYPLAN , O.ISTRANSFER, O.ISEDIT, O.CANCELLED, O.FICHESTATUS, O.EDOCSTATUS, O.ERPINVOICETYPE, \'\' AS ORDERFICHESTATUS, O.SALESTYPE FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = O.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE WHERE O.ORDERTYPE=1 AND O.FACT!=1

SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS REF,2 TYPE, I.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, I.SPECODE AS SPE, I.DESC1 AS DESC, I.FICHEDATE AS SDATE, I.FICHENO, I.DOCTRACINGNR , I.FACTNR AS STATUS, I.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, S.CODE AS SHIPCODE, S.NAME AS SHIPNAME, P.ODEMEPLAN AS PAYPLAN , I.ISTRANSFER, I.ISEDIT, I.CANCELLED, I.FICHESTATUS, I.EDOCSTATUS, I.ERPINVOICETYPE, \'\' AS ORDERFICHESTATUS, I.SALESTYPE FROM INVOICE I LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.CODE=I.PAYMENTCODE WHERE

SELECT O.LOGICALREF AS REF,1 TYPE, O.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, O.SPECODE AS SPE, O.DESC1 AS DESC, O.FICHEDATE AS SDATE , O.FICHENO, O.DOCTRACINGNR , O.STATUS, O.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, S.CODE AS SHIPCODE, S.NAME AS SHIPNAME, P.ODEMEPLAN AS PAYPLAN , O.ISTRANSFER, O.ISEDIT, O.CANCELLED, O.FICHESTATUS, O.EDOCSTATUS, O.ERPINVOICETYPE, O.ORDERFICHESTATUS, O.SALESTYPE FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = O.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE WHERE O.ORDERTYPE=0 AND O.FACT!=1

SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS REF,10 TYPE, I.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, I.SPECODE AS SPE, I.DESC1 AS DESC, I.FICHEDATE AS SDATE, I.FICHENO, I.DOCTRACINGNR , I.FACTNR AS STATUS, I.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, \'\' AS PAYPLAN , I.ISTRANSFER, I.ISEDIT, I.CANCELLED, I.FICHESTATUS, I.EDOCSTATUS, I.ERPINVOICETYPE ,W.AMBAR AS SHIPCODE, \'\' AS SHIPNAME, \'\' AS ORDERFICHESTATUS, I.SALESTYPE FROM WHTRANSFER I LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.NR=I.WAREHOUSENR WHERE I.FACT!=1
SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF, I.CODE , I.NAME, U.VARIANTCODE AS VARIANT FROM ITEMS I LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE U ON I.CODE=U.ITEMCODE WHERE BARCODE= \'%1$s\' OR I.CODE = \'%1$s\'

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'BIREBIR\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 2 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS FICHEDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, IFNULL(CC.FICHENO , \'\') AS FICHEREF, TOTAL, 2 AS FTYPE , DESC AS DESC1 FROM CASECASH AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE WHERE 1=1

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, B.ISYERI , D.BOLUM , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, PRO.PROJE, UC.KASA AS KASA FROM CASECASH O LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.CODE=O.CLCODE LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN USERCASE UC ON UC.CODE=O.CASECODE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT GDATE AS FICHEDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, IFNULL(CC.FICHENO , \'\') AS FICHEREF, TOTAL, FTYPE , DESC1 FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE WHERE 1=1

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, B.ISYERI , D.BOLUM , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, PRO.PROJE, BS.DEFINITION_ AS BANKDEF, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKACCDEF, CA.AGGREEMENT AS AGGREEMENT FROM CASHCREDIT O LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.CODE=O.CLCODE LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN BANKS AS BS ON O.BANKCODE = BS.CODE LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA ON BA.CODE = O.BANKACCCODE LEFT JOIN CREDITAGGR AS CA ON CA.CODE=O.AGGRCODE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? AND O.FTYPE=?

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, PAY.ODEMEPLAN AS ODEMEPLAN FROM CASHCREDITDETAIL O LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN PAYMENT PAY ON PAY.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'CEK\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 0 %1$s ORDER BY CQ.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS FICHEDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, IFNULL(CC.FICHENO , \'\') AS FICHEREF, TOTAL, FTYPE , DESC1 FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE WHERE 1=1

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, B.ISYERI , D.BOLUM , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, PRO.PROJE FROM CHEQUEDEED O LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.CODE=O.CLCODE LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? AND O.FTYPE=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, B.DEFINITION_ AS BANKNAME, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CREDIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN BANKS AS B ON CC.BANKCODE = B.CODE LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA ON BA.CODE = CC.BANKACCCODE WHERE B.CODE = BA.BANKCODE AND FTYPE = 1 %1$s ORDER BY CC.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT DISTINCT(FTYPE) AS FTYPE FROM ( SELECT 0 AS FTYPE FROM ORDERS WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS FTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS FTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS FTYPE FROM CASECASH WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS FTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS FTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 11 AS FTYPE FROM VISITINFO WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' UNION ALL SELECT 12 AS FTYPE FROM USERMAINPENETRATION WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLIENTCODE = \'%1$s\' UNION ALL SELECT 13 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 14 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 1 )

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'FATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 1 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s %2$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE,S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'IRSALIYE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 0 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s %2$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT U.CODE || \'(\' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' : \' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' )\' AS UNITCODE ,U.LOGICALREF ,U.CODE ,U.CONVFACT1 ,U.CONVFACT2 ,U.LINENR ,(U.WIDTH * U.LENGTH * U.HEIGHT) AS NETVOLUME ,U.GROSSVOLUME AS GROSSVOLUME ,U.WEIGHT AS NETWEIGHT ,U.GROSSWEIGHT AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM ITEMUNITS U WHERE U.ITEMCODE=@itemCode ORDER BY U.SALESPRIORITY, U.LINENR

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL, NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASECASH AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C WHERE CC.CLCODE = C.CODE %1$s ORDER BY CC.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASH\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE WHERE 1=1 %1$s ORDER BY CC.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, O.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, O.LOGICALREF, O.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'ORDER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM ORDERS AS O JOIN CLCARD AS C ON O.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = O.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON O.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE O.FACT!=1 %1$s ORDER BY O.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT U.*, P.ITEMCODE AS PRODUCTCODE , P.ITEMNAME AS PRODUCTNAME , P.SEQUENCE AS PUNIT, P.PER_PRICE , P.PER_NOTE , P.PER_PIC FROM USERPENETRATION U LEFT JOIN PENETRATIONDETAIL P ON U.PNTDETID=P.LOGICALREF WHERE U.PENETFICHEID=?
SELECT U.*, P.PDEFINITION FROM USERMAINPENETRATION U LEFT JOIN PENETRATION P ON U.PENETRATION_ID=P.LOGICALREF WHERE CLIENTCODE=\'%1$s\' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT %2$d OFFSET %3$d

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'PERAKENDEFATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 3 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s %2$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT DISTINCT P.LOGICALREF AS _id, P.PRICE, P.INCVAT, P.CURCODE, P.CURNR, P.CPRICE || \' ( \' || U.CODE || \' ) \' || CASE WHEN LENGTH(IFNULL(P.DEFINITION_, \'\')) > 0 THEN \' - \' || P.DEFINITION_ ELSE \'\' END AS UPRICE, P.UNITCONVERT, C.RATE, U.CONVFACT1, U.CONVFACT2, P.VARIANTCODE FROM ITEMPRICE P INNER JOIN ITEMS I ON I.CODE=P.ITEMCODE INNER JOIN %1$s U ON U.LINENR=P.UNITCODE AND U.ITEMCODE=P.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN CURR C ON C.CURRCODE=P.CURCODE AND C.DATE_=%2$d LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.CODE=P.CLIENTCODE WHERE I.LOGICALREF=? AND ( CL.LOGICALREF=? OR P.CLIENTCODE=\'\') AND P.PTYPE=? AND ((U.LINENR=?) OR (P.UNITCONVERT=1)) AND (P.PAYPLANREF=? OR P.PAYPLANREF=0) AND (P.TRADINGGRP=? OR P.TRADINGGRP=\'\') AND (P.CLTRADINGGRP=? OR P.CLTRADINGGRP=\'\') %3$s GROUP BY P.LOGICALREF ORDER BY CAST(P.PRIORITY AS INTEGER), _id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT P.LOGICALREF AS _id, P.PRICE, P.INCVAT, P.CURCODE, P.CURNR, P.CPRICE || \' ( \' || U.CODE || \' ) \' AS UPRICE, P.UNITCONVERT, C.RATE, U.CONVFACT1, U.CONVFACT2 FROM ITEMPRICE P INNER JOIN ITEMS I ON I.CODE=P.ITEMCODE INNER JOIN ITEMUNITS U ON U.LINENR=P.UNITCODE AND U.ITEMCODE=P.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN CURR C ON C.CURRCODE=P.CURCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.CODE=P.CLIENTCODE WHERE I.LOGICALREF=? AND P.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT _id , TMP.ITEMCODE as ITEMCODE , TRACKTYPE , ISVARYANT , VAT , CARDTYPE , CPRICE , RATE , CURNR , PRICE , INCVAT , PRICEREF , CURCODE , UNITCONVERT , ITEMIMAGE , IFNULL(SUM(STC.REALSTOCK),0) AS REALSTOCK , IFNULL(SUM(STC.ONHAND),0) AS ACTUALSTOCK , SERVICE , ISBARCODE , BUNITREF , BARCODE , DEFINITION , IMAGEINC , VARIANTCODE , VARIANTREF , VARIANTNAME , ADDTAXREF , LOCTRACKING , RETAILVAT , RETAILRETURNVAT , 0 PAYMENTREF , \'\' PAYMENTCODE , \'\' PAYMENTDEF , TAG %2$s %13$s %15$s FROM ( SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS _id , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.TRACKTYPE , I.ISVARYANT , %16$s , I.CARDTYPE , PRC.CPRICE AS CPRICE , CC.RATE AS RATE , PRC.CURNR AS CURNR , PRC.PRICE AS PRICE , PRC.INCVAT AS INCVAT , PRC.LOGICALREF AS PRICEREF , PRC.CURCODE , PRC.UNITCONVERT , IMG.ITEMIMAGE , PRC.VARIANTCODE , PRC.VARIANTNAME , 0 AS SERVICE , IFNULL(B.BARCODE,\'\')= CASE WHEN B.BARCODE IN (%10$s) THEN B.BARCODE ELSE 0 END AS ISBARCODE , B.ID AS BUNITREF , B.BARCODE , %1$s AS DEFINITION , I.IMAGEINC , IFNULL(PRC.VARIANTCODE , \'\') VARIANTCODE , IFNULL(PRC.VARIANTREF,-1) VARIANTREF , 0 AS ADDTAXREF , 0 AS LOCTRACKING , I.RETAILVAT , I.RETAILRETURNVAT , T.TAG %3$s %12$s %14$s FROM ITEMS I LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE B ON B.ITEMCODE=I.CODE LEFT JOIN ITEMTAGS T ON T.ITEMCODE = I.CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT PRICE AS PRICE , ITM.LOGICALREF , ITM.ITEMCODE , ITM.INCVAT , ITM.CPRICE , ITM.PRIORITY , ITM.CURNR , ITM.TRADINGGRP , ITM.CURCODE , ITM.UNITCONVERT , ITM.VARIANTCODE , VAR.LOGICALREF VARIANTREF , VAR.NAME VARIANTNAME FROM ITEMPRICE ITM LEFT JOIN VARIANTS VAR ON ITM.VARIANTCODE = VAR.CODE AND ITM.VARIANTCODE = VAR.CODE INNER JOIN (SELECT ITEMCODE, min(PRIORITY) PRIORITY FROM ITEMPRICE GROUP BY ITEMCODE) AS PRI ON ITM.ITEMCODE = PRI.ITEMCODE AND ITM.PRIORITY = PRI.PRIORITY %4$s ) AS PRC ON ( PRC.ITEMCODE = I.CODE ) LEFT JOIN CURR CC ON CC.CURRTYPE = PRC.CURNR AND DATE_ = %5$d LEFT JOIN ITEMIMAGES IMG ON IMG.CODE=I.CODE %6$s WHERE 1=1 %8$s GROUP BY I.CODE %11$s ) AS TMP LEFT JOIN ITEMSTOCK STC ON STC.ITEMCODE = TMP.ITEMCODE %7$s GROUP BY _id %9$s
(I.CODE LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\' OR I.CODE LIKE \'%%%2$s%%\' OR I.CODE LIKE \'%%%3$s%%\' )
(I.CODE LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR I.CODE LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR I.CODE LIKE \'%3$s%%\' )

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, I.NAME AS ITEMNAME , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF , I.CARDTYPE , I.TRACKTYPE , U.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UCODE , U.CODE AS UUCODE, US.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( US.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( US.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS USCODE , US.CODE AS UUSCODE, P.ODEMEPLAN , S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, V.NAME AS VNAME, %3$s, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, BARCODECOUNT, U.WEIGHT, U.GROSSWEIGHT, (U.WIDTH * U.LENGTH * U.HEIGHT) AS VOLUME, U.WIDTH, U.LENGTH, U.HEIGHT FROM INVOICEDETAIL O LEFT OUTER JOIN %1$s I ON I.CODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s U ON U.CODE=O.UNITCODE AND U.ITEMCODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s US ON US.CODE=O.UNITCODE2 AND US.ITEMCODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN PAYMENT P ON (P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE AND P.CODE!=\'\') LEFT OUTER JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VARIANTS V ON V.CODE=O.VARIANTCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? GROUP BY O.LOGICALREF

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, W.AMBAR , RW.AMBAR AS IADEAMBAR, B.ISYERI , F.FABRIKA , D.BOLUM , P.ODEMEPLAN , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, C.DEFINITION_ AS TITLE, SHP.ADDRESS AS SHPADD, SPAGNT.LOGICALREF AS SHPREF, SHPTP.CODE AS SHPCODE, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, PRO.PROJE, CBN.CODE AS CBNCODE, CBN.CODE || \' - \' || CBN.MODEL AS CBNNAME, ED.PLATE, ED.CARRIERTAXNR, ED.CARRIERNAME, ED.CARRIERCOUNTY, ED.CARRIERCITY, ED.CARRIERCOUNTRY, ED.CARRIERPOSTCODE, ED.FIRSTDRIVERNAME, ED.FIRSTDRIVERLASTNAME, ED.FIRSTDRIVERDESCRIPTION, ED.FIRSTDRIVERIDENTITYNR, ED.FIRSTTRAILERPLATE FROM INVOICE O LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.LOGICALREF=O.WAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE RW ON RW.LOGICALREF=O.RETURNWAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN FACTORY F ON F.NR=O.FACTNR LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON (P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE AND P.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON (C.CODE=O.SHIPACCCODE AND C.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.CODE=O.CLCODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SHP ON (SHP.CODE=O.SHIPADDRCODE AND SHP.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SPAGNT ON SPAGNT.CODE=O.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN SHIPTYPE SHPTP ON SHPTP.CODE = O.SHIPTYPE LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON (PRO.CODE=O.PROJECTCODE AND PRO.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN CABIN CBN ON CBN.ID=O.CABINREF LEFT JOIN EDESPATCHADDITIONALINFO ED ON ED.SALESFICHEID = O.LOGICALREF AND ED.SALESTYPE = O.SALESTYPE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, I.NAME AS ITEMNAME , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF , I.CARDTYPE , I.TRACKTYPE , U.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UCODE , U.CODE AS UUCODE, US.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( US.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( US.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS USCODE , US.CODE AS UUSCODE, P.ODEMEPLAN , S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, V.NAME AS VNAME, %3$s, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, BARCODECOUNT, U.WEIGHT, U.GROSSWEIGHT, (U.WIDTH * U.LENGTH * U.HEIGHT) AS VOLUME, U.WIDTH, U.LENGTH, U.HEIGHT FROM ORDERDETAIL O LEFT OUTER JOIN %1$s I ON I.CODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s U ON U.CODE=O.UNITCODE AND U.ITEMCODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s US ON US.CODE=O.UNITCODE2 AND US.ITEMCODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN PAYMENT P ON (P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE AND P.CODE!=\'\') LEFT OUTER JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VARIANTS V ON V.CODE=O.VARIANTCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? GROUP BY O.LOGICALREF

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, W.AMBAR , B.ISYERI , F.FABRIKA , D.BOLUM , P.ODEMEPLAN , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, C.DEFINITION_ AS TITLE, SHP.ADDRESS AS SHPADD, SPAGNT.LOGICALREF AS SHPREF, SHPTP.CODE AS SHPCODE, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, PRO.PROJE FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.LOGICALREF=O.WAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN FACTORY F ON F.NR=O.FACTNR LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON (P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE AND P.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON (C.CODE=O.SHIPACCCODE AND C.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.CODE=O.CLCODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SHP ON (SHP.CODE=O.SHIPADDRCODE AND SHP.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SPAGNT ON SPAGNT.CODE=O.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN SHIPTYPE SHPTP ON SHPTP.CODE = O.SHIPTYPE LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON (PRO.CODE=O.PROJECTCODE AND PRO.CODE!=\'\') WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, I.NAME AS ITEMNAME , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF , I.CARDTYPE , I.TRACKTYPE , U.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UCODE , U.CODE AS UUCODE, US.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( US.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( US.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS USCODE , US.CODE AS UUSCODE, P.ODEMEPLAN , S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, V.NAME AS VNAME, %3$s, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5 FROM WHTRANSFERDETAIL O LEFT OUTER JOIN %1$s I ON I.CODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s U ON U.CODE=O.UNITCODE AND U.ITEMCODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s US ON US.CODE=O.UNITCODE2 AND US.ITEMCODE=O.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN PAYMENT P ON (P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE AND P.CODE!=\'\') LEFT OUTER JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VARIANTS V ON V.CODE=O.VARIANTCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? GROUP BY O.LOGICALREF

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, W.AMBAR , B.ISYERI , F.FABRIKA , D.BOLUM , P.ODEMEPLAN , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, C.DEFINITION_ AS TITLE, SHP.ADDRESS AS SHPADD, SPAGNT.LOGICALREF AS SHPREF, SHPTP.CODE AS SHPCODE, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, PRO.PROJE, CBN.CODE AS CBNCODE, CBN.CODE || \' - \' || CBN.MODEL AS CBNNAME, ED.PLATE, ED.CARRIERTAXNR, ED.CARRIERNAME, ED.CARRIERCOUNTY, ED.CARRIERCITY, ED.CARRIERCOUNTRY, ED.CARRIERPOSTCODE, ED.FIRSTDRIVERNAME, ED.FIRSTDRIVERLASTNAME, ED.FIRSTDRIVERDESCRIPTION, ED.FIRSTDRIVERIDENTITYNR, ED.FIRSTTRAILERPLATE FROM WHTRANSFER O LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.NR=O.WAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN FACTORY F ON F.NR=O.FACTNR LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON (P.CODE=O.PAYMENTCODE AND P.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON (C.CODE=O.SHIPACCCODE AND C.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.CODE=O.CLCODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SHP ON (SHP.CODE=O.SHIPADDRCODE AND SHP.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SPAGNT ON SPAGNT.CODE=O.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN SHIPTYPE SHPTP ON SHPTP.CODE = O.SHIPTYPE LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON (PRO.CODE=O.PROJECTCODE AND PRO.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN CABIN CBN ON CBN.ID=O.CABINREF LEFT JOIN EDESPATCHADDITIONALINFO ED ON ED.SALESFICHEID = O.LOGICALREF AND ED.SALESTYPE = O.SALESTYPE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'SENET\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 1 %1$s ORDER BY CQ.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT _id , ITEMCODE , TRACKTYPE , ISVARYANT , VAT , CARDTYPE , CPRICE , RATE , CURNR , PRICE , INCVAT , PRICEREF , CURCODE , UNITCONVERT , ITEMIMAGE , 1 AS REALSTOCK , 1 AS ACTUALSTOCK , SERVICE , ISBARCODE , BUNITREF , BARCODE , DEFINITION , IMAGEINC , \'\' AS VARIANTCODE , 0 VARIANTREF ,\'\' AS VARIANTNAME , ADDTAXREF , LOCTRACKING , RETAILVAT , RETAILRETURNVAT , 0 PAYMENTREF , \'\' PAYMENTCODE , \'\' PAYMENTDEF , TAG %2$s %12$s %14$s FROM ( SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS _id , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , 0 AS TRACKTYPE , 0 AS ISVARYANT , I.VAT , 4 AS CARDTYPE , PRC.CPRICE AS CPRICE , CC.RATE AS RATE , PRC.CURNR AS CURNR , PRC.PRICE AS PRICE , PRC.INCVAT AS INCVAT , PRC.LOGICALREF AS PRICEREF , PRC.CURCODE , PRC.UNITCONVERT , NULL AS ITEMIMAGE , 1 AS SERVICE , IFNULL(B.BARCODE,\'\')= CASE WHEN B.BARCODE IN (%9$s) THEN B.BARCODE ELSE 0 END AS ISBARCODE , B.ID AS BUNITREF , B.BARCODE , %1$s AS DEFINITION , 1 AS IMAGEINC , 0 AS ADDTAXREF , 0 AS LOCTRACKING , I.VAT AS RETAILVAT , I.VAT AS RETAILRETURNVAT , T.TAG %3$s %11$s %13$s FROM SERVICE I LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE B ON B.ITEMCODE=I.CODE LEFT JOIN ITEMTAGS T ON T.ITEMCODE = I.CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MIN(PRICE) AS PRICE , ITM.LOGICALREF , ITM.ITEMCODE , ITM.INCVAT , ITM.CPRICE , ITM.PRIORITY , ITM.CURNR , ITM.TRADINGGRP , ITM.CURCODE , ITM.UNITCONVERT , ITM.PTYPE FROM ITEMPRICE ITM %4$s ) AS PRC ON ( PRC.ITEMCODE = I.CODE ) LEFT JOIN CURR CC ON CC.CURRTYPE = PRC.CURNR AND DATE_ = %5$d %6$s WHERE 1=1 %7$s GROUP BY I.CODE %10$s ) AS TMP GROUP BY _id %8$s

SELECT U.CODE || \'(\' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' : \' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' )\' AS UNITCODE ,U.LOGICALREF ,U.CODE ,U.CONVFACT1 ,U.CONVFACT2 ,U.LINENR ,0 AS DIVUNIT ,(U.WIDTH * U.LENGTH * U.HEIGHT) AS NETVOLUME ,0 AS GROSSVOLUME ,U.WEIGHT AS NETWEIGHT ,0 AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM SERVICEUNITS U WHERE U.ITEMCODE=@itemCode ORDER BY U.PRIORITY, U.LINENR

SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , BEGDATE , ENDDATE , CLCODE , DESC_, PRIORITY AS PRI, NOTE AS INFO, \'TRUE\' AS ISTODO, STATUS AS STAT FROM TODOINFO WHERE (STATUS != 2 AND STATUS != 3) UNION SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , BEGDATE ,ENDDATE, LOGICALREF AS CLCODE , DEFINITION_ AS DESC_ ,TYPE AS PRI, NOTE AS INFO, \'FALSE\' AS ISTODO, \'9\' AS STAT FROM MARKETINGMESSAGE

SELECT V.VISITDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, V.REASON, V.NOTE, S.NAME AS SHIPADDRESS, V.ISTRANSFER, V.ID AS LOGICALREF, V.ID AS FICHEREF, 0.00 AS TOTAL, NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'VISIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM VISITINFO AS V JOIN CLCARD AS C ON V.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS AS S ON S.CODE = V.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE != \'\' ORDER BY LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT V.ID, V.REASON, V.NOTE, V.ISTRANSFER, V.VISITDATE, V.AUTO, C.CODE AS CLCODE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CLNAME, S.NAME AS SHIPADDRESS, S.CLCODE || \' \' || S.ADDR1 || \' \' || S.ADDR2 || \' \' || S.CITY AS EXPLANATION FROM VISITINFO V LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CLCODE = V.CLCODE) LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON (V.CLCODE = C.CODE) WHERE V.CLCODE=\'%1$s\' ORDER BY V.ID DESC LIMIT %2$d OFFSET %3$d

SELECT V.ID, V.REASON, V.NOTE, V.ISTRANSFER, V.VISITDATE, V.CLCODE, S.CODE, S.CODE || \' \' || S.ADDR1 || \' \' || S.ADDR2 || \' \' || S.CITY AS EXPLANATION FROM VISITINFO V LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = V.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') WHERE V.ID = %1$d

SELECT DISTINCT(FTYPE) AS FTYPE FROM ( SELECT 0 AS FTYPE FROM ORDERS WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 13 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 14 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND WAREHOUSENR = %1$s AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 1 )
SELECT 0 AS _id, %1$s AS CODE FROM GROUPCODES
SELECT P.LOGICALREF as _id ,P.ODEMEPLAN AS DEFINITION_, P.CODE FROM CLCARD C LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON C.PAYMENTCODE=P.CODE WHERE C.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT DISTINCT IT.CODE ITEMCODE, IFNULL(IU.CODE,\'\') UNITCODE, IFNULL(IU.CONVFACT1,\'\') CONVFACT1, IFNULL(IU.CONVFACT2,\'\') CONVFACT2, IFNULL(IU.CODE,\'\') || \' (\' || IFNULL(IU.CONVFACT1,\'\') || \':\' || IFNULL(IU.CONVFACT2,\'\') || \')\' UNITDESC, UB.BARCODE FROM ITEMUNITS IU LEFT JOIN ITEMS IT ON IT.CODE=IU.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE UB ON IU.ITEMCODE = UB.ITEMCODE WHERE IT.CODE = \'%1$s\' ORDER BY IU.LINENR ASC
INNER JOIN DEFORDERDETAIL W ON W.ITEMCODE=I.CODE AND W.DEFORDERID=%1$d AND W.LINETYPE=%2$d

SELECT UNT.LOGICALREF AS _id , UNT.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UNIT , UNT.CONVFACT1 , UNT.CONVFACT2 , UNT.CODE , 0 AS NETVOLUME , 0 AS GROSSVOLUME , 0 AS NETWEIGHT , 0 AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM SERVICEUNITS UNT INNER JOIN ITEMS I ON I.CODE=UNT.ITEMCODE WHERE I.LOGICALREF=? ORDER BY UNT.PRIORITY, UNT.LINENR

SELECT UNT.LOGICALREF AS _id , UNT.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UNIT , UNT.CONVFACT1 , UNT.CONVFACT2 , UNT.CODE , COALESCE((UNT.VOLUME / VOL.CONVFACT1) * VOL.CONVFACT2 / 1000 , 0.00 ) AS NETVOLUME , COALESCE((UNT.GROSSVOLUME / GRSVOL.CONVFACT1) * GRSVOL.CONVFACT2 / 1000 , 0.00) AS GROSSVOLUME , COALESCE((UNT.WEIGHT / WGT.CONVFACT1) * WGT.CONVFACT2, 0.00) AS NETWEIGHT , COALESCE((UNT.GROSSWEIGHT / GRSWGT.CONVFACT1) * GRSWGT.CONVFACT2, 0.00) AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM ITEMUNITS UNT INNER JOIN ITEMS I ON I.CODE=UNT.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN UNITS VOL ON VOL.LOGICALREF = UNT.VOLUMEREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GRSVOL ON GRSVOL.LOGICALREF = UNT.GROSSVOLREF LEFT JOIN UNITS WGT ON WGT.LOGICALREF = UNT.WEIGHTREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GRSWGT ON GRSWGT.LOGICALREF = UNT.GROSSWGHTREF WHERE I.LOGICALREF=? AND UNT.SALESCLAS=1 ORDER BY UNT.SALESPRIORITY, UNT.LINENR
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, NAME, CODE FROM VARIANTS WHERE ITEMCODE=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CLCODE AS CODE, NAME AS NAME FROM SHIPADDRESS WHERE LOGICALREF=?

SELECT VISITDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, REASON, NOTE, NAME AS SHIPADDRESS, V.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, ID AS LOGICALREF, ID AS FICHEREF, 0.00 AS TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'VISIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM VISITINFO AS V JOIN CLCARD AS C ON V.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS AS S WHERE (S.CODE = V.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, O.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, O.LOGICALREF, O.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'ORDER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM ORDERS AS O JOIN CLCARD AS C ON O.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON O.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE O.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE,S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'IRSALIYE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 0 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'FATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 1 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'BIREBIR\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 2 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'PERAKENDEFATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON (S.CODE = I.SHIPADDRCODE AND S.CODE!=\'\') LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTCODE = P.CODE WHERE FTYPE = 3 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASECASH AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C WHERE CC.CLCODE = C.CODE %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, B.DEFINITION_ AS BANKNAME, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASH\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN BANKS AS B ON CC.BANKREF = B.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA WHERE B.LOGICALREF = BA.BANKREF AND FTYPE = 0 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, B.DEFINITION_ AS BANKNAME, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CREDIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN BANKS AS B ON CC.BANKREF = B.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA WHERE B.LOGICALREF = BA.BANKREF AND FTYPE = 1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'SENET\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL, NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'CEK\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLCODE = C.CODE LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 0 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE ,WH.AMBAR AS CUSTOMERNAME ,\'\' AS CUSTOMERCODE ,NULL AS REASON ,NULL AS NOTE ,\'\' AS SHIPADDRESS ,W.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER ,W.LOGICALREF ,W.FICHEREF ,TOTAL ,NULL AS ODEMEPLAN ,NULL AS ORDERTYPE ,NULL AS FTYPE ,NULL AS BANKNAME ,NULL AS BANKBRANCH ,NULL AS ACCNO ,NULL AS DEBITED ,NULL AS DUEDATE ,\'WHTRANSFER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM WHTRANSFER AS W LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.NR = WAREHOUSENR WHERE W.FACT != 1 %1$s ORDER BY ITEMTYPE,LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT TOP 1 ISNULL(%4$s, \'\') AS MAXNO FROM %3$s WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE %4$s>=\'%1$s\' AND %4$s<=\'%2$s\' AND LEN(%4$s)=LEN(\'%2$S\') %5$s ORDER BY %4$s DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY SIPAMAS.TARIH DESC ) [RowNum], SIPAMAS.FATIRS_NO ,SIPAMAS.TARIH ,SIPAMAS.GENELTOPLAM AS TOTAL ,SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU ,CASABIT.CARI_ISIM ,SIPAMAS.CARI_KOD2 AS PLA_KODU ,SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU AS SLSCODE ,PLA.PLASIYER_ACIKLAMA AS SLSDEFINITION FROM TBLSIPAMAS SIPAMAS WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCASABIT CASABIT WITH (NOLOCK) ON CASABIT.CARI_KOD = SIPAMAS.CARI_KODU LEFT OUTER JOIN TBLCARIPLASIYER PLA WITH (NOLOCK) ON PLA.PLASIYER_KODU = SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU WHERE SIPAMAS.TIPI = 3 AND SIPAMAS.FTIRSIP = \'6\' AND SIPAMAS.SUBE_KODU =%1$d AND SIPAMAS.ISLETME_KODU = %2$d AND SIPAMAS.PLA_KODU IN (%3$s) %4$s %6$s ) AS R %5$s ORDER BY TARIH DESC, FATIRS_NO DESC
UPDATE TBLSIPATRA SET STHAR_HTUR=\'K\' WHERE FISNO = \'%1$s\' AND STHAR_ACIKLAMA = \'%2$s\' AND STHAR_FTIRSIP = \'6\' AND SUBE_KODU = %3$d;
UPDATE TBLSIPAMAS SET TIPI=%1$d WHERE FATIRS_NO IN (%2$s) AND FTIRSIP = \'6\' AND SUBE_KODU = %3$d AND ISLETME_KODU = %4$d;

SELECT SHIPINFO.LOGICALREF AS SHIPINFOREF, SHIPINFO.CODE AS SHIPINFOCODE, SHIPINFO.NAME AS SHIPINFONAME, DISTORD.GODATE, DISTORD.FICHENO, DISTORD.LOGICALREF AS DISTORDERREF, CLCARD.LOGICALREF AS CLIENTREF FROM %1$S DISTORD WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$S DISTORDLINE WITH (NOLOCK) ON (DISTORDLINE.DISTORDERREF = DISTORD.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %3$S ITMSC WITH (NOLOCK) ON (DISTORDLINE.ITEMREF = ITMSC.LOGICALREF) AND ((ITMSC.ACTIVE = 0) AND (ITMSC.LOGICALREF <> 0)) LEFT OUTER JOIN %4$S VARIANT WITH (NOLOCK) ON (ISNULL(DISTORDLINE.VARIANTREF, 0) = ISNULL(VARIANT.LOGICALREF, 0)) AND ((ISNULL(VARIANT.ACTIVE, 0) = 0) AND (ISNULL(VARIANT.LOGICALREF, 0) <> 0)) LEFT OUTER JOIN %5$S ITMUASGN WITH (NOLOCK) ON (DISTORDLINE.UOMREF = ITMUASGN.UNITLINEREF) AND (ITMUASGN.LOGICALREF <> 0) LEFT OUTER JOIN %6$S CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON (CLCARD.LOGICALREF = DISTORDLINE.CLIENTREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %7$S DISTVEHICL WITH (NOLOCK) ON (DISTORD.VEHICLEREF = DISTVEHICL.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %8$S SLSMC WITH (NOLOCK) ON (DISTORD.SALESMANREF = SLSMC.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %9$S ORFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) ON (DISTORDLINE.ORDLINEREF = ORFLINE.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %10$S ORFIHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON (ORFLINE.ORDFICHEREF = ORFIHE.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %11$S SHIPINFO WITH (NOLOCK) ON (ORFIHE.SHIPINFOREF = SHIPINFO.LOGICALREF) WHERE (DISTORD.STATUS = 1) AND (DISTVEHICL.LOGICALREF = %12$S) AND DISTORDLINE.CLIENTREF = %13$S AND (DISTORDLINE.REMAMOUNT > 0) GROUP BY SHIPINFO.LOGICALREF ,SHIPINFO.CODE ,SHIPINFO.NAME ,DISTORD.GODATE ,DISTORD.FICHENO, DISTORD.LOGICALREF, CLCARD.LOGICALREF

SELECT CLCARD.LOGICALREF AS CLIENTREF, CLCARD.CODE, CLCARD.DEFINITION_, CLCARD.DEFINITION2, DISTORD.GODATE, DISTORD.FICHENO, DISTORD.LOGICALREF AS DISTORDERREF FROM %1$S DISTORD WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$S DISTORDLINE WITH (NOLOCK) ON(DISTORDLINE.DISTORDERREF = DISTORD.LOGICALREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %3$S CLCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON(CLCARD.LOGICALREF = DISTORDLINE.CLIENTREF) LEFT OUTER JOIN %4$S DISTVEHICL WITH (NOLOCK) ON(DISTORD.VEHICLEREF = DISTVEHICL.LOGICALREF) WHERE(DISTORD.STATUS = 1) AND (DISTVEHICL.LOGICALREF = %5$S ) AND (DISTORD.STATUS IN(1)) AND (DISTORDLINE.REMAMOUNT > 0) GROUP BY CLCARD.LOGICALREF, CLCARD.CODE, CLCARD.DEFINITION_, CLCARD.DEFINITION2, DISTORD.GODATE, DISTORD.FICHENO, DISTORD.LOGICALREF

SELECT S.LOGICALREF, I.CODE AS CODE, U.CODE AS UNIT, CONVERT(VARCHAR, CAST(S.LINENET AS MONEY), 1) [NETTOTAL] , I.NAME, S.AMOUNT, S.PRICE, S.TOTAL, S.VATAMNT, S.LINETYPE, S.GLOBTRANS, D.CODE AS DCODE, S.DISCPER, S.LINENO_ FROM %1$S AS S WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN %2$S AS I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.LOGICALREF=S.STOCKREF LEFT JOIN %3$S AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.LOGICALREF=S.STOCKREF LEFT JOIN %4$S AS P WITH(NOLOCK) ON P.LOGICALREF=S.PAYDEFREF LEFT JOIN %5$S AS U WITH(NOLOCK) ON U.LOGICALREF=S.UOMREF LEFT JOIN %6$S AS ORF WITH(NOLOCK) ON ORF.LOGICALREF =S.ORDFICHEREF WHERE S.ORDFICHEREF=%7$d\n

AND (SL.CODE LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR SL.CODE LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR SL.CODE LIKE \'%3$s%%\' OR C.DEFINITION_ LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR C.DEFINITION_ LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR C.DEFINITION_ LIKE \'%3$s%%\' OR C.CODE LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR C.CODE LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR C.CODE LIKE \'%3$s%%\' OR O.FICHENO LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\') \n

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY O.LOGICALREF DESC ) [RowNum] , O.NETTOTAL AS TOTAL , O.TIME_ AS TIME , O.LOGICALREF , O.FICHENO , O.SPECODE , O.GENEXP1 , O.TRADINGGRP , O.DOCTRACKINGNR , O.DATE_ AS DATE , SL.CODE AS SLSCODE , SL.DEFINITION_ AS SLSDEFINITION , C.CODE AS CCODE , C.DEFINITION_ AS CNAME , C2.CODE AS CCODE2 , C2.DEFINITION_ AS CNAME2 , S.CODE AS SCODE , S.NAME AS SNAME , P.DEFINITION_ , O.SOURCEINDEX , O.FACTORYNR , O.BRANCH , O.DEPARTMENT FROM %1$S AS O WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN %2$S C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF = O.CLIENTREF INNER JOIN %3$S SL WITH (NOLOCK) ON SL.LOGICALREF = O.SALESMANREF LEFT JOIN %4$S C2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON C2.LOGICALREF = O.RECVREF LEFT JOIN %5$S S WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPINFOREF LEFT JOIN %6$S P WITH (NOLOCK) ON P.LOGICALREF= O.PAYDEFREF LEFT JOIN WOR_USERS US WITH(NOLOCK) ON SL.CODE=US.CODE WHERE O.STATUS = 1 AND O.TRCODE = 1 AND O.SALESMANREF IN (%7$S) %8$S %10$S GROUP BY O.NETTOTAL ,O.TIME_ ,O.LOGICALREF ,O.FICHENO ,O.SPECODE ,O.GENEXP1 ,O.TRADINGGRP ,O.DOCTRACKINGNR ,O.DATE_ ,SL.CODE ,SL.DEFINITION_ ,C.CODE ,C.DEFINITION_ ,C2.CODE ,C2.DEFINITION_ ,S.CODE ,S.NAME ,P.DEFINITION_ ,O.SOURCEINDEX ,O.FACTORYNR ,O.BRANCH ,O.DEPARTMENT ) R %9$S
UPDATE %1$S SET STATUS=%2$d WHERE ORDFICHEREF IN ( %3$S ) \n
UPDATE %1$S SET STATUS=%2$d WHERE LOGICALREF IN ( %3$S ) \n
