SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, AGGREEMENT AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM CREDITAGGR WHERE (BEGDATE <= ? AND ENDDATE >= ?)
SELECT C.BARCODE CABINBARCODE, C.ID CABINREF, C.CODE CABINCODE FROM CABIN C WHERE C.BARCODE = \'%1$s\' AND C.LOCINFO = 2 AND C.STATUS = 1 AND C.FIRM = \'%2$s\'
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,DEFINITION_ AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM BANKS
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,DEFINITION_ AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM BANKS WHERE LOGICALREF=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,DEFINITION_ AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM BANKACCOUNTS WHERE BANKREF=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,DEFINITION_ AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM BANKACCOUNTS WHERE LOGICALREF=?
SELECT NR AS _id, ISYERI AS CODE FROM BRANCH
SELECT NR AS _id, ISYERI AS CODE FROM BRANCH WHERE NR=?
SELECT ID AS _id, CODE, CODE || \' - \' || MODEL AS NAME FROM CABIN WHERE LOCINFO = 1 AND SALESMANREF <= 0 AND STATUS = 1 AND CLIENTCODE = ? AND FIRM = ?

SELECT C.BARCODE CABINBARCODE, C.ID CABINREF,CL.LOGICALREF CLREF , CL.CODE CLCODE FROM CABIN C INNER JOIN CLCARD CL ON C.CLIENTCODE = CL.CODE WHERE C.BARCODE = \'%1$s\' AND C.LOCINFO = 1 AND C.STATUS = 1 AND C.FIRM = \'%2$s\'
SELECT ID AS _id, CODE, CODE || \' - \' || MODEL AS NAME FROM CABIN WHERE ID=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,KASA AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM USERCASE
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id ,KASA AS NAME, CODE AS CODE FROM USERCASE WHERE LOGICALREF=?
SELECT 0 AS _id, CITYCODE AS CODE, CITYNAME AS NAME, COUNTRYCODE, LOGICALREF AS LOGICALREF FROM CITY WHERE COUNTRYCODE=?
SELECT CASE COUNTRYREF WHEN \'TR\' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PRIORITY, 0 AS _id, COUNTRYREF AS CODE, COUNTRYCODE AS COUNTRYCODE, COUNTRYNAME AS NAME FROM COUNTRY ORDER BY PRIORITY DESC
SELECT RATE FROM CURR WHERE CURRTYPE=@currType AND DATE_=@date
SELECT DATE_ FROM CURR WHERE DATE_=@date
SELECT ADDR1 ,ADDR2 , CITY , TOWN FROM CLCARD WHERE LOGICALREF=

Select 1 _id, TELCODES1 || TELNRS1 PHONE from CLCARD WHERE LOGICALREF = ? AND IFNULL(TELNRS1,\'\') <>\'\' UNION Select 2 _id, TELCODES2 || TELNRS2 PHONE from CLCARD WHERE LOGICALREF = ? AND IFNULL(TELNRS2,\'\') <>\'\'
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, %1$s AS CODE FROM SPECODES WHERE CODETYPE=2 AND SPECODETYPE=26

INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM( SELECT ISSLCTUNIT, LINENO_, UNITREF,ITEMREF FROM DEFORDERDETAIL WHERE DEFORDERID=%1$d AND LINETYPE=%4$d UNION SELECT 0 AS ISSLCTUNIT , 0 AS LINENO_ , 0 AS UNITREF , LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF FROM %2$s WHERE LOGICALREF IN (%3$s)) ) AS W ON(W.ITEMREF=I.LOGICALREF)
SELECT D.LOGICALREF AS _id, D.INDIRIM AS DISC, D.CODE FROM CLCARD C LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D ON C.CONDITIONCODE = D.CODE WHERE D.TYPE=0 AND C.LOGICALREF=?
DELETE FROM ORDERS WHERE SALESTYPE = 7; DELETE FROM ORDERDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =7;
DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =4; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =4;
DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =2; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =2; DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =8; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =8;

DELETE FROM CASHCREDITDETAIL WHERE CASHCREDITID = (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d AND ISTRANSFER = 0); DELETE FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d AND ISTRANSFER = 0; DELETE FROM CASECASH WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d AND ISTRANSFER = 0; DELETE FROM CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL WHERE CHEQUEDEEDID = (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d AND ISTRANSFER = 0); DELETE FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d AND ISTRANSFER = 0;
DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =6; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =6;
DELETE FROM ORDERS WHERE SALESTYPE = 1; DELETE FROM ORDERDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =1;
DELETE FROM USERMAINPENETRATION; DELETE FROM USERPENETRATION;
DELETE FROM CASECASH; DELETE FROM CASHCREDIT; DELETE FROM CASHCREDITDETAIL; DELETE FROM CHEQUEDEED; DELETE FROM CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL;
DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =5; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =5;
DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =3; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =3; DELETE FROM INVOICE WHERE SALESTYPE =9; DELETE FROM INVOICEDETAIL WHERE SALESTYPE =9;
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, INDIRIM AS DISC , CODE FROM DISCOUNT WHERE TYPE=?
SELECT DISTINCT 0 AS _id, SPECODE AS CODE FROM SPECODES WHERE %1$s=1 AND CODETYPE=1 AND SPECODETYPE=26
SELECT DISTINCT 0 AS _id, %1$s AS CODE FROM CLCARD WHERE %1$s IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(%1$s) > 0
SELECT DISTINCT 0 AS _id, %1$s AS CODE FROM CLCARD WHERE %1$s IS NOT NULL AND %1$s != \'\'
SELECT NR AS _id, BOLUM AS CODE FROM DIVISION
SELECT NR AS _id, BOLUM AS CODE FROM DIVISION WHERE NR=?
SELECT NR AS _id, FABRIKA AS CODE FROM FACTORY
SELECT NR AS _id, FABRIKA AS CODE FROM FACTORY WHERE NR=?
SELECT PARAMVALUE FROM EMAILPARAM WHERE PARAMNO=@paramNo
SELECT PARAMVALUE FROM LOGOPARAMS WHERE PARAMNO=@paramNo
SELECT PARAMVALUE FROM USERPARAMS WHERE PARAMNO=@paramNo
SELECT REPORTCONTENT FROM USERREPORTS WHERE ID = @id
SELECT REPORTCONTENT FROM USERREPORTS WHERE REPORTNAME = @id

SELECT O.LOGICALREF AS REF,1 TYPE, O.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, O.SPECODE AS SPE, O.DESC1 AS DESC, O.FICHEDATE AS SDATE , FICHEREF AS FICHENO, \'\' AS TRANSFERFICHENO, O.DOCTRACINGNR , O.STATUS, O.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, S.CODE AS SHIPCODE, S.NAME AS SHIPNAME, P.ODEMEPLAN AS PAYPLAN , O.ISTRANSFER, O.ISEDIT, O.CANCELLED, O.FICHESTATUS, O.EDOCSTATUS, O.ERPINVOICETYPE, \'\' AS ORDERFICHESTATUS, O.SALESTYPE, O.CLREF FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF WHERE O.ORDERTYPE=1 AND O.FACT!=1

SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS REF,2 TYPE, I.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, I.SPECODE AS SPE, I.DESC1 AS DESC, I.FICHEDATE AS SDATE, FICHEREF AS FICHENO, FICHENO AS TRANSFERFICHENO, I.DOCTRACINGNR , I.FACTNR AS STATUS, I.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, S.CODE AS SHIPCODE, S.NAME AS SHIPNAME, P.ODEMEPLAN AS PAYPLAN , I.ISTRANSFER, I.ISEDIT, I.CANCELLED, I.FICHESTATUS ,I.EDOCSTATUS, I.ERPINVOICETYPE, \'\' AS ORDERFICHESTATUS, I.SALESTYPE, I.CLREF FROM INVOICE I LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=I.PAYMENTREF WHERE

SELECT O.LOGICALREF AS REF,1 TYPE, O.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, O.SPECODE AS SPE, O.DESC1 AS DESC, O.FICHEDATE AS SDATE , FICHEREF AS FICHENO, FICHENO AS TRANSFERFICHENO, O.DOCTRACINGNR , O.STATUS, O.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, S.CODE AS SHIPCODE, S.NAME AS SHIPNAME, P.ODEMEPLAN AS PAYPLAN , O.ISTRANSFER, O.ISEDIT, O.CANCELLED, O.FICHESTATUS, O.EDOCSTATUS, O.ERPINVOICETYPE, O.ORDERFICHESTATUS, O.SALESTYPE, O.CLREF FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF WHERE O.ORDERTYPE=0 AND O.FACT!=1

SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS REF,10 TYPE, I.TRADINGGRP AS TRADE, I.SPECODE AS SPE, I.DESC1 AS DESC, I.FICHEDATE AS SDATE, FICHEREF AS FICHENO, FICHENO AS TRANSFERFICHENO, I.DOCTRACINGNR , I.FACTNR AS STATUS, I.TOTALNET AS TOTAL, \'\' AS PAYPLAN , I.ISTRANSFER, I.ISEDIT, I.CANCELLED, I.FICHESTATUS, I.EDOCSTATUS, I.ERPINVOICETYPE, \'\' AS ORDERFICHESTATUS, W.AMBAR AS SHIPCODE, \'\' AS SHIPNAME, I.SALESTYPE, I.CLREF FROM WHTRANSFER I LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.NR=I.WAREHOUSENR WHERE I.FACT!=1

SELECT WP.LOGICALREF AS ROUTEPLANREF FROM WORROUTEPLAN WP JOIN CLCARD C ON WP.CLIENTREF = %2$s WHERE C.ACTIVE= 0 AND SEQUENCE > ( SELECT SEQUENCE FROM WORROUTEPLAN WHERE LOGICALREF = %1$s) AND ROUTEID = (SELECT ROUTEID FROM WORROUTEPLAN WHERE LOGICALREF = %1$s) ORDER BY SEQUENCE ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT C.ID, C.BRAND, C.MODEL, C.CODE, C.LOCINFO, C.STATUS, C.SALESMANREF, C.CREATEDDATE, C.MODIFIEDDATE, C.CLIENTCODE, C.BARCODE, C.CLIENTCODE, C.CMDATE, C.ISTRANSFER, C.TYPE, C.FIRM FROM CABIN C WHERE CLIENTCODE = \'\' AND LOCINFO = 2 AND STATUS = 1 AND FIRM = \'%4$s\' %1$s ORDER BY C.ID ASC LIMIT %2$d OFFSET %3$d

SELECT RATE, TAXCODE, GLOBALCODE, EFFECTKDV FROM ADDTAX AT WHERE (AT.ADDTAXREF = %1$s) AND AT.TAXTYPE = 0 AND (AT.TRSPECODE2 = \'*\' OR AT.TRSPECODE2 = \'\' ) AND AT.BEGDATE <= %2$s AND (\'%3$s\' LIKE REPLACE(AT.TRSPECODE, \'*\', \'%%\')) AND (\'%4$s\' LIKE REPLACE(AT.FCSPECODE, \'*\', \'%%\')) ORDER BY AT.BEGDATE DESC
SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS ITEMREF, I.CODE , I.NAME, U.VARIANTREF AS VARIANT FROM ITEMS I LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE U ON I.LOGICALREF=U.ITEMREF WHERE BARCODE= \'%1$s\' OR I.CODE = \'%1$s\'
SELECT LOGICALREF FROM WORROUTEPROCESS WHERE ROUTEPLANREF = \'%1$s\' AND ROUTEDAYREF = \'%2$s\' AND STRFTIME(\'%%Y-%%m-%%d\', DATE(CREATEDDATE)) = \'%3$s\'

SELECT SUM(K.VALUE) AS RESULT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),1,2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS VALUE FROM INVOICE WHERE CLREF = %1$s UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),1,2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS VALUE FROM ORDERS WHERE CLREF = %2$s UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),1,2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS VALUE FROM CASECASH WHERE CLREF = %3$s UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),1,2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS VALUE FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE CLREF = %4$s UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(GDATE),1,2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS VALUE FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE CLREF = %5$s UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', DATE(\'now\')) = STRFTIME(\'%%d.%%m.%%Y\', SUBSTR(trim(VISITDATE),7,4)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(VISITDATE),4,2)||\'-\'||SUBSTR(trim(VISITDATE),1,2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS VALUE FROM VISITINFO WHERE CLREF = %6$s )K

SELECT C.ID, C.BRAND, C.MODEL, C.CODE, C.LOCINFO, C.STATUS, C.SALESMANREF, C.CREATEDDATE, C.MODIFIEDDATE, C.CLIENTCODE, C.BARCODE, C.CLIENTCODE, C.CMDATE, C.ISTRANSFER, C.TYPE, C.FIRM FROM CABIN C WHERE C.CLIENTCODE = \'%1$s\' AND C.FIRM = \'%4$s\' AND (STATUS = 1 OR STATUS = 2) ORDER BY C.ID ASC LIMIT %2$d OFFSET %3$d

SELECT GDATE AS FICHEDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL, 2 AS FTYPE , DESC AS DESC1 FROM CASECASH AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF WHERE 1=1

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, B.ISYERI , D.BOLUM , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, PRO.PROJE, UC.KASA AS KASA, CT.CURRCODE AS CURRCODE FROM CASECASH O LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.LOGICALREF=O.CLREF LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN USERCASE UC ON UC.LOGICALREF=O.CARDREF LEFT JOIN CURRTYPE CT ON O.CURCODE=CT.CURRTYPE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL, NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASECASH AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C WHERE CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF %1$s ORDER BY CC.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS FICHEDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL, FTYPE , DESC1 FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF WHERE 1=1

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASH\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF WHERE 1=1 AND FTYPE = 0 %1$s ORDER BY CC.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, B.ISYERI , D.BOLUM , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, PRO.PROJE, BS.DEFINITION_ AS BANKDEF, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKACCDEF FROM CASHCREDIT O LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.LOGICALREF=O.CLREF LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN BANKS AS BS ON O.BANKREF = BS.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA ON BA.LOGICALREF = O.BANKACCREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? AND O.FTYPE=?

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, PAY.ODEMEPLAN AS ODEMEPLAN FROM CASHCREDITDETAIL O LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN PAYMENT PAY ON PAY.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'CEK\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 0 %1$s ORDER BY CQ.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS FICHEDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL, FTYPE , DESC1 FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF WHERE 1=1

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, B.ISYERI , D.BOLUM , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, PRO.PROJE FROM CHEQUEDEED O LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.LOGICALREF=O.CLREF LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? AND O.FTYPE=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, B.DEFINITION_ AS BANKNAME, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CREDIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKS AS B ON CC.BANKREF = B.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA ON BA.LOGICALREF = CC.BANKACCREF WHERE B.LOGICALREF = BA.BANKREF AND FTYPE = 1 %1$s ORDER BY CC.LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT RATE FROM CURR WHERE CURRCODE=?
SELECT CURRTYPE AS _id , CURRCODE AS CODE FROM CURRTYPE
SELECT CURRTYPE AS _id , CURRCODE AS CODE FROM CURRTYPE WHERE CURRTYPE=?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM CABIN WHERE LOCINFO = 1 AND SALESMANREF <= 0 AND STATUS = 1 AND CLIENTCODE = \'%1$s\' AND FIRM = \'%2$s\'
SELECT CODE FROM CLCARD WHERE LOGICALREF=?

SELECT DISTINCT(FTYPE) AS FTYPE FROM ( SELECT 0 AS FTYPE FROM ORDERS WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s UNION ALL SELECT 1 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 6 AS FTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 7 AS FTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 8 AS FTYPE FROM CASECASH WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s UNION ALL SELECT 9 AS FTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS FTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 11 AS FTYPE FROM VISITINFO WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s UNION ALL SELECT 12 AS FTYPE FROM USERMAINPENETRATION WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLIENTREF = %1$s UNION ALL SELECT 13 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 14 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND CLREF = %1$s AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 1 )

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, \'\' AS CUSTOMERNAME, \'\' AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, O.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER, O.LOGICALREF , O.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'DEMAND\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM ORDERS AS O LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON O.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE O.FACT!=1 AND O.ORDERTYPE=1 %1$s ORDER BY O.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE,S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'IRSALIYE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 0 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s %2$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT C.ACCEPTEINV FROM INVOICE I INNER JOIN CLCARD C ON C.LOGICALREF=I.CLREF WHERE I.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'FATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 1 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s %2$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT CODE FROM ITEMS WHERE LOGICALREF=?

SELECT U.CODE || \'(\' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' : \' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' )\' AS UNITCODE ,U.LOGICALREF ,U.CODE ,U.CONVFACT1 ,U.CONVFACT2 ,U.LINENR ,UNT.DIVUNIT ,COALESCE((U.VOLUME / VOL.CONVFACT1) * VOL.CONVFACT2 / 1000, 0.00) AS NETVOLUME ,COALESCE((U.GROSSVOLUME / GRSVOL.CONVFACT1) * GRSVOL.CONVFACT2 / 1000, 0.00) AS GROSSVOLUME ,COALESCE((U.WEIGHT / WGT.CONVFACT1) * WGT.CONVFACT2, 0.00) AS NETWEIGHT ,COALESCE((U.GROSSWEIGHT / GRSWGT.CONVFACT1) * GRSWGT.CONVFACT2, 0.00) AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM ITEMUNITS U LEFT JOIN UNITS UNT ON UNT.LOGICALREF=U.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN UNITS VOL ON VOL.LOGICALREF = U.VOLUMEREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GRSVOL ON GRSVOL.LOGICALREF = U.GROSSVOLREF LEFT JOIN UNITS WGT ON WGT.LOGICALREF = U.WEIGHTREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GRSWGT ON GRSWGT.LOGICALREF = U.GROSSWGHTREF WHERE U.ITEMREF=@itemRef ORDER BY U.SALESPRIORITY, U.LINENR
SELECT TRANSFERDATE FROM TRANSFERDATE WHERE STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(TRANSFERDATE)) >= STRFTIME(\'%d.%m.%Y\', DATE(\'now\'))
SELECT IFNULL(%3$s, \'\') AS MAXNO FROM %4$s WHERE %3$s>=\'%1$s\' AND %3$s<=\'%2$s\' AND LENGTH(%3$s)=LENGTH(\'%2$S\') %5$s ORDER BY %3$s DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'BIREBIR\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 2 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, O.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , O.LOGICALREF, O.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'ORDER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM ORDERS AS O JOIN CLCARD AS C ON O.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON O.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE O.FACT!=1 %1$s ORDER BY O.LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT * FROM USERMAINPENETRATION U LEFT JOIN PENETRATION P ON U.PENETRATION_ID=P.LOGICALREF WHERE U.ID=?

SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, PDEFINITION AS CODE, PTYPE AS TYPE FROM PENETRATION WHERE STRFTIME(\'%Y-%m-%d \', DATE(\'now\')) BETWEEN STRFTIME(\'%Y-%m-%d \', DATE(BEGINDATE)) AND STRFTIME(\'%Y-%m-%d \', DATE(ENDDATE)) ORDER BY LOGICALREF

SELECT U.*, P.ITEMCODE AS PRODUCTCODE , P.ITEMNAME AS PRODUCTNAME , P.ITEMREF AS PRODUCTREF, P.SEQUENCE AS PUNIT, P.PER_PRICE , P.PER_NOTE , P.PER_PIC FROM USERPENETRATION U LEFT JOIN PENETRATIONDETAIL P ON U.PNTDETID=P.LOGICALREF WHERE U.PENETFICHEID=?
SELECT U.*, P.PDEFINITION FROM USERMAINPENETRATION U LEFT JOIN PENETRATION P ON U.PENETRATION_ID=P.LOGICALREF WHERE CLIENTREF=%1$d ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT %2$d OFFSET %3$d

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'SENET\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 1 %1$s ORDER BY CQ.LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT DISTINCT P.LOGICALREF AS _id, P.PRICE, P.INCVAT, P.CURCODE, P.CURNR, P.CPRICE || \' ( \' || U.CODE || \' ) \' || CASE WHEN LENGTH(IFNULL(P.DEFINITION_, \'\')) > 0 THEN \' - \' || P.DEFINITION_ ELSE \'\' END AS UPRICE, P.UNITCONVERT, C.RATE, U.CONVFACT1, U.CONVFACT2, P.VARIANTCODE FROM ITEMPRICE P INNER JOIN %1$s U ON U.LOGICALREF=P.UNITREF AND U.ITEMREF=P.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN CURR C ON C.CURRCODE=P.CURCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.CODE=P.CLIENTCODE LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON P.TRADINGGRP = T.CODE LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP CT ON P.CLTRADINGGRP = CT.CODE WHERE P.ITEMREF=? AND ( CL.LOGICALREF=? OR P.CLIENTCODE=\'\') AND P.PTYPE=? AND ((U.LOGICALREF=?) OR (P.UNITCONVERT=1)) AND (P.PAYPLANREF=? OR P.PAYPLANREF=0) AND (P.TRADINGGRP=? OR P.TRADINGGRP=\'\') AND (P.CLTRADINGGRP=? OR P.CLTRADINGGRP=\'\') AND IFNULL(T.ACTIVE,0) = 0 AND IFNULL(CT.ACTIVE,0) = 0 AND %2$s %3$s %5$s GROUP BY P.LOGICALREF ORDER BY %4$s P.PRIORITY, _id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT P.LOGICALREF AS _id, P.PRICE, P.INCVAT, P.CURCODE, P.CURNR, P.CPRICE || \' ( \' || U.CODE || \' ) \' AS UPRICE, P.UNITCONVERT, C.RATE, U.CONVFACT1, U.CONVFACT2 FROM ITEMPRICE P INNER JOIN ITEMUNITS U ON U.LOGICALREF=P.UNITREF AND U.ITEMREF=P.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN CURR C ON C.CURRCODE=P.CURCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.CODE=P.CLIENTCODE WHERE P.ITEMREF=? AND P.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT DISTINCT P.LOGICALREF AS _id, P.PRICE , P.INCVAT, P.CURCODE , P.CURNR, P.CPRICE, P.UNITCONVERT , C.RATE, U.CONVFACT1, U.CONVFACT2 FROM ITEMPRICE P INNER JOIN %1$s U ON U.LOGICALREF=P.UNITREF AND U.ITEMREF=P.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN CURR C ON C.CURRCODE=P.CURCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.CODE=P.CLIENTCODE LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON P.TRADINGGRP = T.CODE LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP CT ON P.CLTRADINGGRP = CT.CODE WHERE P.ITEMREF=? AND P.PRICECODE=? AND P.PTYPE=? AND IFNULL(T.ACTIVE,0) = 0 AND IFNULL(CT.ACTIVE,0) = 0 GROUP BY P.LOGICALREF

SELECT S.NAME AS LOTNAME,S.CODE, SUM(S.AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT, S.EXPDATE FROM SERILOT S LEFT JOIN INVOICEDETAIL I ON S.DETAILREF = I.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN INVOICE D ON D.LOGICALREF = I.SALESFICHEID WHERE S.AMOUNT>0 AND S.SLFICHETYPE=0 AND I.ITEMREF = ? AND D.FICHEREF = ? AND I.GUID = ? GROUP BY LOTNAME, S.CODE,S.EXPDATE
SELECT NR AS _id, AMBAR AS CODE FROM WAREHOUSE

SELECT CASE WHEN ifnull(STGRPCODE,\'\') = \'\' THEN \'OTHERS\' ELSE STGRPCODE END GRPCODE ,CASE WHEN ifnull(STGRPCODE,\'\') = \'\' THEN \'OTHERS\' ELSE STGRPNAME END GRPNAME ,CASE WHEN ifnull(STGRPCODE,\'\') = \'\' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ROW_ORDER ,COUNT(*) GRPCOUNT FROM ITEMS GROUP BY STGRPCODE, STGRPNAME ORDER BY ROW_ORDER,GRPCODE
SELECT *, I.CODE AS ICODE, I.SPECODE AS SPECODE FROM ITEMS AS I LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE I.LOGICALREF = %1$d

SELECT _id , ITEMCODE , TRACKTYPE , ISVARYANT , VAT , RETURNVAT , CARDTYPE , CPRICE , RATE , CURNR , PRICE , INCVAT , PRICEREF , CURCODE , UNITCONVERT , ITEMIMAGE , IFNULL(SUM(STC.REALSTOCK),0) AS REALSTOCK , IFNULL(SUM(STC.ONHAND),0) AS ACTUALSTOCK , SERVICE , ISBARCODE , BUNITREF , BARCODE , DEFINITION , IMAGEINC , VARIANTCODE , VARIANTREF , VARIANTNAME , ADDTAXREF , LOCTRACKING , RETAILVAT , RETAILRETURNVAT , PAYMENTREF , PAYMENTCODE , PAYMENTDEF , SALESDISPRATETOT , NAME2 %2$s %13$s %15$s FROM ( SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS _id , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.TRACKTYPE , I.ISVARYANT , I.VAT , I.RETURNVAT , I.CARDTYPE , PRC.CPRICE AS CPRICE , CC.RATE AS RATE , PRC.CURNR AS CURNR , PRC.PRICE AS PRICE , PRC.INCVAT AS INCVAT , PRC.LOGICALREF AS PRICEREF , PRC.CURCODE , PRC.UNITCONVERT , IMG.ITEMIMAGE , 0 AS SERVICE , IFNULL(B.BARCODE,\'\')= CASE WHEN B.BARCODE IN (%10$s) THEN B.BARCODE ELSE 0 END AS ISBARCODE , B.UNITREF AS BUNITREF , B.BARCODE , %1$s AS DEFINITION , I.IMAGEINC %17$s , I.ADDTAXREF , I.LOCTRACKING , I.RETAILVAT , I.RETAILRETURNVAT , I.PAYMENTREF , PAY.CODE PAYMENTCODE , PAY.ODEMEPLAN PAYMENTDEF , I.SALESDISPRATETOT , I.NAME2 %3$s %12$s %14$s FROM ITEMS I LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE B ON B.ITEMREF=I.LOGICALREF %18$s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT *, MAX(PRCGRP.ITEMREF) as ITEMREF FROM (SELECT ITM.PRICE, CASE WHEN ( ITM.CYPHCODE = \'\' AND ITM.PROJECTREF = 0 AND ITM.CLIENTCODE = \'\' AND ITM.CLTRADINGGRP = \'\' AND ITM.CLCYPHCODE = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE2 = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE3 = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE4 = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE5 = \'\' AND ITM.PAYPLANREF = 0 AND ITM.TRADINGGRP = \'\' AND ITM.VARIANTCODE = \'\' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ISDEFAULTPRICE ,CASE WHEN ( ITM.CYPHCODE = \'\' AND ITM.PROJECTREF = 0 AND ITM.CLTRADINGGRP = \'\' AND ITM.CLCYPHCODE = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE2 = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE3 = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE4 = \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE5 = \'\' AND ITM.VARIANTCODE = \'\' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ISOTHERPARAMSEMPTY , ITM.LOGICALREF , ITM.ITEMREF , ITM.INCVAT , ITM.CPRICE , ITM.PRIORITY , ITM.CURNR , ITM.TRADINGGRP , ITM.CURCODE , ITM.UNITCONVERT , ITM.VARIANTCODE , VAR.LOGICALREF VARIANTREF %16$s FROM ITEMPRICE ITM LEFT JOIN VARIANTS VAR ON ITM.VARIANTCODE = VAR.CODE AND ITM.ITEMREF = VAR.ITEMREF %4$s ) AS PRCGRP GROUP BY ITEMREF) AS PRC ON ( PRC.ITEMREF = I.LOGICALREF ) LEFT JOIN CURR CC ON CC.CURRTYPE = PRC.CURNR AND DATE_ = %5$d LEFT JOIN ITEMIMAGES IMG ON IMG.ITEMREF=I.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT PAY ON PAY.LOGICALREF = I.PAYMENTREF %6$s WHERE 1=1 %8$s AND (I.ISACTIVE IS NULL OR I.ISACTIVE = 0) GROUP BY I.LOGICALREF %11$s ) AS TMP LEFT JOIN ITEMSTOCK STC ON STC.ITEMREF = TMP._id %7$s GROUP BY _id %9$s
(ITEMCODE LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\' OR ITEMCODE LIKE \'%%%2$s%%\' OR ITEMCODE LIKE \'%%%3$s%%\' )
(DEFINITION LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\' OR DEFINITION LIKE \'%%%2$s%%\' OR DEFINITION LIKE \'%%%3$s%%\' )
(MARKCODE LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\' OR MARKCODE LIKE \'%%%2$s%%\' OR MARKCODE LIKE \'%%%3$s%%\')
(ITEMCODE LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR ITEMCODE LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR ITEMCODE LIKE \'%3$s%%\' )
(DEFINITION LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR DEFINITION LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR DEFINITION LIKE \'%3$s%%\' )
(MARKCODE LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR MARKCODE LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR MARKCODE LIKE \'%3$s%%\' )
(PRODUCERCODE LIKE \'%1$s%%\' OR PRODUCERCODE LIKE \'%2$s%%\' OR PRODUCERCODE LIKE \'%3$s%%\' )
(PRODUCERCODE LIKE \'%%%1$s%%\' OR PRODUCERCODE LIKE \'%%%2$s%%\' OR PRODUCERCODE LIKE \'%%%3$s%%\')
( I.SPECODE LIKE \'%1$s\' OR I.SPECODE2 LIKE \'%1$s\' OR I.SPECODE3 LIKE \'%1$s\' OR I.SPECODE4 LIKE \'%1$s\' OR I.SPECODE5 LIKE \'%1$s\' )
SELECT RATE FROM CURR WHERE CURRCODE=? AND CURRTYPE=? AND DATE_=?

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'PERAKENDEFATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 3 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s %2$s ORDER BY I.LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT CLREF FROM SLSCLREL WHERE LINENO_ < ( SELECT LINENO_ FROM SLSCLREL WHERE CLREF = %1$s ) ORDER BY LINENO_ DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CLREF FROM SLSCLREL WHERE VISITDAY = %1$s AND LINENO_ < ( SELECT LINENO_ FROM SLSCLREL WHERE VISITDAY = %2$s AND CLREF = %3$s ) ORDER BY LINENO_ DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT WP.LOGICALREF AS ROUTEPLANREF FROM WORROUTEPLAN WP JOIN CLCARD C ON WP.CLIENTREF = %2$s WHERE C.ACTIVE= 0 AND SEQUENCE < ( SELECT SEQUENCE FROM WORROUTEPLAN WHERE LOGICALREF = %1$s) AND ROUTEID = (SELECT ROUTEID FROM WORROUTEPLAN WHERE LOGICALREF = %1$s) ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , CASE COUNT(FORMGROUP) WHEN 1 THEN DEFINITION_ ELSE FORMGROUP END AS CODE, CASE COUNT(FORMGROUP) WHEN 1 THEN DEFINITION_ ELSE \'> \' || FORMGROUP END AS DESC, LINENO_ AS LNO ,COUNT(FORMGROUP) AS COUNT FROM DEFORDER WHERE (WORKTYPE=2 OR WORKTYPE=%1$s) AND LENGTH(IFNULL(FORMGROUP,\'\')) > 0 GROUP BY FORMGROUP UNION ALL SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , DEFINITION_ AS CODE, DEFINITION_ AS DESC, LINENO_ AS LNO ,1 AS COUNT FROM DEFORDER WHERE (WORKTYPE=2 OR WORKTYPE=%1$s) AND LENGTH(IFNULL(FORMGROUP,\'\')) = 0
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , DEFINITION_ AS CODE, LINENO_ AS LNO FROM DEFORDER WHERE (WORKTYPE=2 OR WORKTYPE=?) AND FORMGROUP=? ORDER BY LNO

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, %5$s AS ITEMNAME , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.CARDTYPE , I.TRACKTYPE , U.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UCODE , U.CODE AS UUCODE, P.ODEMEPLAN , S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, V.NAME AS VNAME, V.CODE AS VCODE, %3$s, %4$s, %6$s, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, BARCODECOUNT, DISCOUNTRATE FROM INVOICEDETAIL O LEFT OUTER JOIN %1$s I ON I.LOGICALREF=O.ITEMREF LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s U ON U.LOGICALREF=O.UNIT %7$s LEFT OUTER JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VARIANTS V ON V.LOGICALREF=O.VARIANTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? GROUP BY O.LOGICALREF

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, W.AMBAR , RW.AMBAR AS IADEAMBAR, B.ISYERI , F.FABRIKA , D.BOLUM , P.ODEMEPLAN , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, C.DEFINITION_ AS TITLE, SHP.ADDRESS AS SHPADD, SPAGNT.LOGICALREF AS SHPREF, SHPTP.CODE AS SHPCODE, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, PRO.PROJE, CBN.CODE AS CBNCODE, CBN.CODE || \' - \' || CBN.MODEL AS CBNNAME FROM INVOICE O LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.NR=O.WAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE RW ON RW.NR=O.RETURNWAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN FACTORY F ON F.NR=O.FACTNR LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON C.LOGICALREF=O.SHIPACCREF LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.LOGICALREF=O.CLREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SHP ON SHP.LOGICALREF=O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SPAGNT ON SPAGNT.CODE=O.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN SHIPTYPE SHPTP ON SHPTP.CODE = O.SHIPTYPE LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN CABIN CBN ON CBN.ID=O.CABINREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, %4$s AS ITEMNAME , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.CARDTYPE , I.TRACKTYPE , U.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UCODE , U.CODE AS UUCODE, P.ODEMEPLAN , S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, V.NAME AS VNAME, V.CODE AS VCODE, %3$s, %5$s, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, BARCODECOUNT, DISCOUNTRATE FROM ORDERDETAIL O LEFT OUTER JOIN %1$s I ON I.LOGICALREF=O.ITEMREF LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s U ON U.LOGICALREF=O.UNIT AND U.ITEMREF=O.ITEMREF %6$s LEFT OUTER JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VARIANTS V ON V.LOGICALREF=O.VARIANTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? GROUP BY O.LOGICALREF

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, W.AMBAR , SW.AMBAR AS KARSILAMAAMBARI, B.ISYERI , F.FABRIKA , D.BOLUM , P.ODEMEPLAN , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, C.DEFINITION_ AS TITLE, SHP.ADDRESS AS SHPADD, SPAGNT.LOGICALREF AS SHPREF, SHPTP.CODE AS SHPCODE, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, PRO.PROJE FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.NR=O.WAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE SW ON SW.NR=O.SOURCEWAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN FACTORY F ON F.NR=O.FACTNR LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON C.LOGICALREF=O.SHIPACCREF LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.LOGICALREF=O.CLREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SHP ON SHP.LOGICALREF=O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SPAGNT ON SPAGNT.CODE=O.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN SHIPTYPE SHPTP ON SHPTP.CODE = O.SHIPTYPE LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?
SELECT * FROM SERILOT S WHERE S.DETAILREF=? AND S.SLFICHETYPE=?

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, %5$s AS ITEMNAME , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , I.CARDTYPE , I.TRACKTYPE , U.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UCODE , U.CODE AS UUCODE, P.ODEMEPLAN , S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, V.NAME AS VNAME, V.CODE AS VCODE, %3$s, %4$s, %6$s, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5 FROM WHTRANSFERDETAIL O LEFT OUTER JOIN %1$s I ON I.LOGICALREF=O.ITEMREF LEFT OUTER JOIN %2$s U ON U.LOGICALREF=O.UNIT %7$s LEFT OUTER JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VARIANTS V ON V.LOGICALREF=O.VARIANTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=0 LEFT OUTER JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=0 WHERE O.LOGICALREF=? GROUP BY O.LOGICALREF

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, CC.CODE AS CCCODE, W.AMBAR , B.ISYERI , F.FABRIKA , D.BOLUM , P.ODEMEPLAN , T.LOGICALREF AS TREF, T.GATTRIB, S.LOGICALREF AS SREF, WR.LOGICALREF AS WREF, C.DEFINITION_ AS TITLE, SHP.ADDRESS AS SHPADD, SPAGNT.LOGICALREF AS SHPREF, SHPTP.CODE AS SHPCODE, D1.INDIRIM AS D1 , D1.LOGICALREF AS C1, D2.INDIRIM AS D2 , D2.LOGICALREF AS C2, D3.INDIRIM AS D3 , D3.LOGICALREF AS C3, D4.INDIRIM AS D4 , D4.LOGICALREF AS C4, D5.INDIRIM AS D5 , D5.LOGICALREF AS C5, PRO.PROJE, CBN.CODE AS CBNCODE, CBN.CODE || \' - \' || CBN.MODEL AS CBNNAME, ED.PLATE, ED.CARRIERTAXNR, ED.CARRIERNAME, ED.CARRIERCOUNTY, ED.CARRIERCITY, ED.CARRIERCOUNTRY, ED.CARRIERPOSTCODE, ED.FIRSTDRIVERNAME, ED.FIRSTDRIVERLASTNAME, ED.FIRSTDRIVERDESCRIPTION, ED.FIRSTDRIVERIDENTITYNR, ED.FIRSTTRAILERPLATE, ED.SECONDDRIVERNAME, ED.SECONDDRIVERLASTNAME, ED.SECONDDRIVERIDENTITYNR, ED.FIRSTDRIVERIDENTITYNR, ED.SECONDDRIVERPLATE, ED.SECONDTRAILERPLATE, ED.THIRDDRIVERNAME, ED.THIRDDRIVERLASTNAME, ED.THIRDDRIVERIDENTITYNR, ED.THIRDDRIVEERPLATE, ED.THIRDTRAILERPLATE FROM WHTRANSFER O LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.NR=O.WAREHOUSENR LEFT JOIN BRANCH B ON B.NR=O.BRANCHNR LEFT JOIN FACTORY F ON F.NR=O.FACTNR LEFT JOIN DIVISION D ON D.NR=O.DIVISNR LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON P.LOGICALREF=O.PAYMENTREF LEFT JOIN TRADINGGRP T ON T.CODE=O.TRADINGGRP LEFT JOIN SPECODES S ON S.SPECODE=O.SPECODE LEFT JOIN SPECODES WR ON WR.SPECODE=O.CYPHCODE LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON C.LOGICALREF=O.SHIPACCREF LEFT JOIN CLCARD CC ON CC.LOGICALREF=O.CLREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS SHP ON SHP.LOGICALREF=O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT SPAGNT ON SPAGNT.CODE=O.SHIPAGENT LEFT JOIN SHIPTYPE SHPTP ON SHPTP.CODE = O.SHIPTYPE LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D1 ON D1.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE1 AND D1.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D2 ON D2.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE2 AND D2.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D3 ON D3.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE3 AND D3.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D4 ON D4.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE4 AND D4.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT D5 ON D5.CODE=O.DISCCARDCODE5 AND D5.TYPE=1 LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRO ON PRO.LOGICALREF=O.PROJECTREF LEFT JOIN CABIN CBN ON CBN.ID=O.CABINREF LEFT JOIN EDESPATCHADDITIONALINFO ED ON ED.SALESFICHEID = O.LOGICALREF AND ED.SALESTYPE = O.SALESTYPE WHERE O.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT I.CODE AS ICODE, I.NAME AS NAME, I.SPECODE AS SPECODE, \'\' AS SPECODE2, \'\' AS SPECODE3, \'\' AS SPECODE4, \'\' AS SPECODE5, \'\' AS STGRPCODE, \'\' AS MARK, ODEMEPLAN AS ODEMEPLAN, I.VAT AS VAT, \'\' AS RETURNVAT FROM SERVICE AS I LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE I.LOGICALREF = %1$d

SELECT _id , ITEMCODE , TRACKTYPE , ISVARYANT , VAT , RETURNVAT , CARDTYPE , CPRICE , RATE , CURNR , PRICE , INCVAT , PRICEREF , CURCODE , UNITCONVERT , ITEMIMAGE , 1 AS REALSTOCK , 1 AS ACTUALSTOCK , SERVICE , ISBARCODE , BUNITREF , BARCODE , DEFINITION , IMAGEINC , \'\' AS VARIANTCODE , 0 VARIANTREF , ADDTAXREF , 0 LOCTRACKING , RETAILVAT , RETAILRETURNVAT , \'\' AS VARIANTNAME , 0 PAYMENTREF , \'\' PAYMENTCODE , \'\' PAYMENTDEF , 0 AS SALESDISPRATETOT ,\'\' AS NAME2 %2$s %12$s %14$s FROM ( SELECT I.LOGICALREF AS _id , I.CODE AS ITEMCODE , 0 AS TRACKTYPE , 0 AS ISVARYANT , I.VAT , I.VAT AS RETURNVAT , 4 AS CARDTYPE , PRC.CPRICE AS CPRICE , CC.RATE AS RATE , PRC.CURNR AS CURNR , PRC.PRICE AS PRICE , PRC.INCVAT AS INCVAT , PRC.LOGICALREF AS PRICEREF , PRC.CURCODE , PRC.UNITCONVERT , NULL AS ITEMIMAGE , 1 AS SERVICE , IFNULL(B.BARCODE,\'\')= CASE WHEN B.BARCODE IN (%9$s) THEN B.BARCODE ELSE 0 END AS ISBARCODE , B.UNITREF AS BUNITREF , B.BARCODE , %1$s AS DEFINITION , 1 AS IMAGEINC , I.ADDTAXREF , I.VAT AS RETAILVAT , I.VAT AS RETAILRETURNVAT , 0 AS SALESDISPRATETOT %3$s %11$s %13$s FROM SERVICE I LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE B ON B.ITEMREF=I.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITM.PRICE, CASE WHEN (ITM.CYPHCODE=\'\' AND ITM.PROJECTREF=0 AND ITM.CLIENTCODE=\'\' AND ITM.CLTRADINGGRP=\'\' AND ITM.CLCYPHCODE=\'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE=\'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE2=\'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE3= \'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE4=\'\' AND ITM.CLSPECODE5=\'\' AND ITM.GRPCODE=\'\' AND ITM.PAYPLANREF=0 AND ITM.TRADINGGRP=\'\' AND ITM.VARIANTCODE=\'\') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ISDEFAULTPRICE , ITM.LOGICALREF , ITM.ITEMREF , ITM.INCVAT , ITM.CPRICE , ITM.PRIORITY , ITM.CURNR , ITM.TRADINGGRP , ITM.CURCODE , ITM.UNITCONVERT , ITM.PTYPE FROM ITEMPRICE ITM %4$s ) AS PRC ON ( PRC.ITEMREF = I.LOGICALREF ) LEFT JOIN CURR CC ON CC.CURRTYPE = PRC.CURNR AND DATE_ = %5$d %6$s WHERE 1=1 %7$s GROUP BY I.LOGICALREF %10$s ) AS TMP GROUP BY _id %8$s

SELECT U.CODE || \'(\' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' : \' || CAST(CAST(U.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR) || \' )\' AS UNITCODE ,U.LOGICALREF ,U.CODE ,U.CONVFACT1 ,U.CONVFACT2 ,U.LINENR ,0 AS DIVUNIT ,0 AS NETVOLUME ,0 AS GROSSVOLUME ,0 AS NETWEIGHT ,0 AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM SERVICEUNITS U WHERE U.ITEMREF=@itemRef ORDER BY U.PRIORITY, U.LINENR

SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , BEGDATE , ENDDATE , CLREF , DESC_, PRIORITY AS PRI, NOTE AS INFO, \'TRUE\' AS ISTODO, STATUS AS STAT FROM TODOINFO WHERE (STATUS != 2 AND STATUS != 3) UNION SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , BEGDATE ,ENDDATE, LOGICALREF AS CLREF , DEFINITION_ AS DESC_ ,TYPE AS PRI, NOTE AS INFO, \'FALSE\' AS ISTODO, \'9\' AS STAT FROM MARKETINGMESSAGE
SELECT S.CODE || \' \' || S.ADDR1 || \' \' || S.ADDR2 || \' \' || S.CITY AS CODE FROM VISITINFO V LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF=V.SHIPADDRREF WHERE V.ID=?

SELECT VISITDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, REASON, NOTE, S.NAME AS SHIPADDRESS, V.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , ID AS LOGICALREF, ID AS FICHEREF, 0.00 AS TOTAL, NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'VISIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM VISITINFO AS V JOIN CLCARD AS C ON V.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS AS S ON V.SHIPADDRREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY LOGICALREF DESC

SELECT V.ID, V.REASON, V.NOTE, V.ISTRANSFER, V.VISITDATE, V.AUTO, C.DEFINITION_ AS CLNAME, C.CODE AS CLCODE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, S.CODE || \' \' || S.ADDR1 || \' \' || S.ADDR2 || \' \' || S.CITY AS EXPLANATION FROM VISITINFO V LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF=V.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN CLCARD C ON V.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF WHERE V.CLREF=%1$d ORDER BY V.ID DESC LIMIT %2$d OFFSET %3$d

SELECT V.ID, V.REASON, V.NOTE, V.ISTRANSFER, V.VISITDATE, V.CLREF, S.CODE, S.CODE || \' \' || S.ADDR1 || \' \' || S.ADDR2 || \' \' || S.CITY AS EXPLANATION FROM VISITINFO V LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF=V.SHIPADDRREF WHERE V.ID = %1$d

SELECT DISTINCT(FTYPE) AS FTYPE FROM ( SELECT 1 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 1 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 0 AND INVTYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 2 UNION ALL SELECT 13 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 14 AS FTYPE FROM INVOICE WHERE ISTRANSFER = 0 AND FTYPE = 3 AND INVTYPE = 1 )

SELECT GDATE AS DDATE ,WH.AMBAR AS CUSTOMERNAME ,\'\' AS CUSTOMERCODE ,NULL AS REASON ,NULL AS NOTE ,\'\' AS SHIPADDRESS ,W.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER ,W.LOGICALREF ,W.FICHEREF ,TOTAL ,NULL AS ODEMEPLAN ,NULL AS ORDERTYPE ,NULL AS FTYPE ,NULL AS BANKNAME ,NULL AS BANKBRANCH ,NULL AS ACCNO ,NULL AS DEBITED ,NULL AS DUEDATE ,\'WHTRANSFER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM WHTRANSFER AS W LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.NR = WAREHOUSENR WHERE W.FACT != 1 %1$s ORDER BY W.LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT LOGICALREF as _id,DEFINITION_ FROM MARKETINGMESSAGE WHERE TYPE = 0
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , ODEMEPLAN AS NAME, CODE FROM PAYMENT
SELECT P.LOGICALREF as _id ,P.ODEMEPLAN AS CODE FROM CLCARD C LEFT JOIN PAYMENT P ON C.PAYMENTREF=P.LOGICALREF WHERE C.LOGICALREF=?

SELECT IT.CODE ITEMCODE, UB.BARCODE, IFNULL(IU.CODE,\'\') UNITCODE, IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT1,\'\') CONVFACT1, IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT2,\'\') CONVFACT2, IFNULL(IU.CODE,\'\') || \' (\' || IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT1,\'\') || \':\' || IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT2,\'\') || \')\' UNITDESC, IFNULL(IU.WIDTH, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(WIDTHUNIT.CODE, \'\') WIDTH, IFNULL(IU.LENGTH, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(LENGTHUNIT.CODE, \'\') LENGTH, IFNULL(IU.HEIGHT, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(HEIGHTUNIT.CODE, \'\') HEIGHT, IFNULL(IU.AREA, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(AREAUNIT.CODE, \'\') AREA, IFNULL(IU.GROSSVOLUME, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(GROSSVOLUMEUNIT.CODE, \'\') GROSSVOLUME, IFNULL(IU.VOLUME, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(VOLUMEUNIT.CODE, \'\') VOLUME, IFNULL(IU.GROSSWEIGHT, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(GROSSWEIGHTUNIT.CODE, \'\') GROSSWEIGHT, IFNULL(IU.WEIGHT, \'\') || \' \' || IFNULL(WEIGHTUNIT.CODE, \'\') WEIGHT FROM ITEMUNITS IU LEFT JOIN UNITS UNT ON UNT.LOGICALREF=IU.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN ITEMS IT ON IT.LOGICALREF=IU.ITEMREF LEFT JOIN UNITS WIDTHUNIT ON WIDTHUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.WIDTHREF LEFT JOIN UNITS LENGTHUNIT ON LENGTHUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.LENGTHREF LEFT JOIN UNITS HEIGHTUNIT ON HEIGHTUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.HEIGHTREF LEFT JOIN UNITS AREAUNIT ON AREAUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.AREAREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GROSSVOLUMEUNIT ON GROSSVOLUMEUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.GROSSVOLREF LEFT JOIN UNITS VOLUMEUNIT ON VOLUMEUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.VOLUMEREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GROSSWEIGHTUNIT ON GROSSWEIGHTUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.GROSSWGHTREF LEFT JOIN UNITS WEIGHTUNIT ON WEIGHTUNIT.LOGICALREF = IU.WEIGHTREF LEFT JOIN UNITBARCODE UB ON UB.UNITREF = IU.LOGICALREF AND IU.ITEMREF = UB.ITEMREF WHERE IT.LOGICALREF = %1$d ORDER BY UNT.MAINUNIT DESC

SELECT IT.CODE ITEMCODE, IFNULL(IU.CODE,\'\') UNITCODE, IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT1,\'\') CONVFACT1, IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT2,\'\') CONVFACT2, IFNULL(IU.CODE,\'\') || \' (\' || IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT1,\'\') || \':\' || IFNULL(UNT.CONVFACT2,\'\') || \')\' UNITDESC, \'\' AS WIDTH, \'\' AS LENGTH, \'\' AS HEIGHT, \'\' AS AREA, \'\' AS GROSSVOLUME, \'\' AS VOLUME, \'\' AS GROSSWEIGHT, \'\' AS WEIGHT, \'\' AS BARCODE FROM SERVICEUNITS IU LEFT JOIN UNITS UNT ON UNT.LOGICALREF=IU.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SERVICE IT ON IT.LOGICALREF=IU.ITEMREF WHERE IT.LOGICALREF = %1$d ORDER BY UNT.MAINUNIT DESC
INNER JOIN DEFORDERDETAIL W ON W.ITEMREF=I.LOGICALREF AND W.DEFORDERID=%1$d AND W.LINETYPE=%2$d
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , PROJE AS NAME, CODE FROM PROJECT
SELECT P.LOGICALREF AS _id, P.CODE, P.PROJE AS DEFINITION_ FROM PROJECT P LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.PROJECTCODE=P.CODE WHERE CL.LOGICALREF=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE, IFNULL(CODE,\'\') || \' - \' || IFNULL(DEFINITION_,\'\') AS NAME FROM MUHREFCODES ORDER BY DEFINITION_ ASC
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SPECODE AS CODE FROM SPECODES WHERE CODETYPE=3 AND SPECODETYPE=0

SELECT UNT.LOGICALREF AS _id , UNT.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UNIT , UNT.CONVFACT1 , UNT.CONVFACT2 , UNT.CODE , 0 AS NETVOLUME , 0 AS GROSSVOLUME , 0 AS NETWEIGHT , 0 AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM SERVICEUNITS UNT WHERE UNT.ITEMREF=? ORDER BY UNT.PRIORITY, UNT.LINENR
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SPECODE AS CODE FROM SPECODES WHERE CODETYPE=? AND SPECODETYPE=?

SELECT UNT.LOGICALREF AS _id , UNT.CODE || \' ( \' ||CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT1 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' : \'|| CAST(CAST( UNT.CONVFACT2 AS INTEGER) AS NVARCHAR ) || \' )\' AS UNIT , UNT.CONVFACT1 , UNT.CONVFACT2 , UNT.CODE , COALESCE((UNT.VOLUME / VOL.CONVFACT1) * VOL.CONVFACT2 / 1000 , 0.00 ) AS NETVOLUME , COALESCE((UNT.GROSSVOLUME / GRSVOL.CONVFACT1) * GRSVOL.CONVFACT2 / 1000 , 0.00) AS GROSSVOLUME , COALESCE((UNT.WEIGHT / WGT.CONVFACT1) * WGT.CONVFACT2, 0.00) AS NETWEIGHT , COALESCE((UNT.GROSSWEIGHT / GRSWGT.CONVFACT1) * GRSWGT.CONVFACT2, 0.00) AS GROSSWEIGHT FROM ITEMUNITS UNT LEFT JOIN UNITS VOL ON VOL.LOGICALREF = UNT.VOLUMEREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GRSVOL ON GRSVOL.LOGICALREF = UNT.GROSSVOLREF LEFT JOIN UNITS WGT ON WGT.LOGICALREF = UNT.WEIGHTREF LEFT JOIN UNITS GRSWGT ON GRSWGT.LOGICALREF = UNT.GROSSWGHTREF WHERE UNT.ITEMREF=? AND UNT.SALESCLAS=1 ORDER BY UNT.SALESPRIORITY, UNT.LINENR
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id , NAME, CODE FROM VARIANTS WHERE ITEMREF=?
SELECT ISTRANSFER FROM INVOICE WHERE (SALESTYPE =2 OR SALESTYPE = 3) AND LOGICALREF = %1$d

SELECT SUM(ISTRANSFER) AS ISTRANSFER FROM ( SELECT ISTRANSFER FROM CASHCREDIT WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d UNION ALL SELECT ISTRANSFER FROM CASECASH WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d UNION ALL SELECT ISTRANSFER FROM CHEQUEDEED WHERE INVOICEREF = %1$d )
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SERIAL AS CODE, SERIAL AS NAME FROM EDOCSERIAL WHERE SERIALTYPE IN (1,2)
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SERIAL AS CODE, SERIAL AS NAME FROM EDOCSERIAL WHERE SERIALTYPE=3
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SERIAL AS CODE, SERIAL AS NAME FROM EDOCSERIAL WHERE SERIALTYPE=0
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE FROM SHIPAGENT ORDER BY TITLE ASC
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE FROM SHIPTYPE
SELECT S.LOGICALREF as _id ,S.CODE FROM CLCARD C LEFT JOIN SHIPAGENT S ON C.DELIVERYFIRM=S.CODE WHERE C.LOGICALREF=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE, DEFINITION_ AS NAME FROM CLCARD WHERE LOGICALREF=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE, CODE || \' \' || NAME || \' \' || ADDR1 AS NAME FROM SHIPADDRESS WHERE LOGICALREF=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SPECODE AS CODE, DEFINITION AS NAME FROM SPECODES WHERE CODETYPE=1 AND SPECODETYPE=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SPECODE AS CODE, DEFINITION AS NAME FROM SPECODES WHERE CODETYPE=1 AND SPECODETYPE=? AND SPECODE=?
SELECT 0 AS _id, TOWNCODE AS CODE, TOWNNAME AS NAME, CITYCODE FROM TOWN WHERE CITYCODE=? ORDER BY NAME

SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE, GATTRIB FROM TRADINGGRP T WHERE T.ACTIVE=0 UNION SELECT 0 AS _id, T.CODE, T.GATTRIB FROM TRADINGGRP T LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.TRADINGGRP=T.CODE WHERE CL.LOGICALREF=? AND TRADINGGRP!=\'\' AND T.ACTIVE=0
SELECT 0 AS _id, T.CODE, T.GATTRIB FROM TRADINGGRP T LEFT JOIN CLCARD CL ON CL.TRADINGGRP=T.CODE WHERE CL.LOGICALREF=? AND T.ACTIVE = 0
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, CODE, GATTRIB FROM TRADINGGRP WHERE CODE=? AND ACTIVE = 0
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, DESC_ AS CODE FROM VISITREASON
SELECT NR AS _id, AMBAR AS CODE FROM WAREHOUSE
SELECT NR AS _id, AMBAR AS CODE FROM WAREHOUSE WHERE FACTNR=? AND DIVISNR=?
SELECT DIVISNR FROM WAREHOUSE WHERE NR=?
SELECT FACTNR FROM WAREHOUSE WHERE NR=?
SELECT NR AS _id, AMBAR AS CODE FROM WAREHOUSE WHERE NR=?
SELECT LOGICALREF AS _id, SPECODE AS CODE FROM SPECODES WHERE CODETYPE=2 AND SPECODETYPE=?

SELECT VISITDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, REASON, NOTE, S.NAME AS SHIPADDRESS, V.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , ID AS LOGICALREF, ID AS FICHEREF, 0.00 AS TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'VISIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM VISITINFO AS V JOIN CLCARD AS C ON V.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS AS S WHERE V.SHIPADDRREF = S.LOGICALREF UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, O.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , O.LOGICALREF, O.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'ORDER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM ORDERS AS O JOIN CLCARD AS C ON O.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON O.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE O.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE,S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'IRSALIYE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 0 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'FATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 1 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'BIREBIR\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 2 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, I.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , I.LOGICALREF, I.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'PERAKENDEFATURA\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM INVOICE AS I JOIN CLCARD AS C ON I.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = I.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON I.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE FTYPE = 3 AND I.FACT!=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASE\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASECASH AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C WHERE CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, B.DEFINITION_ AS BANKNAME, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CASH\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKS AS B ON CC.BANKREF = B.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA WHERE B.LOGICALREF = BA.BANKREF AND FTYPE = 0 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CC.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CC.LOGICALREF, CC.FICHEREF, TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, B.DEFINITION_ AS BANKNAME, BA.DEFINITION_ AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'CREDIT\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CASHCREDIT AS CC JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CC.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKS AS B ON CC.BANKREF = B.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN BANKACCOUNTS AS BA WHERE B.LOGICALREF = BA.BANKREF AND FTYPE = 1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL , NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'SENET\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, C.DEFINITION_ AS CUSTOMERNAME, C.CODE AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, NULL AS SHIPADDRESS, CQ.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , CQ.LOGICALREF, CQ.FICHEREF, CD.TOTAL, NULL AS ODEMEPLAN, NULL AS ORDERTYPE, FTYPE, BANKNAME, BANKBRANCHNAME AS BANKBRANCH, ACCNO, DEBITED, CD.DUEDATE, \'CEK\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM CHEQUEDEED AS CQ JOIN CLCARD AS C ON CQ.CLREF = C.LOGICALREF LEFT JOIN CHEQUEDEEDDETAIL AS CD ON CQ.LOGICALREF = CD.CHEQUEDEEDID WHERE FTYPE = 0 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE, \'\' AS CUSTOMERNAME, \'\' AS CUSTOMERCODE, NULL AS REASON, NULL AS NOTE, S.CODE AS SHIPADDRESS, O.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER , O.LOGICALREF, O.FICHEREF, TOTAL , ODEMEPLAN, ORDERTYPE, NULL AS FTYPE, NULL AS BANKNAME, NULL AS BANKBRANCH, NULL AS ACCNO, NULL AS DEBITED, NULL AS DUEDATE, \'DEMAND\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM ORDERS AS O LEFT JOIN SHIPADDRESS S ON S.LOGICALREF = O.SHIPADDRREF LEFT JOIN PAYMENT AS P ON O.PAYMENTREF = P.LOGICALREF WHERE O.FACT!=1 AND O.ORDERTYPE=1 %1$s UNION SELECT GDATE AS DDATE ,WH.AMBAR AS CUSTOMERNAME ,\'\' AS CUSTOMERCODE ,NULL AS REASON ,NULL AS NOTE ,\'\' AS SHIPADDRESS ,W.ISTRANSFER AS ISTRANSFER ,W.LOGICALREF ,W.FICHEREF ,TOTAL ,NULL AS ODEMEPLAN ,NULL AS ORDERTYPE ,NULL AS FTYPE ,NULL AS BANKNAME ,NULL AS BANKBRANCH ,NULL AS ACCNO ,NULL AS DEBITED ,NULL AS DUEDATE ,\'WHTRANSFER\' AS ITEMTYPE FROM WHTRANSFER AS W LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.NR = WAREHOUSENR WHERE W.FACT != 1 %1$s ORDER BY ITEMTYPE,LOGICALREF DESC
SELECT TOP 1 ISNULL(%4$s, \'\') AS MAXNO FROM %3$s WHERE %4$s>=\'%1$s\' AND %4$s<=\'%2$s\' AND LEN(%4$s)=LEN(\'%2$S\') %5$s ORDER BY %4$s DESC

DELETE FROM %1$s WHERE INFOTYP=21 AND INFOREF=%2$d AND DOCTYP=0 AND DOCNR=11
SELECT NR AS ACTIVEPERIOD, BEGDATE, ENDDATE FROM L_CAPIPERIOD WHERE FIRMNR=%1$s AND ACTIVE=1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CAST(COUNTRY AS varchar(10)) AS COUNTRYCODE, CAST(LOGICALREF AS varchar(10)) AS LOGICALREF, CODE AS CITYCODE, NAME AS CITYNAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM L_CITY ) R
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CODE AS COUNTRYREF, CAST(COUNTRYNR AS varchar(10)) AS COUNTRYCODE, NAME AS COUNTRYNAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM L_COUNTRY ) R
SELECT SUM(TOTAL) AS TOTAL FROM %1$s WHERE CARDREF=%2$d AND SIGN=0 AND PAID<0.00000001 AND DATE_<=\'%3$s\' AND PAIDINCASH=0 AND CANCELLED=0
SELECT O.LOGICALREF, S.NAME FROM %1$s O LEFT JOIN %2$s S ON O.FCSTATUSREF=S.LOGICALREF WHERE O.LOGICALREF=%3$d

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CAST(CNTRNR AS varchar(10)) AS COUNTRYCODE, CAST(CTYREF AS varchar(10)) AS CITYCODE, CODE AS TOWNCODE, NAME AS TOWNNAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOGICALREF) AS RowNum FROM L_TOWN ) R

SELECT X.* FROM (SELECT -999 AS WAREHOUSEREF) AS dummy CROSS APPLY ( SELECT U.USERID, U.CODE, U.TYPE, F.PERIODNR, F.FIRMNR, U.USERROLEID, U.GROUPCODE, U.DOSHIP, ISNULL(U.SPECODE, \'\') SPECODE, (SELECT (CASE WHEN (SELECT W.VALUE [K] FROM WOR_PARAMUSER W WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE W.UserId = %1$d AND W.ParameterId = \'196\') = \'True\' THEN (SELECT [PARAMVALUE] = 1 WHERE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),GETDATE(),114) NOT BETWEEN (SELECT A.VALUE [X] FROM WOR_PARAMUSER A WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE A.UserId =%1$d AND A.ParameterId = \'194\') AND (SELECT B.VALUE [Y] FROM WOR_PARAMUSER B WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE B.UserId =%1$d AND B.ParameterId = \'195\')) END)) [WORKTIME], U.PASSWORD, U.USERNAME, (U.FNAME + \' \' +U.LNAME) AS [NAME], L.NAME [FIRMNAME], SL.LOGICALREF [SALESPERSONREF], LUSR.NR AS LOGONR, LUSR.LOGICALREF AS LOGOLOGICALREF, L.DBNAME, LUSR.NAME AS LOGOUSERNAME, L.EINVOICETYPSGK AS EINVOICETYPSGK , L.TAXPAYERCODE AS TAXPAYERCODE, L.TAXPAYERNAME AS TAXPAYERNAME, L.INTSALESADDR, U.DISTVEHICLE, U.EMAIL, SL.CYPHCODE ,ISNULL(WAREHOUSEREF, - 999) WAREHOUSEREF ,ISNULL(LW.NR, - 999) WAREHOUSENR ,ISNULL(LW.DIVISNR, - 999) BRANCHNR ,ISNULL(LW.FACTNR, - 999) FACTNR ,ISNULL(LW.COSTGRP, - 999) COSTGRP, (SELECT REVISION FROM WOR_VERSION WITH (NOLOCK)) PANELVERSION, CONVERT(VARCHAR,P.BEGDATE,110) PERIODSTART, CONVERT(VARCHAR,P.ENDDATE,110) PERIODEND FROM WOR_USERS U WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN WOR_USERFIRMS F WITH(NOLOCK) ON U.USERID=F.USERID LEFT JOIN LG_SLSMAN SL WITH(NOLOCK) ON SL.CODE=U.CODE LEFT JOIN L_CAPIUSER LUSR WITH(NOLOCK) ON LUSR.NAME = U.LOGOUSER LEFT JOIN L_CAPIFIRM L WITH(NOLOCK) ON L.NR=F.FIRMNR LEFT JOIN L_CAPIWHOUSE LW WITH (NOLOCK) ON LW.LOGICALREF = WAREHOUSEREF LEFT JOIN L_CAPIPERIOD P WITH(NOLOCK) ON P.FIRMNR = F.FIRMNR AND P.NR = F.PERIODNR WHERE U.APPTYPE=1 AND U.USERNAME=\'%2$s\' AND F.FIRMNR=%3$s AND SL.FIRMNR=%3$s AND P.ACTIVE = 1 AND U.PASSWORD=\'%4$s\') AS X
UPDATE %1$s SET IMAGEINC=1 , RECSTATUS=2 WHERE LOGICALREF=%2$d

CREATE TRIGGER Delete_InvoiceDetail_trigger AFTER DELETE ON INVOICEDETAIL FOR EACH ROW BEGIN DELETE FROM SERILOT WHERE DETAILREF = OLD.LOGICALREF AND SLFICHETYPE = 0; DELETE FROM FICHEDETAILBARCODE WHERE DETAILREF = OLD.LOGICALREF AND FICHETYPE = 0; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS Delete_OrderDetail_trigger AFTER DELETE ON ORDERDETAIL FOR EACH ROW BEGIN DELETE FROM FICHEDETAILBARCODE WHERE DETAILREF = OLD.LOGICALREF AND FICHETYPE = 2; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS Delete_WhTransDetail_trigger AFTER DELETE ON WHTRANSFERDETAIL FOR EACH ROW BEGIN DELETE FROM SERILOT WHERE DETAILREF = OLD.LOGICALREF AND SLFICHETYPE = 1; DELETE FROM FICHEDETAILBARCODE WHERE DETAILREF = OLD.LOGICALREF AND FICHETYPE = 1; END
